name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: NEW SENATE POLL: Dead-heat in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
| Friend,

We just got new polling on the race for U.S. Senate here in Michigan, and I wanted to make sure you saw it. Bottom line: We are in a statistical dead-heat against one of the leading Republicans, Mike Rogers — with a ton of Michigan swing voters still undecided. Elissa Slotkin: 44%
Mike Rogers: 42%
Undecided: 14% Polling is a notoriously fickle science, especially since it’s still early, but this data underscores a fundamental truth: Michigan is a swing state, and swing states have a tendency to...swing. Despite Democrats’ success in recent years, we know it can flip red under the right conditions.

So in light of this new poll, I want to ask if you’ll consider making a $3 contribution to my campaign and NewDems.

$3, because we are in a statistical tie against a Trump-endorsed candidate.

$3, because Democrats only have a 51 seat majority in the U.S. Senate, and with Joe Manchin’s retirement and a likely flip in West Virginia, we need to hold onto this seat for Democrats to retain control of the body.

$3, because our race is the top of the ticket in Michigan — which means what happens will likely have an impact on the presidential race here as well.

$3, because roughly 1 in 6 voters are undecided in our race, and we need to be able to talk to those voters in all 11 of Michigan’s media markets.

I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, but there are just 4 months left until Election Day and contributions from people like you in response to emails like this represent the bulk of the money we raise — which means your support is critical to getting us over the finish line.

|

Should you have any questions at all, or you would like to RSVP, please don’t hesitate to email us at [**Events@andyogles.com**](mailto:events@andyogles.com?subject=Question%20About%20an%20Event&body=)****

[](https://andyogles.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ebf5c4144eb35f4cf4004f6c&id=a3102ee878&e=0ad50b23ec)
| State legislators, whose districts are within Tennessee’s Fifth Congressional District, have _**endorsed Andy Ogles for reelection**_. [READ MORE HERE](https://andyogles.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ebf5c4144eb35f4cf4004f6c&id=9dbd818b70&e=0ad50b23ec)
🇺🇸 Senate Majority Leader Jack Johnson🇺🇸 Senator Joey Hensley 🇺🇸 Senator Mark Pody 🇺🇸 Representative Clark Boyd 🇺🇸 Representative Gino Bulso🇺🇸 Representative Kip Capley🇺🇸 Representative Scott Cepicky🇺🇸 Representative Susan Lynn 🇺🇸 Representative Jake McCalmon
Here is what a few of them had to say...
Senate Majority Leader Jack Johnson:“Congressman Andy Ogles has shown a strong commitment to Tennessee values and conservative principles. His efforts to address issues such as border security, government accountability, and inflation highlight his dedication to improving the lives of all Americans. Andy's hard work and passion for service are valuable to both our state and our nation. I support Congressman Ogles for re-election and encourage all of Tennessee’s Fifth Congressional District to consider doing the same.”
Senator Joey Hensley:“I am proud to endorse Congressman Andy Ogles, a true warrior for our freedoms. In these challenging times, we need leaders like Andy, who stand up against big government and radical overreach. He is a fierce defender of our Constitution, tirelessly protecting our liberties. Andy speaks the truth and fights the establishment with fearless resolve. His dedication to limited government, fiscal responsibility, and individual freedom is unmatched.Congressman Ogles always puts America First, and I hope you’ll join me in supporting his re-election to keep our nation strong and free.”
Senator Mark Pody:“While working with Andy Ogles at the State Capitol for many years, I was able to see his conservative stance. When he was Mayor of Maury County, we watched him stand up to the federal government to protect his citizens' constitutional rights. Now, as a congressman, he has been very outspoken, trying to stand up for all of Tennessee against the overreach of the federal government.”
Representative Gino Bulso:“Congressman Andy Ogles is the clear choice for conservative representation in Tennessee’s Fifth Congressional District. His devotion to Tennessee values has earned him stellar legislative scorecard ratings from nearly every major conservative organization, and his drive to make substantive change has allowed him to break records by passing more pieces of legislation than any other freshman member of Congress. I am proud to endorse Andy Ogles for re-election and look forward to all that he will accomplish in the coming years.”
Representative Scott Cepicky:“I endorse Congressman Ogles because he is taking Tennessee values to Washington and fighting for them on behalf of the whole country. We need to continue sending strong conservatives to Washington so that we can hopefully save the Republic from the leftist agenda. Only one person can do that in Tennessee, and that’s Congressman Andy Ogles.”
Representative Jake McCalmon:“As my congressman, Andy has shown a dedication to conservative Tennessee values. He’s fighting the good fight, and I’m proud to know him, consider him my friend, and endorse his campaign for re-election.”
Representative Kip Capley:“As a Conservative Republican myself, I know what true leadership in the face of adversity looks like. There is only one choice in this election: Andy Ogles. He is a true champion for our conservative values. He has my full support, confidence, and endorsement in his reelection campaign.”
Representative Susan Lynn:“Congressman Ogles works hard for us in Washington to fix our broken system, limit the power of the federal government, and uphold our conservative values. We can trust Andy to vote in line with President Trump’s agenda to protect our borders and restore the United States to a position of prominence on the world stage. This is the kind of person he's always been—he listens to the will of Tennessee's grassroots, not the DC Beltway crowd. I am proud to endorse Congressman Andy Ogles for re-election, and I know he will continue to put the people of Tennessee above all else.”
---
|
---
|
---

subject: 🇺🇸 To all of President Biden's supporters and anyone who wants to beat Donald Trump ⛅️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We'll get straight to the point. | | |
---

🇺🇸 To all of President Biden's supporters and those who want to beat Donald Trump ⛅️ Please don't scroll past this. This isn't the first time we've emailed recently, so we'll get straight to the point.

_At the end of the month, we close the books on the most important FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign to date._ When it's over, everyone will be looking at our numbers, comparing them to Trump's, and the outcome will shape the media coverage and even votes. So this is important.

If everyone reading this donated even $5, we would reach our fundraising goals in the next hour. Unfortunately, not everyone gives -- which is why President Biden is counting on those who truly understand the stakes of this election to contribute.

Most of our donations come from people chipping in when they can, and we're passionate about that model because at its core it means this campaign is powered by regular people, not super PACs.

If reelecting Joe Biden and defeating Trump feels worth $25 to you, please take a minute to secure the future of our campaign by making a donation. Thank you. [**Please use this link to give or select an amount below. Our average donation online is around $45. Some give more, some give less. clean_body: We'll get straight to the point. | | | 🇺🇸 To all of President Biden's supporters and those who want to beat Donald Trump ⛅️ Please don't scroll past this. This isn't the first time we've emailed recently, so we'll get straight to the point. At the end of the month, we close the books on the most important FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign to date. When it's over, everyone will be looking at our numbers, comparing them to Trump's, and the outcome will shape the media coverage and even votes. So this is important. If everyone reading this donated even $5, we would reach our fundraising goals in the next hour. Unfortunately, not everyone gives -- which is why President Biden is counting on those who truly understand the stakes of this election to contribute. Most of our donations come from people chipping in when they can, and we're passionate about that model because at its core it means this campaign is powered by regular people, not super PACs. If reelecting Joe Biden and defeating Trump feels worth $25 to you, please take a minute to secure the future of our campaign by making a donation. Thank you. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | 🙏🙏 Please don't click away from this request. We need your help if we're going to win. Team Biden-Harris

**** 5,000 RESPONSES NEEDED BY 10AM TOMORROW ****
* * *
Invoking the 14th amendment would bar Donald Trump from EVER holding office. _We’d never have to worry about him becoming President again!_

**But without a surge of support, Trump could seize the presidency for four more years — _EVEN FROM A PRISON CELL!_**

That’s why we’re calling on 5,000 top Democrats to weigh in NOW:
[**[CONFIRM] Should Congress use the 14th Amendment to BAN Trump from office?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/ban-trump/?source=VPP_20240706_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=15427%2E878179%2ENjDmiI)

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: happening tomorrow!
body:
The media won’t tell you this, but tomorrow is one of the most important days for pro-lifers...
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

The media won’t tell you this, but tomorrow is one of the most important days for pro-lifers IN YEARS.

_Why?_

Because the Republican National Committee (RNC) is having their first post-_Roe_ platform meeting, which will ultimately decide what the party’s platform is on abortion for years to come.

The bad news is, as we’ve heard from several delegates to the Republican National Convention, there are forces working to weaken the platform’s pro-life language.

This is exactly why _Students for Life Action_ has launched our _GOP for Life Campaign:_ to STOP any effort to turn the GOP into a squishy, complacent party at best . . . or a pro-abortion party at worst.

**[Pro-Life Friend, would you please consider making your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action’s GOP for Life Campaign_ today](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gyknhy-duchtdja-y/)?**

Your financial support will help me make sure the Republican Party doesn't fold when we need them most!

And with the Republican National Convention set to start work on the platform TOMORROW, _Students for Life Action_ is already on the ground because THIS is when it counts.

But I’m counting on your support to help us let the GOP know that the Pro-Life Generation won’t settle for anything less than a solid pro-life platform by conducting several key programs, including:

**> _Direct Lobbying Campaign Calls_** – Our team is individually calling RNC members and delegates to engage in a conversation, educate them about Life, and urge them to sign our Pledge to Keep the Platform Pro-Life. We are also reaching out to the leaders of other conservative and pro-life issue groups to rally a Coalition around this effort.

**> _Online and Digital Advocacy_** – Through our Civiclick platform and our online petitions, _Students for Life Action_ is supplying tools that allow pro-life activists to easily and quickly contact RNC members and delegates. Through our email and texting campaigns, we’ll reach out to pro-life voters to encourage them to contact their elected Republican Party officials.

**> _Billboard Truck Tours and Student Protests_** – Our students and supporters will be physically present to rally at several events where RNC delegates and Republican Party officials gather. Our Pro-Life Video Billboard Truck will launch a tour in mid-July that takes it to Wisconsin ahead of the convention as delegates are arriving and serve as a rally point for our convention student mobilizations.
Pro-Life Friend, as you can imagine, such ambitious plans as these don’t come cheap . . .

Especially since President Biden’s economy has made just about everything more expensive!

But that doesn’t change how **CRITICAL** these programs are to ensuring the GOP platform isn’t hijacked by the Abortion Lobby.

You and I can’t afford to let that happen. Not when 2024 will be the deciding year that changes the fate of abortion in America – _for better . . . or worse._

**[So, with everything on the line in 2024, will you please consider making your most generous contribution of $500, $250, $100, or $50 to _Students for Life Action’s GOP for Life Campaign_ right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gyknhy-duchtdja-j/)?**

**[Even a gift of $25 or just $10 will help me keep the GOP platform in line](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gyknhy-duchtdja-i/)!**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-gyknhy-026154D2-duchtdja-d) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-gyknhy-duchtdja-h/)
**

**
---

subject: Leaked email from President Biden exposes new 2024 election plans
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | July 07, 2024

Leaked email from
President Biden exposes new 2024 election plans

There's growing speculation on whether Joe Biden will
drop out of the race or not. Now we finally have our answer.

As a leaked email from President
Biden exposes his latest 2024 election plans.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Biden reveals a shocking
secret regarding his presidential campaign

Joe Biden has loads
of skeletons in his closet. But now some of them are finally
coming out.
➞ Continue Reading

White House scandal
involving Hunter Biden has sent Washington, D.C. up in flames

The Biden family is
full of corruption. There's nothing they won't do to for more
power.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden insulted
millions of Americans with this disgusting comment

It's clear that the
president doesn't hold U.S. citizens in high regard. He and his
administration have been working to make their lives more
difficult.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

Your privacy is important to us.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Colby Jenkins
subject: Every Vote Must Count
body:
Please help us fight to ensure every legal and eligible vote counts!
No images? [Click here](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-e-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-m/) [](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-r/) [DONATE TO HELP US FIGHT TO GET EVERY VOTE COUNTED](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-y/)
### Dear Friends,
### First of all, we want to thank all of you for your dedication to making our country great, and for the support that many of you have shown for our campaign throughout this process.
### While Election Day was nearly two weeks ago, the race remains too close to call. Since Election Day, ballots have continued to arrive, and numbers have been updated regularly.
### We've continued to outperform our opponent in these late updates and the race is within .30%. There are still enough remaining ballots to be reviewed and counted that could change the outcome of the race - so, it is extremely critical that every eligible and legal vote be counted.
### Unfortunately, we are having to fight multiple battles against county clerks and county attorneys refusing to give us lists that we believe they are required by law to give. This now isn't just a political process, it is also a legal process and we've had to retain lawyers.
### We are asking for any financial assistance you can offer to help us through this and a potential recount (we are .05% from a recount).
###
### Thank you,
### Colby
###
[ANY DONATION AMOUNT WILL HELP US](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-j/) [](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-t/)
# MORE BACKGROUND:
### Each county has to have their final canvass done by next Tuesday, some have already completed theirs, even as ballots were still being returned or processed.
### This isn't simply just waiting for ballots to arrive and then counting them, there are many other factors to consider:
* ### -Provisional ballots are cast when a voter doesn't receive a ballot in the mail or goes to vote in person but they aren't on the voter list. These must be reviewed to determine voter eligibility before they can be counted

* ### -There are sometimes ballots that get rejected and set aside to be reviewed because voter intent couldn't be determined. This can be because the ballot wasn't properly filled out. These ballots are reviewed by two election judges and if the intent is clear then they get counted in the final tally.

* ### -Postmark issues. There are many ballots that were postmarked after the deadline that are being rejected. This year, we have a unique situation where many counties in Southern Utah now have their mail routed through Las Vegas as it is a closer hub than Salt Lake City. This has caused delays in ballots being returned and many of those ballots have late postmarks yet voters are telling us that they are positive they returned their ballot before the deadline. Read this Deseret News article to understand what we are referring to: [A recount just became more likely in the 2nd Congressional District Republican primary](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-i/):
* \--..."a late influx of 350 unprocessed ballots that arrived in Washington County from the U.S. Postal Service distribution center in Las Vegas on Tuesday -- one week after Election Day."
* \--..."It was kind of a surprise to us to see," Washington County Clerk Ryan Sullivan told the Deseret News."

* ### -There are also mail-in ballots that don't get counted because the signature on the ballot doesn't match the government database. When this happens, the ballots get put on what is called a "cure list", or a list of ballots to be cured. This process includes outreach to voters via the contact information they provided on their ballot. Campaigns often have more contact information for voters than the clerks do, and they are far more motivated to contact these voters to have them cure their ballot.
* ### \--Cure ballots are not opened until the signature is verified - therefore nobody knows who these individuals have voted for.
* ### \--Races in Utah have been won by getting voters to cure their ballots.
* ### \--Some counties give out the list when it is request, yet others are refusing to do so.
* ### \--The law seems pretty clear that if the list is requested, they must provide it. [Utah Code 20A-3a-401(12) states: ](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-d/)
* \---"if, in response to a request, and in accordance with the requirements of law, an election officer discloses the name or address of voters whose ballots have been rejected and not yet resolved, the election officer shall: (a)make the disclosure within two business days after the day on which the request is made; (b)respond to each request in the order the requests were made; and(c)make each disclosure in a manner, and within a period of time, that does not reflect favoritism to one requestor over another.

### **We have been trying to get these cure lists for over a week now**. Salt Lake County has given it to us, **but others refuse**. Some have already completed their canvass so ballots cannot be cured.
### However, Washington County has been our best performing county and is one where ballots come through the Las Vegas postal hub and **they have nearly 500 ballots still to be cured, and they must be cured by Monday evening.**
### **They are refusing to give us the list,** claiming that the law is optional for clerks to follow. We disagree that is is optional, but let's say it is...there is no logical reason to not share the list with campaigns. There are no voter privacy concerns, that is just an easy excuse. This is no different than campaigns getting the registered voter list, or the list of voters who have already voted.
### So, we have now asked the court for an emergency hearing to have them compel Washington County to give us the list so that we can try and contact these voters. This is very frustrating since **our entire point is to get as many legal and eligible votes counted as possible.**
### Any financial support you can provide will help us with this effort and will lead to discovering new policies that we will pursue with the state legislature to clarify laws to improve the election process.

## On Monday at 9:00 am the court will review and make a determination. Washington County Attorney, Eric Clarke, who is advising the county clerk to not release the list, will be defending Washington County. Here he is openly campaigning for our opponent:
[](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-h/) [](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-k/) [](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-u/)[](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-o/)[](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-b/)[](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-n/)[](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-p/) [](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-x/) [ Share ](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-fb-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-c/) [ Tweet ](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-tw-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-s/) [ Share ](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-li-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-g/) [ Forward ](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-trihsurjy-F0A48A54-ekddkkd-l-w) | Paid for by Colby Jenkins for Congress You are receiving this email because you have been identified as an Utah voter, or you have subscribed through our website. [Preferences](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/t-ekddkkd-F0A48A54-trihsurjy-yd) | [Unsubscribe](https://colbyjenkinsforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-u-ekddkkd-trihsurjy-yh/)

Dear Friends, First of all, we want to thank all of you for your dedication to making our country great, and for the support that many of you have shown for our campaign throughout this process. While Election Day was nearly two weeks ago, the race remains too close to call. Since Election Day, ballots have continued to arrive, and numbers have been updated regularly. We've continued to outperform our opponent in these late updates and the race is within .30%. There are still enough remaining ballots to be reviewed and counted that could change the outcome of the race - so, it is extremely critical that every eligible and legal vote be counted. Unfortunately, we are having to fight multiple battles against county clerks and county attorneys refusing to give us lists that we believe they are required by law to give. This now isn't just a political process, it is also a legal process and we've had to retain lawyers. We are asking for any financial assistance you can offer to help us through this and a potential recount (we are .05% from a recount). Thank you, Colby MORE BACKGROUND: Each county has to have their final canvass done by next Tuesday, some have already completed theirs, even as ballots were still being returned or processed. This isn't simply just waiting for ballots to arrive and then counting them, there are many other factors to consider: ### -Provisional ballots are cast when a voter doesn't receive a ballot in the mail or goes to vote in person but they aren't on the voter list. These must be reviewed to determine voter eligibility before they can be counted ### -There are sometimes ballots that get rejected and set aside to be reviewed because voter intent couldn't be determined. This can be because the ballot wasn't properly filled out. These ballots are reviewed by two election judges and if the intent is clear then they get counted in the final tally. ### -Postmark issues. There are many ballots that were postmarked after the deadline that are being rejected. This year, we have a unique situation where many counties in Southern Utah now have their mail routed through Las Vegas as it is a closer hub than Salt Lake City. This has caused delays in ballots being returned and many of those ballots have late postmarks yet voters are telling us that they are positive they returned their ballot before the deadline. Read this Deseret News article to understand what we are referring to: : \--..."a late influx of 350 unprocessed ballots that arrived in Washington County from the U.S. Postal Service distribution center in Las Vegas on Tuesday -- one week after Election Day." \--..."It was kind of a surprise to us to see," Washington County Clerk Ryan Sullivan told the Deseret News." ### -There are also mail-in ballots that don't get counted because the signature on the ballot doesn't match the government database. When this happens, the ballots get put on what is called a "cure list", or a list of ballots to be cured. This process includes outreach to voters via the contact information they provided on their ballot. Campaigns often have more contact information for voters than the clerks do, and they are far more motivated to contact these voters to have them cure their ballot. ### \--Cure ballots are not opened until the signature is verified - therefore nobody knows who these individuals have voted for. ### \--Races in Utah have been won by getting voters to cure their ballots. ### \--Some counties give out the list when it is request, yet others are refusing to do so. ### \--The law seems pretty clear that if the list is requested, they must provide it. \---"if, in response to a request, and in accordance with the requirements of law, an election officer discloses the name or address of voters whose ballots have been rejected and not yet resolved, the election officer shall: (a)make the disclosure within two business days after the day on which the request is made; (b)respond to each request in the order the requests were made; and(c)make each disclosure in a manner, and within a period of time, that does not reflect favoritism to one requestor over another. We have been trying to get these cure lists for over a week now. Salt Lake County has given it to us, but others refuse. Some have already completed their canvass so ballots cannot be cured. However, Washington County has been our best performing county and is one where ballots come through the Las Vegas postal hub and they have nearly 500 ballots still to be cured, and they must be cured by Monday evening. They are refusing to give us the list, claiming that the law is optional for clerks to follow. We disagree that is is optional, but let's say it is...there is no logical reason to not share the list with campaigns. There are no voter privacy concerns, that is just an easy excuse. This is no different than campaigns getting the registered voter list, or the list of voters who have already voted. So, we have now asked the court for an emergency hearing to have them compel Washington County to give us the list so that we can try and contact these voters. This is very frustrating since our entire point is to get as many legal and eligible votes counted as possible.** Any financial support you can provide will help us with this effort and will lead to discovering new policies that we will pursue with the state legislature to clarify laws to improve the election process. On Monday at 9:00 am the court will review and make a determination. Washington County Attorney, Eric Clarke, who is advising the county clerk to not release the list, will be defending Washington County. Here he is openly campaigning for our opponent: | Paid for by Colby Jenkins for Congress You are receiving this email because you have been identified as an Utah voter, or you have subscribed through our website. |

name: Lila Rose
subject: How a onesie can save a life
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [ ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTg5LWNkNjVlOWVmYzUxZDQ5ODliNzI0ZThiODg4OTRiNjBkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2dpdmUubGl2ZWFjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2VuZC1hLW9uZXNpZS10b2RheS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1vbmVzaWUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2VuZXJpY19BRS1GRk81MTIyMyJ9/_PPOWeQ_MFmtXO6-3LttHA)

#
Friend of Life,

My name is Lila Rose, and I'm the founder and president of Live Action.

I'm reaching out with an urgent and heartfelt request. This month, Live Action is partnering with pro-life pregnancy resource centers nationwide to provide onesies for mothers and babies in need. Will you join us for our first-ever onesie drive?

This month only, a gift of $60 will provide three custom "Wonderfully Made" onesies to three moms and their babies at risk of abortion. These onesies are more than just clothing--they are symbols of hope and reminders that every child is a precious gift, beautifully and wonderfully made. [ ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTg5LWNkNjVlOWVmYzUxZDQ5ODliNzI0ZThiODg4OTRiNjBkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2dpdmUubGl2ZWFjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2VuZC1hLW9uZXNpZS10b2RheS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1vbmVzaWUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2VuZXJpY19BRS1GRk81MTIyMyJ9/8oiPpV8H208WBWuY7ka3-g)
Onesies are a basic necessity for every baby. More than that, they symbolize the love and care each new life needs to thrive--a tangible representation of personal connection and love for both mother and baby. For mothers facing unplanned pregnancies or struggling with financial difficulties, having the basics provided can make all the difference in helping them feel supported.

Every baby is a gift that deserves to be cherished and provided for, and every mother deserves to know her baby is treasured not just by her but also by her community.

Abortion providers like Planned Parenthood rely on women feeling isolated by their unplanned pregnancies. Together, we can show these courageous women they are supported and loved by a community that values every life.

To make this possible, you can donate $60 to send custom onesies to three moms and babies in need. Click here to donate: **[https://give.liveaction.org/send-a-onesie-today/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTg5LWNkNjVlOWVmYzUxZDQ5ODliNzI0ZThiODg4OTRiNjBkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2dpdmUubGl2ZWFjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2VuZC1hLW9uZXNpZS10b2RheS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1vbmVzaWUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2VuZXJpY19BRS1GRk81MTIyMyJ9/FMk9LIcSTgnbF7eYQ8pMcw)**

If you can, please share this email with friends and family who might also want to help or share our campaign on social media to raise awareness.

Thank you for stepping up to support mothers and their precious children. With your help, we can make a profound difference in these families' lives.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**
Live Action

_P.S. Remember, this campaign only runs until the end of the month! Please act now to[**provide a onesie to a baby in need.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTg5LWNkNjVlOWVmYzUxZDQ5ODliNzI0ZThiODg4OTRiNjBkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2dpdmUubGl2ZWFjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2VuZC1hLW9uZXNpZS10b2RheS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1vbmVzaWUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2VuZXJpY19BRS1GRk81MTIyMyJ9/qColBAO-v-sIt7OrA9ENMw) Your gift will be a beacon of hope and a powerful affirmation of life. Thank you!_

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTg5LWNkNjVlOWVmYzUxZDQ5ODliNzI0ZThiODg4OTRiNjBkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/b7dWkcek7lKspl9XuJ8-Zg) to unsubscribe.

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqmk56e918jdolt1v2tvoibo82ivf7n6fn98ho1g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm2or6c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs180bn8266k0l8bceknma0qm6auifqeonpkj90g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm2or6c9h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze3koo6q91e5qr9hpstu90lisvrsfo9grejtooig_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm2or6c9h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zulup7r3a8ckj07cehpkc1k5k8jis3u6lufogbfg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm2or6c9h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6cq8o9r6smb2pmvhns9mi5qipl869hdensf6mhg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm2or6c9h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6ddvk7o5vm4lqub3ik0fnktdthutm4f2dpgj74g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm2or6c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the fit for you.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1o029dg16b2s0158qhbu3s79ljppgikmbptf70o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm2or6c1h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, knowing where to start can seem daunting. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrrt8stk0tt3jsi7q2npv5dnd547a372fnnphgc8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm2or6c1h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to plan to work toward a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcm6hfatpsnrmkcf6bja1chgnk0852b27ch9jrhg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm2or6c1h2bs)

The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. name: Update for America
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zv940jp4ncrt9ovied7ii2blgve0e96ettbq46rg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob5c5h2bs)

| | Dear Friend, [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1f8ms8ec5am1vabnoggj1iad8uali9a3siqdu60_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob5c5h2bs)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zemv30i13tufo6q2vfr8rvskf01ue6lpk77g8fvo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob5c5h2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zn7aanamg4nopna5jjibh34sup4km7elaos20ne0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob5c5h2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmg4k1n9i4rao2aebf3rsok7jsa11vev8bej5gpo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob5c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z60jtqgii51bso797p6bjk3f0fja4mt7co46egh0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob5c5h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq28a6qbdp4mk41i4s277v78j9mvpupufgalg768_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob5c5h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrvb8qj8t72bbk8ofetj8g1d0dcain1i13h4p5u0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob5c5h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4d02n3v0d3evrthqpec80v2c85vqdtunol9b6o8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob5c5h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbrjb9nt20md6ancqdk1gjvp9s1cv7q5o23qf898_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob5c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Washington D.C. betrayed my son
body:
I know you and I have never met.

Dear Friend,

I know you and I have never met. But I'm praying that you'll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

This is a picture of Terence and me at a dinner celebrating his graduation from the Police Academy.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbitge70eejlc3asf4euh2lc1i3lrvnrifc520o0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob1c1h2bs)
I was so proud that night. But I was also terrified.

Terence was going to be patrolling the streets of Washington, DC, where crime is sky-high and politicians side with criminals over cops. But never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **- murder of a criminal my son didn't even touch.**

The story is so shocking that if it didn't happen to my son, _I wouldn 't even believe it._ **[And I'm praying you will help me save my son](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj4tb93japb4l241ie5noljf6svkpohpsahgbugo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob1c1h2bs)** - **but first, let me explain what happened.**

Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang's territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long - including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he had been seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

So when Terence saw him illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull Karon over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

And then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here's where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd's death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon's death.

The pressure campaign worked, and prosecutors charged my son with _**Second-Degree Murder.**_

When Terence called to tell me about the charges, I was in disbelief. Any sane person could see that Karon's death, while tragic, was no one's fault but his own.

_He_ chose to run from the cops.

_He_ chose to not wear a helmet.

_He_ chose to speed through that alley without looking where he was going.

So, when I learned that Terence could be sentenced to **_sixty_ _years_** in prison for Karon's death, my head started spinning. And it only got worse when the trial began.

You see, the judge refused to allow Terence's legal team to present all of the facts in his defense.

The jury never got to hear that Karon was a known member of a violent gang...

They never got to hear that he was wearing an ankle monitor because of a violent assault he had committed just weeks before...

They never got to hear that he had drugs and thousands of dollars in cash strapped to his leg...

And they never got to hear about the drugs in Karon's system at the time of the crash.

Sitting in the courtroom, I couldn't believe my ears when the jury filed out and declared Terence _**" guilty."**_

He's currently awaiting sentencing.

Now you understand why I'm so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them.

He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

And at the same time the bleeding-heart DC politicians are letting shoplifters, carjackers, and drug dealers walk away scot-free...

...they're trying to put my son - a decorated officer who has received 60 awards and commendations - away for 60 years for something he _didn 't_ _do._

I had almost lost hope, but then we learned about the **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** -or LELDF for short.

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments. And when I got the call from their president, Jason Johnson, I was at my lowest moment.

Not only did LELDF decide to help my son get the legal defense he deserves. They're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses for Terence.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone:

**[Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7nlaqmv6ge1jhghrrp5uip04a8ftfo8p9ncg0f0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob1c1h2bs)**

To fund his defense, Terence had to sell his home, his car, his beloved motorcycle, and most of his personal belongings. Everything he owns now fits in just nine small boxes. He has almost nothing left.

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. And it makes me cry when I think of how he would feel about what Terence is being put through right now.

I simply can't bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

**[So if you are at all able, would you consider following this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs8qh48j6o1b4k24bmdq7ob84f6dstsabevvil18_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob1c1h2bs)**

**Any amount - $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more - will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Terence's team is currently looking at every available option to keep his case alive.

**[And you and your $35 contribution could make the difference in Terence being acquitted or spending the next 60 years behind bars.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg632q4uai28lhc8voq5616haggjeg60j0dh7m3o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob1c1h2bs)**

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you - in advance - for doing what you can to help all the wrongly-accused officers LELDF is working with. Like Terence.

Sincerely,

Patti Reilly

P.S. I know a few kind words from someone like you will help lift Terence's spirits. This guilty verdict has been so devastating for him. **[So if you choose to make a $35 gift to LELDF, would you also please include a little note-maybe a prayer?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0m6e1578teg5n1b659v7a283j1naptg8e11jkbg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob1c1h2bs)** There's a field on the page for you to do this. Thank you -from the bottom of my heart.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeotf2suph1hls902dg2c758guabm0ging734l30_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgm6ob1c1h2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

American Action News
---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn516e5okpi7h4rd2snocpj6fv3vbc6ocn96dvi0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgmepj6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z23hb3hcsqvuk4f94b1irvnbqfrfht5j9q0q0utg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgmepj6clh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgmdg2fs1t7bjrh9mb1amorkg2ioromv7m40enug_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgmepj6clh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs41jkp29b6d8fqvr4jrdnpruvnbmlsukp01j5mg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgmepj6clh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn50249im3op9bsr130ttfoflt93a3v8li35v0so_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgmepj6clh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ndeocuj00ulhred7jpdgq0c34o6a8o06kigqq0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpgmepj6clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zah84ddpv7c8qnnsk0vsek74nae1l0p7264vfkl0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0o31cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp1afsn60cjdb9rqs6440u8oa88rb37v73tcjqqg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0o31cph2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhdnsehsumvbniot3jv3c1nduged904f6d8g7dq0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0o31cph2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9b8lv60ns6qvkrnu0efl3289barro7ql4j80aao_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0o31cph2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z00i7vcmgr9dm94sshfm6h7qrp4a26gj0l1coubo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0o31cph2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5en1e4evpr1d4b2ippq2hn84j6tfev2jo14abn8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0o31cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: FINAL NOTICE
subject: Kiss your dreams goodbye, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We hate to say this, but it’s true

Friend,

We are in _CRISIS MODE._

Our first major deadline since **[President Trump's fraudulent conviction](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zts2hto8pmk0bcceoq2lahj6g3i9gbf43grm4pu8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0p72cjh2bs)** is in just 2 days, and we STILL haven't received enough responses to the **[2024 REPUBLICAN PLATFORM SURVEY](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm5l80m46m59qq1fglif194q469g8tthg7p5khc8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0p72cjh2bs)** yet.
_Several Senators have already reached out to ask for your input on this survey:_

**[1\. Senator Ted Cruz](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztidvbho7mk40v0ar5ab2tuin561340qcctmcfn8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0p72cjh2bs)

[4\. Senator Ron Johnson](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zodvkf7b0sudesesckacr5vo29k9purinr7el5vo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0p72cjh2bs)

[5\. Senator Marco Rubio](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn5q309jkcslu98m02rrlnp09l2m6udqm8ua9mag_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0p72cjh2bs)

[6\. Senator Rick Scott](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqgoovceaqfltta8unqk3pasf00fjibstet3ktpg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0p72cjh2bs)**
We CAN'T set the GOP's official campaign platform without you, friend. **[Will you drop what you're doing and complete the survey right now?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zubaji4e28tprlt0adbhu2qgiehacs9mgo7vo3j0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0p72cjh2bs)**
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3dagh481ukljmatahr5j78ta70gp1sis514jqto_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0p72cjh2bs)
There are MULTIPLE states that we MUST flip from blue to red to give President Trump the **[rock-solid conservative majority](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfg0rbpcfhcplhvmf1genp4q78bvg9nehl2amgb8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0p72cjh2bs)** he needs in the Senate. But if we don't receive enough survey responses before the upcoming June End-of-Quarter deadline, we might as well kiss our dreams goodbye.

**[Step up RIGHT NOW and represent your city in the 2024 REPUBLICAN PLATFORM SURVEY.>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zicas70oh90te2grnkspdnk45415db8sabdu5g3o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim0p72cjh2bs) **

body:

---
Friend,
---
There was a time when I read the paper in the morning and saw headlines about me taking down the mob in New York...
---
...About keeping our streets and our citizens safe.
---
_...About successfully defending President Trump as his impeachment lawyer from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable._
---
But now, I look at the headlines – and __this__ is what I see:
---

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Your America is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp5gdtlf07vl05kltgojv7aal8qaacds3kaecl0g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim8o72c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0r7imidvfga45chfqe74qi84b6kbd8rmumid3c0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim8o72c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfvdq5brmndul0lmhrp4a1v50sl2s2s1dtgam19o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim8o72c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg5kj2o07pbdtdb4haajgq624o5tm870don1e9c8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim8o72c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9vc7ec8r2dl84rei920u32qaocdjbkv21c659j8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim8o72c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj0c9imcp724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zckafav8dqmk4k1m38c4f4us30lh1qjrl6n5h2i8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpim8o72c9h2bs)_

name: David Horowitz
subject: America's History Under Attack
body:
The lies and distortions spread by the radical Left are threatening to undermine everything our nation stands for.

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, America's history and values are under attack like never before. The lies and distortions spread by the radical Left are threatening to undermine everything our nation stands for. Leftists in academia and the media are aggressively pushing false narratives like the “1619 Project” that claim America was founded as “white supremacist” country and was built on the back of slavery, as a means of justifying their ultimate agenda of destroying America. That’s why in my new book, **_America Betrayed: How a Christian Monk Created America & Why the Left Is Determined to Destroy Her_**, I reveal the true history of America's world historic contribution to human freedom. **[**And I want you to be one of the first to have a copy.**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJx8kLGu2yAYhZ8Gb0S_ARszMCR1fLskqrJ0RBh-EipjWxjfqH36ylK7Xp3tG47O-X7ezM3GKc7Pu02oczJ5Lmb0xr-CMwyYoCApSMMqr1vFZFdXqGvJgAteK6he2jsbsPHeBtfiyJB13YitglDXlksuq6iPHpBHhAR16mwYQQrfyACofEMEZFz3cYrOzsn-WnIsv08zlmrSr1LWjfAzYQNhw4Zuz3iyM_qlnNySCBu8_Yyevpa8vGP5Q0NG9EuiDueCmbBhtAoagUAD6xQVCIqOPHRUYccbgFoqBYQPe0lmW_bskPD-0n_Qx_VOWHvghD7uifD-evtHnE2rjc-Z8P7_N3PpP0z_ffhmzpfaPK538-NMH7cqa7--4zTFrZVEwDPZOB3Lq_Kl7U_N_gYAAP__6Up_Bg)** This attack on our heritage hasn’t come from nowhere. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their revisionist agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. This book is a vital defense against the malicious slanders that seek to turn our country's proud heritage into a "white supremacist" nightmare. I have dedicated my life to defending free societies and the principles of individual freedom. "America Betrayed" is the culmination of my work, and I believe it is the most important book I have ever written. **[](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJx8kLGu2yAYhZ8Gb0S_ARszMCR1fLskqrJ0RBh-EipjWxjfqH36ylK7Xp3tG47O-X7ezM3GKc7Pu02oczJ5Lmb0xr-CMwyYoCApSMMqr1vFZFdXqGvJgAteK6he2jsbsPHeBtfiyJB13YitglDXlksuq6iPHpBHhAR16mwYQQrfyACofEMEZFz3cYrOzsn-WnIsv08zlmrSr1LWjfAzYQNhw4Zuz3iyM_qlnNySCBu8_Yyevpa8vGP5Q0NG9EuiDueCmbBhtAoagUAD6xQVCIqOPHRUYccbgFoqBYQPe0lmW_bskPD-0n_Qx_VOWHvghD7uifD-evtHnE2rjc-Z8P7_N3PpP0z_ffhmzpfaPK538-NMH7cqa7--4zTFrZVEwDPZOB3Lq_Kl7U_N_gYAAP__6Up_Bg)[](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJx8kLGu2yAYhZ8Gb0S_ARszMCR1fLskqrJ0RBh-EipjWxjfqH36ylK7Xp3tG47O-X7ezM3GKc7Pu02oczJ5Lmb0xr-CMwyYoCApSMMqr1vFZFdXqGvJgAteK6he2jsbsPHeBtfiyJB13YitglDXlksuq6iPHpBHhAR16mwYQQrfyACofEMEZFz3cYrOzsn-WnIsv08zlmrSr1LWjfAzYQNhw4Zuz3iyM_qlnNySCBu8_Yyevpa8vGP5Q0NG9EuiDueCmbBhtAoagUAD6xQVCIqOPHRUYccbgFoqBYQPe0lmW_bskPD-0n_Qx_VOWHvghD7uifD-evtHnE2rjc-Z8P7_N3PpP0z_ffhmzpfaPK538-NMH7cqa7--4zTFrZVEwDPZOB3Lq_Kl7U_N_gYAAP__6Up_Bg)[Please consider making a generous, tax-deductible donation to the David Horowitz Freedom Center today and as a thank you for your support I’ll send you a complimentary copy of “America Betrayed”.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJx8kLGu2yAYhZ8Gb0S_ARszMCR1fLskqrJ0RBh-EipjWxjfqH36ylK7Xp3tG47O-X7ezM3GKc7Pu02oczJ5Lmb0xr-CMwyYoCApSMMqr1vFZFdXqGvJgAteK6he2jsbsPHeBtfiyJB13YitglDXlksuq6iPHpBHhAR16mwYQQrfyACofEMEZFz3cYrOzsn-WnIsv08zlmrSr1LWjfAzYQNhw4Zuz3iyM_qlnNySCBu8_Yyevpa8vGP5Q0NG9EuiDueCmbBhtAoagUAD6xQVCIqOPHRUYccbgFoqBYQPe0lmW_bskPD-0n_Qx_VOWHvghD7uifD-evtHnE2rjc-Z8P7_N3PpP0z_ffhmzpfaPK538-NMH7cqa7--4zTFrZVEwDPZOB3Lq_Kl7U_N_gYAAP__6Up_Bg)** Your donation will help us continue our fight against the forces that seek to rewrite our history to justify our destruction. Together, we can fight back against the lies and distortions and preserve the true history of America's greatness.

Left-wing activists' efforts to pressure Justice Alito and Justice Thomas to erroneously recuse themselves from the Donald Trump immunity case failed spectacularly. **[But in the coming months before the election, their legally baseless and inappropriate attacks on the court will only become more brazen,_and more dangerous._](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/z08NWIGun4NTHZH-Z1fFSQ~~/AARclAA~~)**

Our very Constitution is at stake on November 5th. The Democratic Party is out to get President Trump _by any means necessary,_ and they'll happily trample the rule of law in pursuit of that goal.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vN1cdRMgIOEe54Vh6pChJg~~/AARclAA~/RgRobN22P0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUFGUi0yMDI0MDcwNyZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZn12SIpmAEBSVlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vN1cdRMgIOEe54Vh6pChJg~~/AARclAA~/RgRobN22P0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUFGUi0yMDI0MDcwNyZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZn12SIpmAEBSVlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

body:
MSNBC: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”

MSNBC: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jLC0lnHXIEhOQDE2yWVNVg~~/AARclAA~/RgRobOGyP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ydWR5LWdpdWxpYW5pLWZyZWVkb20tZnVuZC03OWEzYWRmYS9mNzk1M2EwMGFlMzYzMDQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDYyNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9UldfQiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQSZ1dG1fdGM9Q0ItMjAyNDA3MDdXA3NwY0IKZn28SIpmFnhHsVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
Friend,
---
There was a time when I read the paper in the morning and saw headlines about me taking down the mob in New York...
---
...About keeping our streets and our citizens safe.
---
_...About successfully defending President Trump as his impeachment lawyer from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable._
---
But now, I look at the headlines – and __this__ is what I see:
---
_**“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”**_ _[MSNBC]_
---
I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my good friend, the 45th and our future 47th President...
---
But what Crooked Joe and his Deep State goons have done to Donald J. Trump – and to all of us who’ve _REFUSED_ to surrender to tyranny – will destroy our once free Republic forever.
---
Biden’s America is utterly devoid of truth and justice. **It’s a Third-World Marxist Dictatorship hellbent on _JAILING_ its political opposition for life as innocent men!**
---

One of our biggest goals is to defeat Marsha Blackburn and ensure that Tennessee has a senator who truly represents the people's interests. To keep this important work going, I’m reaching out for your support. Will you help today to ensure all Tennesseans’ voices are heard? If you've saved your donation information with ActBlue Express, your investment in our movement will go through immediately: Here’s how you can help: 1\. Make a Donation: Every dollar helps. Your financial support is crucial to our efforts. 2\. Volunteer Your Time: Join our team. Whether it’s making phone calls, organizing events, or spreading the word on social media, your involvement matters. 3\. Spread the Word: Share our mission with your friends and family. Encourage them to get involved and support our cause. Thank you for believing in our mission and for standing with us. Let’s keep moving forward together towards a brighter future for all Tennesseans. Thanks,Team Bradshaw | | | | | Follow Us | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent from .

body:

Friend,

We are in _CRISIS MODE._

Our first major deadline since **[President Trump's fraudulent conviction](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb18j1clsvb4gtfn79gpjnvdfpb0jigjjolbe5fg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimcor4cth2bs)** is in just 2 days, and we STILL haven't received enough responses to the **[2024 REPUBLICAN PLATFORM SURVEY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2cjvocnf9tl20ssm91h29bn6beosb3o9r40v0uo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimcor4cth2bs)** yet.

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
fellow American,

Asked by
a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary
rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

While
studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became
convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was
essential to the good practice of law.

Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's
cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in
the six books of Euclid at sight."

By
studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly-plus,
in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.

That's
why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the
topic "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry."

Through
"Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will
learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for
pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in
everyday life.

Now, the
course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in
your home or for use in a small group.

You can
receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible
gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach
efforts on behalf of liberty.

Your
tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and
other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our
nation. And your gift matters even more because...

Hillsdale
accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of
government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or
state student grants or loans.

That's
why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the
importance of education to liberty.

Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve
your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your
tax-deductible gift below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63356517:Wk6h0yWeN:m:3:2532013465:36331F3D084E429371246C5D207388D8:r

Thank you
for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of
liberty.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
