name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Access “C.S.Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PidqSQAfkEvH-DGHWBjovA~~/AARclAA~/RgRobO_-P0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDcwN1cDc3BjQgpmfUZWimYNX0_XUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PidqSQAfkEvH-DGHWBjovA~~/AARclAA~/RgRobO_-P0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDcwN1cDc3BjQgpmfUZWimYNX0_XUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PidqSQAfkEvH-DGHWBjovA~~/AARclAA~/RgRobO_-P0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDcwN1cDc3BjQgpmfUZWimYNX0_XUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. name: SmartAsset
subject: Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
body:
Who are you partnered with?

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2naeacu6eiocekcg28f9svsfh87brh4v1ij2e9g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimeoj2cph2bs)
---
|
## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcjl711otg85c0l8ctitg0fuebkuergdv8nvn7so_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimeoj2cph2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo5cn84s0b00k7ajv82tqi0d9fte4gt3cgbfnsf0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimeoj2cph2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the fit for you.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi0o96m439lq6a9pe8ml9771u8lsfc786e1tg1e8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimeoj2cph2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, knowing where to start can seem daunting. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8lepri8th4li6jrrse646ai8dt0c40ck7bglmq0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimeoj2cph2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to plan to work toward a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziqk0snhvvtgud32p6hr16q3s0l1jhvvpvouaroo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimeoj2cph2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Try this no-cost tool to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Get Started](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmovlvcph84d28efenv3ihmbcg4cfqnp8kk0rg2o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimeoj2cph2bs "Get Started")
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
|
---
| | | Unless otherwise indicated, information is as of 5/4/2023. SmartAsset has no obligation to update any content in this article. This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:
1. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdhdjksb1kej32tv2bka64jelhglmgv48j2ipapo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimeoj2cph2bs). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp2aiuuepe42djareas8h71iu2q12qkcdofmpsh0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cpimeoj2cph2bs).

name: Jon Tester
subject: This opportunity might not come again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Do you have a second?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28da614e-447b-4d2e-952f-14267fb555c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T958e82ec-c79c-44d9-82b0-9b3237840b9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter— It’s Jon Tester. Do you have a second to talk? I’m stressed. Montana is the most important Senate race in the country and The Hill ranks my seat the most likely to flip. Meanwhile, my team tells me our fundraising took a massive nosedive while our opponents outspent us on the airwaves. If we don’t catch up on our fundraising soon, we’ll have to make some tough decisions about what to cut from our budget. That could cost us the election. But here’s the good news: A generous group of donors saw how tight the polls are and decided to match every single contribution to my campaign for the next 24 hours. [Please, split a critical donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now. Every dollar you give will go twice as far, so there’s no better time to give.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T291891a8-d08c-4529-a531-9621fee1f0ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T755f53ab-12b4-4ac9-8dd9-b667cfe68ade/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Outside groups have put a massive target on my back, and they’re coming after me with everything they’ve got. Mitch McConnell and his cronies are spending nearly $65 million to attack me—and they’re just getting started. Political experts rank this seat a toss-up, which means it’s anyone’s game to win. That’s why this donor match couldn’t have come at a better time. For the next 24 hours, your donation will be matched. This opportunity might not come again, so we need to take advantage of it. None of us want to wake up after Election Day with regrets: [Split an urgent donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to double your impact and help us overcome the attacks and defend Montana’s Senate seat.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29876ad3-d26c-46e5-9016-9d1f6372f1e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

---
| | | Thanks for stepping up, Jon

|

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4bce217-9019-4e6c-b5c8-685143f3edf5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
Learn how the Digital Dollar could impact your privacy and savings.

**The Demise of Privacy for Americans...**
**Get Out of Cash Immediately**
Have you heard about Executive Order 14067? This lesser-known order introduced the Digital Dollar, an alarming plan aimed at controlling your spending.
And it gets even more concerning: in November, the Federal Government and banks initiated a test program to implement the Digital Dollar.
This means the loss of privacy for all Americans forever. Imagine:
* The government will now be able to track all your spending!
* The government can dictate what you can and can't purchase!
* The government could seize your cash!

When digital currency was introduced in China, Bloomberg reported, **"this will lead to control like no other."**
The EU has announced they are next, but it's already underway in America!

There's a legal, IRS-proof loophole that can protect your IRA, 401(k), and pension savings with gold and silver.
And [this complimentary guide](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B9jPH5QoAdB0LHP4I_HIng~~/AARclAA~/RgRobPnWP0RMaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2h2MHUydHJrLmNvbS8zOEpNTVgvQlA2NTgvP2NyZWF0aXZlX2lkPTcwNyZzdWIxPUdDLUNTVC0yMDI0MDcwN1cDc3BjQgpmfTlkimYJNHu4UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) provides precise steps to move a portion of your IRA or 401(k) into precious metals right away, **completely tax-free.**

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88e0d3ce205c4af48edcfd1d32731dc9&_e=BAgX6E95eiofeBYJVBYuBw2KOrlKnC6c9BSUed4E0pm1Rp3tZYaLbW7UP5cLmPaGJPK5rQVMuhWpn3n-EyCu9U5ma-ny8gtYM4DFFKwW-OlujX6V0QGYWdD2g3hrcaZTQgsonm1PG2mrPALLefy2C-yejC3bFa13aK_A7gNQvH2WXmhQf6Ip2JEy3CuSg52JZt8KY257tnL1BzB73MPpyRUeZYEc9lItRGoa307DO0TnXkIH8WQMSWHgCpjBLqzRektOTiojYdBiHfqBMd6YgyYcnwurx6hL9SJ6xMc69mP2dqKxDcvN78T9Gim1U7d7beRpoTtL7Hjs4vKpneIvkA2IM5ZYqkXzsx3q5F62eUERQBBOQdoFk4HyRzsVme1NOR1iSANogGVdy-C6nw7GPWLz0AlUihQX29NibzK_6VWvH4-ihjcdiQY4AF39VYyL) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88e0d3ce205c4af48edcfd1d32731dc9&_e=BAgX6E95eiofeBYJVBYuBw2KOrlKnC6c9BSUed4E0pm1Rp3tZYaLbW7UP5cLmPaGJPK5rQVMuhWpn3n-EyCu9U5ma-ny8gtYM4DFFKwW-OlujX6V0QGYWdD2g3hrcaZTQgsonm1PG2mrPALLefy2C-yejC3bFa13aK_A7gNQvH2WXmhQf6Ip2JEy3CuSg52JZt8KY257tnL1BzB73MPpyRUeZYEc9lItRGoa307DO0TnXkIH8WQMSWHgCpjBLqzRektOTiojYdBiHfqBMd6YgyYcnwurx6hL9SJ6xMc69mNI3qDdE1k9xjDhYjpHrpq7afcSq4zG4kBH2UnrCNfoOx6Yz8bRTASwoYQ_3f6Z1YN2YV1SUA2W6uES_5vjuVAXtKcY9pYwRcUjo7AaxBffVVitT5iPR9AvopUAtvnhWaxo0PJapi5NTEajNMnsbicL)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88e0d3ce205c4af48edcfd1d32731dc9&_e=BAgX6E95eiofeBYJVBYuBw2KOrlKnC6c9BSUed4E0pm1Rp3tZYaLbW7UP5cLmPaGJPK5rQVMuhWpn3n-EyCu9U5ma-ny8gtYM4DFFKwW-OlujX6V0QGYWdD2g3hrcaZTQgsonm1PG2mrPALLefy2C-yejC3bFa13aK_A7gNQvH2WXmhQf6Ip2JEy3CuSg52JZt8KY257tnL1BzB73MPpyRUeZYEc9lItRGoa307DO0TnXkIH8WQMSWHgCpjBLqzRektOTiojYdBiHfqBMd6YgyYcnwurx6hL9SJ6xMc69mNfGS71uCbo6Zs1r6Uk0yNxuVi1nzIY9diaN64l7AmdA9uc23PTtfceUB2JiWWA6rUOFHfWDL7Bci3_BHnUgYkUJXNvD8XOsdsu6NPn_6fX5SsG4eSo3bYIA3L1-Qgrl3Vn7l-P5BFZ9-AihJAXJNsm)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88e0d3ce205c4af48edcfd1d32731dc9&_e=BAgX6E95eiofeBYJVBYuBw2KOrlKnC6c9BSUed4E0pm1Rp3tZYaLbW7UP5cLmPaGJPK5rQVMuhWpn3n-EyCu9U5ma-ny8gtYM4DFFKwW-OlujX6V0QGYWdD2g3hrcaZTQgsonm1PG2mrPALLefy2C-yejC3bFa13aK_A7gNQvH2WXmhQf6Ip2JEy3CuSg52JZt8KY257tnL1BzB73MPpyRUeZYEc9lItRGoa307DO0TnXkIH8WQMSWHgCpjBLqzRektOTiojYdBiHfqBMd6YgyYcnwurx6hL9SJ6xMc69mOllL2JitCV_hZcF8QYHrrphBiM5f8scobSZIBAB8MqzxMzWt2s29C1ywLdbkP54v1gPESu8bSfUzN5ZkCDe6TIMe8MySgOyYUyrRzh2OqawblO-5XQ_iheqcetGD_lWFj_DpRpblxC5NMSvaXLb3iF) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88e0d3ce205c4af48edcfd1d32731dc9&_e=BAgX6E95eiofeBYJVBYuBw2KOrlKnC6c9BSUed4E0pm1Rp3tZYaLbW7UP5cLmPaGJPK5rQVMuhWpn3n-EyCu9U5ma-ny8gtYM4DFFKwW-OlujX6V0QGYWdD2g3hrcaZTQgsonm1PG2mrPALLefy2C-yejC3bFa13aK_A7gNQvH2WXmhQf6Ip2JEy3CuSg52JZt8KY257tnL1BzB73MPpyRUeZYEc9lItRGoa307DO0TnXkIH8WQMSWHgCpjBLqzRektOTiojYdBiHfqBMd6YgyYcnwurx6hL9SJ6xMc69mOfwAk-aHmo4q5BGpm0woNtaT5SEWzt5VutC2ed_1hdSl8xL1Xltz3B_TkTVDEzXpBAJ5qeJzqRrZhKaz0-rs15ejzVUnFLA8V9dSxH8YdZYbwO8vpgqBtI1_qBn3UwjIp4R4M-5zDnv5Jg9_7OnOPD)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88e0d3ce205c4af48edcfd1d32731dc9&_e=BAgX6E95eiofeBYJVBYuBw2KOrlKnC6c9BSUed4E0pm1Rp3tZYaLbW7UP5cLmPaGJPK5rQVMuhWpn3n-EyCu9U5ma-ny8gtYM4DFFKwW-OlujX6V0QGYWdD2g3hrcaZTQgsonm1PG2mrPALLefy2C-yejC3bFa13aK_A7gNQvH2WXmhQf6Ip2JEy3CuSg52JZt8KY257tnL1BzB73MPpyRUeZYEc9lItRGoa307DO0TnXkIH8WQMSWHgCpjBLqzRektOTiojYdBiHfqBMd6YgyYcnwurx6hL9SJ6xMc69mNxxkea97BKO1CTxLJZJAqASw9waDnU1X-8Tw3EuL7q3P_9NmDcRJ396o-njhyNYY8FwO8PX5fgeDCWREMcX3B3h2q6taHe9yEZQJwSYn-zq3IMUyUc7iiy-AeaojNuCLAuCogcMh0M8oRM52fUMgi5) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Latin, late 13th century
| |
---
"Perdurable" comes to us from late Middle English via Old French, with the root in the Latin "perdurare," meaning "endure." You'd be hard-pressed to find anything more perdurable than the isotope xenon-124: It has the longest half-life of any material that's been directly measured in a lab, 18 sextillion years. ...

name: The Flyover
subject: More Trouble for Biden, Olympics on Steroids, and the TimeMap
body:
More than a week since President Biden’s poor debate performance, reports continue to surface concerning his ability to perform presidential duties or defeat former President Trump in November’s election.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz8FqtDAUBeCnSXYjNzfJZFxk8Q8_oVCUoVMozEZsvNGUOA6aavv2xa67Pge-c96qpmpjive-bkeyOUxN63NcqTEHc0DVKN7ZQIQkOVlhEKQuDSo-2FN5VKWWILxXXpcCSYsTtVp1giB4zaNFQAUGjAAQGgtEkEH4LkgikIRMAXUxT3PxMcV7Hiik72mlufDTyJMdcn4sTP5j6Bi6bduKr6McltDvOUP3_FTfzgydrG715WVvSbd8vgsm_5-v1-ry6uod30fw2XaPLaYUl6NhCvqxjemXyX9-Xi3-BAAA__8_GFRq) | |
# SUNDAY, JULY 7, 2024
---|---
**Happy Sunday**! On this date in 1898, the U.S. Congress passed [a joint resolution](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFu7CAQgOHT4A4LD9jsFhSvcbevTWlNYLAnwrAyrJ3cPtLWucCvX9_HY3kgJ87rf9zJtVgW9I1PWqy0EsxiuuAiEZDuyA0WlB7vFky3uftt8Kg_Af10Cx60UWqKdB_HIUzobezYgQKjrLKDUsMIPYDScfAhaiKlCYRRFLiVo_8qnNtGMf2Uk47el71LbmvtWYX-J2AWMF_X1ePhNz6p9ms5Bcw7J6qtZJKh-NdOuVUB87slD6olvRqXLGM5JOZM35xX2TaSG17IjFlyTZhD7Q4XnhenxHWywqh1R07vifanyOngNwAA__8sRmaW) officially annexing the Hawaiian Islands. It became the Territory of Hawaii in 1900 and a U.S. state in 1959. Ever seen a UFO? Ever seen one pulled over by Highway Patrol? The [extra-terrestrial vehicle](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyrCAUgOGnwe44eMDFLShuY7e3TemwcFAS1uMoyuzbZ5I6L_DPP9_HY3q4lNM6_3cvsiXy5HxJF00GDKCedBNsJEJSDdnOoFT93aBuFntHHwbVB_MMfojeUe_dMHgy0ej-du-bZFGilkaaTsquxxZRqtj5EBWRVIRCSwqp8N5-clrLQjG_-aK99fxqsl1K2Q6h_gkcBY611nZmDivVY6VSef9qeZ8FjnwW4AhlSQdU3nOAMzJctCSfCbYzZwrw04XnGzbOyROkFRQcxRU6BI7NbsNWU87puBmh5fxyKf9elD9JLovfAQAA___akWZS) we mentioned a few days ago has now been pulled over in three states. First contact appeared to be peaceful. We're flying today with [GDR Labs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz8FqtDAUBeCnSXYjNzfJZFxk8Q8_oVCUoVMozEZsvNGUOA6aavv2xa67Pge-c96qpmpjive-bkeyOUxN63NcqTEHc0DVKN7ZQIQkOVlhEKQuDSo-2FN5VKWWILxXXpcCSYsTtVp1giB4zaNFQAUGjAAQGgtEkEH4LkgikIRMAXUxT3PxMcV7Hiik72mlufDTyJMdcn4sTP5j6Bi6bduKr6McltDvOUP3_FTfzgydrG715WVvSbd8vgsm_5-v1-ry6uod30fw2XaPLaYUl6NhCvqxjemXyX9-Xi3-BAAA__8_GFRq), be sure to check them out in today's edition.
|
---
## Pressure Rises for Biden to Drop Out
More than a week since President Biden's poor debate performance, reports continue to surface concerning [his ability to perform presidential duties](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurDAURL_GdEaXay9-W7h4Dd2mTYnADMuNjL0BB5S_j0idZprRjI7O-6N_DBIlPd-GFb7MuR9CkQO9006z7W01-RlgmAq-cUzmdndsq8U3dDcTjLEN0a0B_2MeWwe0fG95ZFTimdiSI9cQNTeumcnMTZhmA5ABK0uYpOSt_siSyoI5fucDWx3yWkW_lPLalfmvuFPcnedZhzSGq1TcXdeKO3JXtIq7USYkPYxBSyrYDsGp50HirkvWn1-IUV8bvQERoUhOOuQUsKW9Xsoaq81Pr1NilL11ytJzHST-kpQ_tRyefwIAAP__NWVi7A) or defeat former President Trump in November's election. A former White House doctor has reported [a January meeting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGP4yAQhX8N7ojwQEJSUFzjLtdeaRE8hLnFgDwkVv79yltv817xpKdP37_7fPeUqTz_-hVdj3X2odMbZyutBDObYXEREVAP6EYLSp9vFsyQnAleG30JweA1hps-Px7X24gKlb9i1HEgBwqMssqOSo1nOAEoHcewRI2oNIIwChfqdTv9r1R6wpg_9Y3bKdR1yC713ljoPwImAVP5tMr9mARMx7GASdkjLgKmF8uCOwuY2oZMC5YuH0exbOnDFMgXuWKXO_Ukm9--qHAtLBdi9IySGwbymbhLKnJP1FGm-mIUMA2bW9pOORNfrDDquXrKP5D9V2NvB98BAAD__2jvb20) between Biden's personal doctor and a Parkinson's disease expert, a meeting confirmed by the White House visitor log. Also, a senior White House official, speaking to the New York Times anonymously, said that Biden has "_steadily showed more signs of his age in recent months, including speaking more slowly, haltingly and quietly, as well as appearing more fatigued in private_ " and isn't up for the rigors of the campaign. The debate over Biden's future has reportedly caused long-held [tensions between Biden's family and his top aides](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8Gb1j4gSEeGLp4S9eOFoZH8iIMlkG28vdV27Xr3XDSfd2Xu6NE-fHpNrQtlsX5RicuhhsOalFdsBERUHZoBwNCjpMB1T1t0EaOo0I5aojRrV4pmFYNN486TBN2ZEGAEkaYQYhhhB5AyDj4ECWikAhMCQzUytG_CuX2xJje5cSj92Xrkn22tlcmPxjMDObruvq8-oxX_fEM5r0kauQrg_lVkK8UMDOYG-ZKJdc_wKPbKL25o4CV151S4ofPbtBC6Vt32LBflBJVbZgSj81R-s23f1-cFr4DAAD___fOYfc) to boil over, as the president's family attempts to become more involved in his campaign and other affairs.
## Hamas Drops Key Demand for Cease-Fire
A Hamas official has indicated the group's willingness to [drop the demand](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O8yAQAJ_G7oiWBYe4oPiadPnaK601LPGe8I8Axbp7-lOuvnI0zWg-HtODJMv2_E8r-5b2iUKTF09OOYV2sn30iRnZ9Oy1QzDD6ND2izcpRjuAxhkCmHEkNvEKhOYWx8CWevEIaMGB0wB6wAsimKRDTIYZDGNngaO0vVw-d9nawil_7S8ul7CvffZLa0ftzL8O7x3e6dj4rG_1htIkZO7wLrUQZ7XQSlWdVNRBmWuTTWir6knfpAJT5SSFlXOjhvmaiB1Q0ClZng0FdLfbgLO1ffHxOCVnqVfXWXiuJPm3pv255uXxJwAA__-d12XI) that Israel commit to ending the war completely prior to a cease-fire, potentially clearing the path to implementing a U.S.-backed proposal for a pause in fighting. The proposal would comprise a [six-week cease-fire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurDAQRb_GdIPM2CyPwsVr6DZtSjTYAzgx2LKtRfx9tKnT3avTHJ3P5_wkH_y5fdDBpq5xJlv9i-cBBkA968aZlRlZNWy6AaXqxwF1sxvdLSSV6pdeyX9jb-0y6m5UKz0kdlJ2jTcoUctBDu_bY4so1dpZtypmqRiFlux8jbn9iv6sO6_hji_OrY1HE8xeaypC_Rc4CZyu62rtUk6-ypsLnN5T4LTTQQUoJaZcwAamDBfdkGIpfgkMlqnw6jODYwrgSyYOkDnFXNmFG1yOKflzg2--wfFBpwPe7lQFTk02Ll0-BF8eg9ByO8iHX8H6Z62XwZ8AAAD__8NlbyU), first including the release of a number of Hamas-held hostages in exchange for the release of hundreds of Palestinian prisoners. Though still uncertain, U.S. officials are optimistic for a cease-fire and a potential end to the war. CIA Director Bill Burns is expected to travel to the Middle East next week [to join negotiations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQRn8N3rDwQUwzMHTxlq4drctx2FeRkGIUt_31lTt3-ZZPek9675f5gpLlvrzhjUNLZUZq8uTZa6_Bza6LITED247D4MHY09mD69ZwdddzpBd_JRpH58ESkrHo03AeTkSukwAGnPHGD8YMJ-gBjE0DxWSZjWVQznCUVmr_UeTeVk75uzy59lRuXQ5ra49N2VcFk4Jp3_cev6Rsx6tgOtgKJuOPGRVMC_6gXsvWcGFNjBsnqawjY9YkqKNUplaq_sSGtashPnbJWbbRK2eWG0r-E7d_KzwD_AYAAP___xheaw).
## List: Home Price Increases by State

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbe90494dc344adeb3c48f480aff78f4&_e=oo5a5EWcwlDIB9u5_zO3o2M2o6al-PMjJ8RDYP4AoWH5O5fnuDgLdj6hJBDETw_s2QWiqzcwh0gYx9i4clFQzA6FpBycGDObRUIZQccPwH94000EFPCY13-vjDq3thC_CRZu1ahr79Z1KuGrrMDL07FROrFlUl9DEmlPB8j6KwjAvLaomw_LwbA4QRnOC_buZWjYBBl4jzJU7Yv_zS0oqE0BYKkOT7BgtbM_SnpyoHx3uNnn1R-pITeUgvNm5nzptD9CjqozeOxfccKsPtl2f_NAU0mxk8NX4dFNNLnrMYFYYKiETquUxh-oWGMDdnRWeizhvlG3mrMAQuNaBCt7ZaW5JOiBOok6y--RlZaMqatvnmwKZn9Y2XfaHZcckQAGS5356XqcpuXFvvCJt6PkhrWFbJyMi36CL0ifYcwlqa_4XZmOsUOCnn79XTqz3gHY) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbe90494dc344adeb3c48f480aff78f4&_e=oo5a5EWcwlDIB9u5_zO3o2M2o6al-PMjJ8RDYP4AoWH5O5fnuDgLdj6hJBDETw_s2QWiqzcwh0gYx9i4clFQzA6FpBycGDObRUIZQccPwH94000EFPCY13-vjDq3thC_CRZu1ahr79Z1KuGrrMDL07FROrFlUl9DEmlPB8j6KwjAvLaomw_LwbA4QRnOC_buZWjYBBl4jzJU7Yv_zS0oqE0BYKkOT7BgtbM_SnpyoHx3uNnn1R-pITeUgvNm5nzptD9CjqozeOxfccKsPtl2f_NAU0mxk8NX4dFNNLnrMYHYguWwpKGi1OWsT8-GuV-Tur8EaUv_zCSl4fHYuOdF2D-COTGPv3HA26JvZa-N_KiZuoe2VruzlteK6LUUeoQ7YJf9N-Y4G1JrugJ-WqbeywXPLph95jXuvukkQpl9-dqjB-zzhLVl6t5NXQ19u8iR)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbe90494dc344adeb3c48f480aff78f4&_e=oo5a5EWcwlDIB9u5_zO3o2M2o6al-PMjJ8RDYP4AoWH5O5fnuDgLdj6hJBDETw_s2QWiqzcwh0gYx9i4clFQzA6FpBycGDObRUIZQccPwH94000EFPCY13-vjDq3thC_CRZu1ahr79Z1KuGrrMDL07FROrFlUl9DEmlPB8j6KwjAvLaomw_LwbA4QRnOC_buZWjYBBl4jzJU7Yv_zS0oqE0BYKkOT7BgtbM_SnpyoHx3uNnn1R-pITeUgvNm5nzptD9CjqozeOxfccKsPtl2f_NAU0mxk8NX4dFNNLnrMYHJbCg8kSiF_Dhb_kdE9hR7juYRmTENZv8Xcl8afCTzQkZwKEIsyh3zMxYxe2cjOuWlASYOSC8XfdXyCIWGpu2n_715Z7rWSf8HGQIVK1fNuI7nB4Sp0NDtHrnz7OVT9PcXmFtMJc9kRYgYKZTmTKTs)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbe90494dc344adeb3c48f480aff78f4&_e=oo5a5EWcwlDIB9u5_zO3o2M2o6al-PMjJ8RDYP4AoWH5O5fnuDgLdj6hJBDETw_s2QWiqzcwh0gYx9i4clFQzA6FpBycGDObRUIZQccPwH94000EFPCY13-vjDq3thC_CRZu1ahr79Z1KuGrrMDL07FROrFlUl9DEmlPB8j6KwjAvLaomw_LwbA4QRnOC_buZWjYBBl4jzJU7Yv_zS0oqE0BYKkOT7BgtbM_SnpyoHx3uNnn1R-pITeUgvNm5nzptD9CjqozeOxfccKsPtl2f_NAU0mxk8NX4dFNNLnrMYGkEALGL-2fkZm7Ncm1aPz8BD0AW74Ba75_9Agva15ruaVo-VkI089m9b8Mlc-6lqIVbRCo0omMql-p_lO8X6_EGWl0nIcLQM7c2aXIt0PcAnS4HhTty8yCmp2PCvpgXOewpNGUwdsyl4q1sfhgJn8Y) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbe90494dc344adeb3c48f480aff78f4&_e=oo5a5EWcwlDIB9u5_zO3o2M2o6al-PMjJ8RDYP4AoWH5O5fnuDgLdj6hJBDETw_s2QWiqzcwh0gYx9i4clFQzA6FpBycGDObRUIZQccPwH94000EFPCY13-vjDq3thC_CRZu1ahr79Z1KuGrrMDL07FROrFlUl9DEmlPB8j6KwjAvLaomw_LwbA4QRnOC_buZWjYBBl4jzJU7Yv_zS0oqE0BYKkOT7BgtbM_SnpyoHx3uNnn1R-pITeUgvNm5nzptD9CjqozeOxfccKsPtl2f_NAU0mxk8NX4dFNNLnrMYEGRqCYpGQQwCl7sE3pit29pRv0JtKEojbkTReYQTJTZNUa2J05hIPWUqWlKj3njc4C4BX74_RRVuF_gWW9pO5LXaFhVXz2A48XFkyVFqUpfsKVT4_popz_MmQL8-N8DwzKfBvDLhRyon2i3rWdSmYi)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbe90494dc344adeb3c48f480aff78f4&_e=oo5a5EWcwlDIB9u5_zO3o2M2o6al-PMjJ8RDYP4AoWH5O5fnuDgLdj6hJBDETw_s2QWiqzcwh0gYx9i4clFQzA6FpBycGDObRUIZQccPwH94000EFPCY13-vjDq3thC_CRZu1ahr79Z1KuGrrMDL07FROrFlUl9DEmlPB8j6KwjAvLaomw_LwbA4QRnOC_buZWjYBBl4jzJU7Yv_zS0oqE0BYKkOT7BgtbM_SnpyoHx3uNnn1R-pITeUgvNm5nzptD9CjqozeOxfccKsPtl2f_NAU0mxk8NX4dFNNLnrMYH7zQkiTGrImDEQNyJICJGVLgas1fpbMaCsdUnvOJ603nXKOKcFEcD4h_vuufS2aasuNvoaRCTX-AHAeWLnRhHaF9Bk1vud6YSZvwi3lczkLXyS5ocgxK1S8mIDJviS1TzL1NONY49AiSjVZUQRs8DO) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: History Facts
subject: Lincoln's top hat saved his life 🎩
body:
At a towering 6 feet, 4 inches, President Abraham Lincoln easily stood out in a crowd, especially thanks to his proclivity for stovepipe hats, which pushed his physical presence to nearly 7 feet from crown to sole. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68zdmfrbk0iowx27m0gh119iqvlg7195v1m2ugwgot58s6gtnbhme9xyppjwolem8m2or7j50g81hj7sz17y5illr6vcs715z1uclv2k8gxxezb2v36emhdjunhqenxbx4ai3y5bgyyqwxr1x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg92la&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Abraham Lincoln's hat once caught a bullet intended for the President.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg92la&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg92la&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg92la&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| A t a towering 6 feet, 4 inches, President Abraham Lincoln easily stood out in a crowd, especially thanks to his proclivity for stovepipe hats, which pushed his physical presence to nearly 7 feet from crown to sole. In some ways, this sartorial preference made him an inviting target for his enemies, yet on one occasion, the President’s conspicuous headgear may well have saved his life from an assassin’s bullet.
---
In August 1864, Lincoln was traveling on horseback to his summertime cottage on the outskirts of Washington when an unidentified sniper apparently took aim at the war-weary President. A sentry later recalled hearing a rifle shot at around 11 p.m., shortly before a "bareheaded" Lincoln and his excited horse arrived at the front gate. Although the silk hat was soon found nearby with a bullet hole through the top, Lincoln dismissed it as the handiwork of an incompetent hunter, and told his men to keep quiet about the situation.
The experience rattled the President more than he initially revealed: [According to his bodyguard](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg92la&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), Ward Hill Lamon, Lincoln described how he "heard this fellow's bullet whistle at an uncomfortably short distance from these headquarters of mine." Yet Honest Abe refused to accept the concept that someone was deliberately trying to kill him, and he continued attempts to slip off on his own in spite of efforts to beef up security. Lamon was famously [out of town](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg92la&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) when Lincoln attended a performance at Ford’s Theatre on the night of April 14, 1865. And the iconic stovepipe hat, his unlikely savior on a deserted path eight months earlier, was resting on the floor during the play, unable to halt the bullet that took the President’s life.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg92la&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg92la&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Lincoln's Cottage was the first regular presidential summer retreat.
Presidents from Thomas Jefferson to Joe Biden have jumped at the opportunity to escape the White House for cooler pastures during the summer months, but the building now known as President Lincoln's Cottage was the first to serve as a home away from home for multiple commanders in chief. Built on a farm that became a campus for wounded veterans in the 1850s, the hilltop Gothic-revival house first caught the attention of James Buchanan before becoming a haven for Lincoln and his family during the turbulence of the Civil War. Lincoln frequently made the 6-mile round trip to and from the White House, but he also held meetings with officials at the cottage, and is believed to have drafted the Emancipation Proclamation there. Altogether, it's been estimated that Lincoln spent more than a quarter of his administration residing at what was nominally a vacation home. While regular executive use of the cottage died out after Rutherford B. Hayes left office, its place in presidential history was preserved when the building and surrounding grounds became a National Landmark in 1974.

clean_body: At a towering 6 feet, 4 inches, President Abraham Lincoln easily stood out in a crowd, especially thanks to his proclivity for stovepipe hats, which pushed his physical presence to nearly 7 feet from crown to sole. | A t a towering 6 feet, 4 inches, President Abraham Lincoln easily stood out in a crowd, especially thanks to his proclivity for stovepipe hats, which pushed his physical presence to nearly 7 feet from crown to sole. In some ways, this sartorial preference made him an inviting target for his enemies, yet on one occasion, the President’s conspicuous headgear may well have saved his life from an assassin’s bullet. In August 1864, Lincoln was traveling on horseback to his summertime cottage on the outskirts of Washington when an unidentified sniper apparently took aim at the war-weary President. A sentry later recalled hearing a rifle shot at around 11 p.m., shortly before a "bareheaded" Lincoln and his excited horse arrived at the front gate. Although the silk hat was soon found nearby with a bullet hole through the top, Lincoln dismissed it as the handiwork of an incompetent hunter, and told his men to keep quiet about the situation. The experience rattled the President more than he initially revealed: , Ward Hill Lamon, Lincoln described how he "heard this fellow's bullet whistle at an uncomfortably short distance from these headquarters of mine." Yet Honest Abe refused to accept the concept that someone was deliberately trying to kill him, and he continued attempts to slip off on his own in spite of efforts to beef up security. Lamon was famously when Lincoln attended a performance at Ford’s Theatre on the night of April 14, 1865. And the iconic stovepipe hat, his unlikely savior on a deserted path eight months earlier, was resting on the floor during the play, unable to halt the bullet that took the President’s life. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Existing stovepipe hats confirmed to have belonged to Abraham Lincoln 2 | | Height (in inches) of Lincoln's top hat at the Smithsonian 7 | Height (in inches) of Lincoln's top hat at the Smithsonian 7 | | Travel time (in minutes) from Lincoln's summer cottage to the White House 45 | | Weight (in pounds) of a bronze top hat stolen from a Lincoln statue in 2023 40 | Weight (in pounds) of a bronze top hat stolen from a Lincoln statue in 2023 40 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Lincoln's Cottage was the first regular presidential summer retreat. Presidents from Thomas Jefferson to Joe Biden have jumped at the opportunity to escape the White House for cooler pastures during the summer months, but the building now known as President Lincoln's Cottage was the first to serve as a home away from home for multiple commanders in chief. Built on a farm that became a campus for wounded veterans in the 1850s, the hilltop Gothic-revival house first caught the attention of James Buchanan before becoming a haven for Lincoln and his family during the turbulence of the Civil War. Lincoln frequently made the 6-mile round trip to and from the White House, but he also held meetings with officials at the cottage, and is believed to have drafted the Emancipation Proclamation there. Altogether, it's been estimated that Lincoln spent more than a quarter of his administration residing at what was nominally a vacation home. While regular executive use of the cottage died out after Rutherford B. Hayes left office, its place in presidential history was preserved when the building and surrounding grounds became a National Landmark in 1974. name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b35cb370625e4d77970d99a886c63875&_e=vKfUpEo6YSd-MkuOshWlBnTqOwzXAY-h3byzkd8lWPvHkH7BmXZUq2MasU9eT7GB9gL34-Ho1yEGCwr4LDYsSU-JivCWbGi03UcHUmvxKCRKmxhrTAZ2lJhdyPu6xlDMKhnHg3g9MM2XNAJKMpPx6rs0I7J_R4dKeynkrk9uoOmPEZqd5zK6n_sI39tAiSV0cXYgp6szVXsc1wvFpuLAoWeiUf1gpJ_DrfOkRcKCG_KKeWz14OwINJkABzCiSr8k456diRwHCs4k2nAwaUtS2uN5cN1MaGqe7TQajLEEr0aN4_wqSpYaMP6UpfWjXjMPXEFgayZLt-KnU2T-6gjTwvSQc2zX205QXgym8qiwvDlYUx4AENIWd_U9Qn5oUz5zFY4uN6Orpguo7yQGg44sUmkWzFJNGno74QUCLub6ZvyLPS8rzG6VycfYt24bozdc) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b35cb370625e4d77970d99a886c63875&_e=vKfUpEo6YSd-MkuOshWlBnTqOwzXAY-h3byzkd8lWPvHkH7BmXZUq2MasU9eT7GB9gL34-Ho1yEGCwr4LDYsSU-JivCWbGi03UcHUmvxKCRKmxhrTAZ2lJhdyPu6xlDMKhnHg3g9MM2XNAJKMpPx6rs0I7J_R4dKeynkrk9uoOmPEZqd5zK6n_sI39tAiSV0cXYgp6szVXsc1wvFpuLAoWeiUf1gpJ_DrfOkRcKCG_KKeWz14OwINJkABzCiSr8k456diRwHCs4k2nAwaUtS2uN5cN1MaGqe7TQajLEEr0Ync61zoWo2rMAXUpdYJaBWnvpOJ-z6pWjDYOXNPz7SHTBVLgoHLSMLlIhry02WMAK9Eg3ISEpojbYbDtMS9HvZ2uq6WRJJxmRNKY8u-uaMtB94DoI-Qq4xKr-QW6RnYz8dinmj3f4NR-q6SvAzZnW1)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b35cb370625e4d77970d99a886c63875&_e=vKfUpEo6YSd-MkuOshWlBnTqOwzXAY-h3byzkd8lWPvHkH7BmXZUq2MasU9eT7GB9gL34-Ho1yEGCwr4LDYsSU-JivCWbGi03UcHUmvxKCRKmxhrTAZ2lJhdyPu6xlDMKhnHg3g9MM2XNAJKMpPx6rs0I7J_R4dKeynkrk9uoOmPEZqd5zK6n_sI39tAiSV0cXYgp6szVXsc1wvFpuLAoWeiUf1gpJ_DrfOkRcKCG_KKeWz14OwINJkABzCiSr8k456diRwHCs4k2nAwaUtS2uN5cN1MaGqe7TQajLEEr0YmQVEdf21WV8vggIT8sA2z1fyUUQoMDybOhhfKrhSC5gJbeDHYwekcfAc2r-GoL7DreAd15YrLVK-c6TrWqjLtPT-tUHDtUoc9VYhiH8sdaEUdM09HQ_hTtC6YzN0b--H1ppJRGcEznzApCgpDfyy2)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b35cb370625e4d77970d99a886c63875&_e=vKfUpEo6YSd-MkuOshWlBnTqOwzXAY-h3byzkd8lWPvHkH7BmXZUq2MasU9eT7GB9gL34-Ho1yEGCwr4LDYsSU-JivCWbGi03UcHUmvxKCRKmxhrTAZ2lJhdyPu6xlDMKhnHg3g9MM2XNAJKMpPx6rs0I7J_R4dKeynkrk9uoOmPEZqd5zK6n_sI39tAiSV0cXYgp6szVXsc1wvFpuLAoWeiUf1gpJ_DrfOkRcKCG_KKeWz14OwINJkABzCiSr8k456diRwHCs4k2nAwaUtS2uN5cN1MaGqe7TQajLEEr0bvdfQDQn2IBudmWcKpcdaxDbYq6FUqacIqgxJ3hKpMqMilKMt5-9NdlHEcbFnqgkg-wWC70Qw0-lpEpk3QYXjWrqgElBUFTXMd14R408Am3_m1Xjgk9bR9asrTAy_b0hap5xeAUe1-7dSmLKTKg2kE) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. name: GoldenCrest Metals
subject: Digital Dollar: The Threat to Your Financial Freedom
body:
Don't let government control your spending. Act now to secure your assets.

**The Demise of Privacy for Americans...**
**Get Out of Cash Immediately**
Have you heard about Executive Order 14067? This lesser-known order introduced the Digital Dollar, an alarming plan aimed at controlling your spending.
And it gets even more concerning: in November, the Federal Government and banks initiated a test program to implement the Digital Dollar.
This means the loss of privacy for all Americans forever. Imagine:
* The government will now be able to track all your spending!
* The government can dictate what you can and can't purchase!
* The government could seize your cash!

When digital currency was introduced in China, Bloomberg reported, **"this will lead to control like no other."**
The EU has announced they are next, but it's already underway in America!

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2bdc7afeb50040d48ddec327a33f66f5&_e=p3QOe-RTKmJzuoQ_2IUH8ixladpmr5SD0OGgoed1dC2EfaZ7a3pv5htjb851UcpQVQPMS7y0vczTbui-8WM_mBzwFeMO0QkMWD433P2ICQFUu1HibF3wn-22mEYTClfNPPUMzI3zR-dcepZGUfrZLfIph7AOvsdpdvcW60FhKV7dlEZ1_yrqbLoja8SfbtXuWbid6dP2dIJQw_Q9UhiJZ_BZQVKehUa8mzBKVsqaTdQnTd1xZd6_uUVg33UJsOuyDHHkJpbYjsZMVFrHc63gxNzDVDj615wZGf1Uixa24fPiGlyGvdWxBegbxnWVHYDCqTm_REX2unTi0ES3Y-UgnxMhsLwuTc9fvjNMKjWQCJbMAwF9-jx3AYoozcfXfmolv9rKmS7tq_Z9W-7OnDpEjqSfP_iEKkZiZuH8uYS8KEIIMP3vUY_MsOsoU69fGMkb) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2bdc7afeb50040d48ddec327a33f66f5&_e=p3QOe-RTKmJzuoQ_2IUH8ixladpmr5SD0OGgoed1dC2EfaZ7a3pv5htjb851UcpQVQPMS7y0vczTbui-8WM_mBzwFeMO0QkMWD433P2ICQFUu1HibF3wn-22mEYTClfNPPUMzI3zR-dcepZGUfrZLfIph7AOvsdpdvcW60FhKV7dlEZ1_yrqbLoja8SfbtXuWbid6dP2dIJQw_Q9UhiJZ_BZQVKehUa8mzBKVsqaTdQnTd1xZd6_uUVg33UJsOuyDHHkJpbYjsZMVFrHc63gxNzDVDj615wZGf1Uixa24fO7PKMQ_dBDTto8nWbqDyuOZoGaZonrW6mPSVV0uBYu-y5v3myXHTPnb4Q49tBoF47VDHEXuKkLUARUkH6evRrgjVsXHfeo8fcbZYOlU5x_OG_753spZzLMyVcfK692JtbyPKrdzPkcs3YQ5378i6L0)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: White House staff caught red-handed trying to advance radical agenda
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | July 07, 2024

White House staff
caught red-handed trying to advance radical agenda

The Biden White House is a mess. But despite the chaos
surrounding them, they're still trying to spread their harmful
ideologies.

And White House staff were caught
red-handed trying to advance this radical agenda.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Joe Biden collapses after
making this deranged statement during latest interview

The hits keep on
coming for Biden. He's clearly unfit to serve as
commander-in-chief.
➞ Continue Reading

Leaked email from
President Biden exposes new 2024 election plans

There's growing
speculation on whether Joe Biden will drop out of the race or
not. Now we finally have our answer.
➞ Continue Reading

Biden reveals a shocking
secret regarding his presidential campaign

Joe Biden has loads
of skeletons in his closet. But now some of them are finally
coming out.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

body:
Friend, my team has emailed you about the fundraising deadline I'm facing on June 30th.

**[I'm not alone. Every single Republican Senator and Senate candidate is facing this deadline.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11CiEtzyO1t5T3KW89cVguMpxiK3NQrlwvURVNRQZDPdPkBBPe_Irnn_-U0lSG2wsOD9msYpd5H6ZC2L0m3ntbREjARFjTSVuVvl60CMZ6ldCVLEaYtLkRJIIbVY42Gx-V6PZcKNXO-PmLtvmfq5Wmfj6aaWwRMrfgc6JZ9snj29O)**

**[And for our nominees in battleground states, it could be a make or break moment.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11O1eZYeuVSNhFYbVPQ086AdBQ84v1coAuDeL7zWl9ztFQRsU65BaCSBYEvD03B1YH1yWVHR0rzMQJiyvrVI46L-aGVOiclecyhKHiEIUp__O6pIZs-QO5nwkbU2pmN76D1FtcaZ9igQWk1pEebwIU04BPzGdfAzLrhoHrr_1ZXA6)**

**[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between these candidates and my campaign ASAP.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11JQZT1uzCEjUEqpOCT3fopKVvoel33QfGYe5U7j2BdoWYOgY3vZTNemkn-awOVTeVP1GT2GOTZlloSFvkOMOz1n22X_g1QG3I_z59eckVsq04IU4jVvrshY0UBZrCAVugH4Q1Tuo8cUxlULzBdsjXQX3EidxEAYgG13Oobqm8Ul4)**

_**[Tim Sheehy, who served as a Navy Seal,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11PInjWStvMQWkAYyNKDkhKjltg_NGTOQjC99CzgbRJnwNEZIH4Ua877gLvhR6ycLpZvn3JG8GJGZkF2XjJJ7wuPPCLdBHOO3WjFAA2tPARnqn740_x3SfqI0mm0uXxHm0pkCGOa7b_DiZKrMqOMIkjaMJKaLtgl8WMw2mJ4L3OG1)**_ is running in Montana against Jon Tester.

_**[Dave McCormick, a fellow Army veteran,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11PlWZRuEF8BFedouhp2YlIB9C6HJZNsBkdOqGphKp7Vk9LU69lWMB3oW3L6cvyTnQXJ0ylX4qkg9EsByLvji7pJ2wD7VVkmpcx3B_pPe2xHg90-knS6rb0xvpFv4y0LgSI3GfpBZM5WXNzypVcJnWAyoynw3kZFQj6OdmJDGPDXQ)**_ is running in Pennsylvania against Bob Casey.

_**[Sam Brown, another fellow Army veteran,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11D8cWTbTO03M_rbOdqc3fEC3OX7kpcodQ2fWl67viYXvOb5zL2cgskbdqguowP9wO5ZtfgFjJcWAkpWgC2WRknjJ97GdUefb6LHZJmx_jgVQEG4GYrNbEEnn-F7PgW87JAdhWFAd0gZAP1_WSWoeHNFVsJpEb6QcsQto6keWWMTI)**_ is running in Nevada against Jacky Rosen.

_**[Bernie Moreno, a proven business leader,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11NmlzO5mFf2KF6hGLAIXtYBwBHhJktxIRvAY2FFwR7X4ldF-FXaGxzV-TwcCxkBohCbkIgm7txegXUOEhJ47YoAVhwjyDasrnblc4Mt_56uTBZ-N8u9TeYyTrt9ypdg8jsfejfsy8h4gJcQ4UjP16gmU_0ay3BX0_5dBpmQJpDpv)**_ is running in Ohio against Sherrod Brown.

_**[And Kari Lake, a tough conservative who will put America first,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11AGD4aZkimv1EzJHUwLEvgHc8yvfpda9I7vbxkS8mrrv9vo-g-_zTZnhKLsp_tNdjid1sufpR-SSk98SoLuEg9FxVYVm3q8mhnxfjE7-br6WrqXthfe6c8MPHDYR__LUAGOSAUvaxcL2RJyjOV7_2GXgBjtRfL2IUvVmyDj8MyVP)**_ is running in Arizona.

********************************************************[SPLIT A DONATION HERE](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11PNjg5tRLTIpFkyo6QuP49kVWMBK8vG42Rq5FmxeAD4SvFVWFuueR3Xmx9XEFpPESmYeQqWvxPgLSZ4WmflJ44YicLXLlPY9RmtgKSEbbYKv6ywaXf2GyTIuSKukdOv0IqwQUMooz83pPOG6BpaICI2LXm4aR2e8KCUT-dHAUdL8)************************************************** ******

If these tough conservatives win, it guarantees Republicans win the U.S. Senate.

And I need each of them there with me to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks, and to make America strong again.

**[A donation of any amount will go directly to their campaigns, and *any amount* will make a difference ahead of this critical marker.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11Pjpc-xSLWhxxSCz28ZBQ_LcD2FgoysdCsImAPSLwS9soP0MTDjUFqTNuX_GcNYL9zLVOO6oUKOBFB7wDbz3PIt7JZ8jKl2jf-QP_DHzlZxtFkheEoPwuDQpajnm8rBUTMGFTbe8RF1uq-9NjFlr1weagPoZvVSFNzbe5hqRZOKP)**

As I've also said before, if we don't win in November, we're done. So, if you can give at this time, don't wait. **[Help each of these tough conservatives before this deadline, and let's win in November.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc08f833ea8a46168ccc3526ee37d5bf&_e=2cJxl2z5xxfJYhlQmVoJAlcXbicZmRwp4W_wBVAaSxXA5Fwt6XJq-gZ-KH3FG52kGKiLtEJnkUEwlcrrFZtDZa-9s9nM6MbNoqZtUeNXm27Ifekd0cGF54GwwuWTB_qbe6TmPsGSLTgnlPeYoCNhwIPUdyyNbklJn0pWpTu7ROBnzEnHgTwP3_bBDswf47gqzdMGvw7st9H2n1oYrQehpW7zPzNRK9ZlgZotlnla5PGLOr01M9gRmGW_7VLH0fGw-UfMbiF0m91rn5BuN3EDFdr6akDUmPUcQZZvG930-N6WeVmRq77aKjV2ErIJAQjcsKOaTndTEUXhkGdaAxi11GX9GWER9Q6fICUCsLYkrm_XraXEx7voc_loC-hz6EdMXxftYlevYSjP4L05gAuxbB61ZC6UVoKwkjFQPP8c5dPWVuLZ2gDrl4Nycji5Xu6TiqGOxCTqasLgRDdeCkL0IkMji6HVqNGY0t-AJUBgEtEQ9e--CxZnAkR8PR8X366s)**

subject: 🛬Wheels Down in Milwaukee, WI!🛬
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Weston D
body:
I just arrived in Milwaukee, WI thanks to you! Here is the latest...
| | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZJtza2dGoi6y-MxTxQso4AWdkF6OBNqqKiyvaby-T55JWhqu2RjOR6wiOdGffG8pgcMPzX8R7y4Q3BKJvapWJgqvA_jL3tlYXQNj7WoqWzTyeiC4818Nj6WFppo775KPNnPCnCmsHWMCLCKSTO_mk0nxSYt3jRZPtRa-dyKaloIjRvIgiHs2i2CGQ3FRvrrFnYbVkLUAR1w=&c=vVBhgeKyyJoedb2t8QrVzVNhmhkn9orIgIkSIn4NFGa-yVPPKCP4PQ==&ch=8NkN0qPtAhOLcnj44FJI4GNzf4jw0aGU9JvJididQ1wGJIcHDh_WoA==)
---
Patriot, I have just arrived in Milwaukee, WI for the RNC Summer Meeting and the 2024 Republican National Convention!
As we arrived in Milwaukee this morning, you could feel the energy and support for President Trump all throughout the city. The RNC will begin meeting this afternoon to finalize the aspects of the convention that they are responsible for and it is my honor to be here to see the process happen in real time.
This is my first time attending a National Convention but far from my first RNC meeting. I will keep you all updated as the week progresses, and will provide my full report to you after the conclusion of the weeks events and convention.
If you have received any of my prior emails you know that I have been fundraising to help cover the costs of the 14 days I will be in Milwaukee.
This has been a massive undertaking for me as a 20 year old Gen Z political activist that has volunteered my time to every campaign I have ever worked.
If you are able, and willing I humbly ask for your support as I kick off day one of 14 in Milwaukee by clicking the button below.
If you contribute to the Convention fund via the link below I will randomly select one of you to receive a signed RNC 2024 Milwaukee hat like the one below.
---
[](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZJtza2dGoi6y-MxTxQso4AWdkF6OBNqqKiyvaby-T55JWhqu2RjOR6wiOdGffG8pgcMPzX8R7y4Q3BKJvapWJgqvA_jL3tlYXQNj7WoqWzTyeiC4818Nj6WFppo775KPNnPCnCmsHWMCLCKSTO_mk0nxSYt3jRZPtRa-dyKaloIjRvIgiHs2i2CGQ3FRvrrFnYbVkLUAR1w=&c=vVBhgeKyyJoedb2t8QrVzVNhmhkn9orIgIkSIn4NFGa-yVPPKCP4PQ==&ch=8NkN0qPtAhOLcnj44FJI4GNzf4jw0aGU9JvJididQ1wGJIcHDh_WoA==)

I am humbled to have supporters like you, and I look forward to speaking with you soon.
#MAGA!
Best,

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: “Moderate” Kari Lake?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Yeah, right.
**Team, something weird is happening in Arizona. **
If you’ve got a minute, I hope you’ll let me explain.
There’s this new narrative going around in the media that Kari Lake is going to turn into some plain old boring Republican, that she will moderate her platform to appeal to moderates.
Apparently she thinks the people of Arizona are going to forget all of the absolutely ridiculous and dangerous things she said and did back in 2022.
Yeah, right.
I can tell you this: We are not going to let that happen.
No matter what Kari Lake says or does, she is still the MAGA Queen. The woman who called herself, “the most dangerous politician in the world.”
But I can’t correct the record here all by myself. Never could.
**I need a big team behind me so our campaign can fight back against Kari Lake and this ridiculous narrative. **
So, I’ve got to ask:
[_**Can I count on your support? Make a split $3 contribution between my campaign and Upset the Setup. I can tell you this: We are not going to let that happen. No matter what Kari Lake says or does, she is still the MAGA Queen. The woman who called herself, “the most dangerous politician in the world.” But I can’t correct the record here all by myself. Never could. I need a big team behind me so our campaign can fight back against Kari Lake and this ridiculous narrative. name: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
subject: Our military will return to its noblest duty:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
It's time to bring our focus home.

|
---
| | | | [**It's time to bring our focus home.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=1)

---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=2)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
_This is our moment to bend the arc of history towards peace._
I stand before you at a pivotal moment, where our choice will not only define America's path but also our legacy in the world. It's time to embrace a profound transformation in how we define strength and leadership on the global stage.
Our nation has reached its limit on what military dominance can achieve. We've spent nearly one trillion dollars annually on defense while our cities, railways, and water systems crumble, and our economy falters.
We have neglected our communities and our infrastructure for too long, and it's time to bring our focus home.
As President, I am committed to revitalizing the true sources of our strength. The commitment to end America's role as the world's policeman is not just a policy—it's a promise.
| | **"America can not be an empire abroad and continue to be democracy at home."**
---
—Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
The crisis in Ukraine exemplifies the urgent need for change.
My goal is clear: to bring peace to the Ukrainian people, not to use them as pawns in a larger game. I will work tirelessly for a diplomatic resolution that respects the independence and freedom of the Ukrainian people, setting a precedent for how America engages with the world.
Inspired by the unfulfilled promise of my uncle, President John F. Kennedy, we will strive to dismantle the old paradigms of Cold War thinking and imperial overreach.
Finally, it is crucial to recognize that corrupt systems within our government have perpetuated war for profit by fostering division among us, maintaining control by keeping us at war with each other. This destructive cycle must end.
We will lead by example, promoting peace and championing the dignity of all nations and peoples. We will bring our troops home and halt the endless cycle of unnecessary conflicts that drain our nation's resources and morale.
Our military will return to its noblest duty: defending our borders and securing our peace.
[This is more than a campaign; it's a movement to redefine American greatness through the power of peace and integrity.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=5)
[End Forever Wars](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=6)
Your generous gift will help me heal our nation and inspire the world.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=7)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=PJjXLMlymU0n-OTqjg_TpbAIaCRYmvQY1HDziCNjhltpQB6ASK6MFbMK1Me4mgvz&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=8) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=8i_UFb6nr4zPXnY0WZkWD67i3lfoHfR3YIz42qE4mBAHRv1c-d1rtD-NbXVnJVMz&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=9) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=qVvjbYZFPGk-dgj1f2bqfL0-YRfFzv-GdJQeEtD6DqI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=10) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=Z_o1v5uRNRxRYZz5aguEakB2YYT3YdTbArbpHdZXt1SqN_UvyW6It3Eikxl9299S&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=11) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6EQ6sUlCj-zytkS_cwzfZ4t1sgt_WFGzO2WU_Wl6NSz5R7TkzLPnM4yy7PyWFvTa3IEquugMhTQkNDFbFnqxSg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=12) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=m5zNBfrS_ADBCs93FfGYjsnFn9jHPwuFV0Wfsg_mW1ikaBeQs48Gcry8jiG-lI3C&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_7_24_rs_nd1&n=13)

**[And for our nominees in battleground states, it could be a make or break moment.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e8bbbf22f5147889d3fe964f10df83a&_e=a_r39PZ-odQiovh05M67EupH4kqwQW2P8uroOPJdOJH1vrvW_dR57FqvUebTmRs5YX_UWVjBAQOamT7JolOUlkgoL1jNG2WxFR6Q3Jl0-XN-w6MesKbymGzIfqgZLDNuAe_RopxON1W_0xfEu-XeAFjJP8FhobFHeYDKhvS67t95RaSucXDvM0g9FJp1AlCQ1GICIuu3bgbEiOxfDMV8Htpv27zNG_aCdNFr4XdWZuchyaXMhGqJwGCCBA-7BOaY1dXiHodUxfiIplQT_5WUJICVZhABU4jXmBNaUaZ-ZdWB1DcPO3zJBSx2rOgr5mwmfg3woQY7JT_uD4ZVtFeqCsyxmLGnTALCnME0s7gNRec_WmtZO1U7GXF241PAQ5TdAD0c9pm0882Dh2e7lIsNqNtY3FS1579QywaLY7II77dBfG9426haFDDdfPgGymEwsRHICigb03XChBBPqaL_iAVV7KgEUQS_MOTedOjb1-d7YNoh5prAHhaopzIxf4OC)**

**[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between these candidates and my campaign ASAP.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e8bbbf22f5147889d3fe964f10df83a&_e=a_r39PZ-odQiovh05M67EupH4kqwQW2P8uroOPJdOJH1vrvW_dR57FqvUebTmRs5YX_UWVjBAQOamT7JolOUlkgoL1jNG2WxFR6Q3Jl0-XN-w6MesKbymGzIfqgZLDNuAe_RopxON1W_0xfEu-XeAFjJP8FhobFHeYDKhvS67t95RaSucXDvM0g9FJp1AlCQ1GICIuu3bgbEiOxfDMV8Htpv27zNG_aCdNFr4XdWZuchyaXMhGqJwGCCBA-7BOaY1dXiHodUxfiIplQT_5WUJICVZhABU4jXmBNaUaZ-ZdWB1DcPO3zJBSx2rOgr5mwmfg3woQY7JT_uD4ZVtFeqClwjuTZXxoJSp1i_1tjY6qojxAgi5v8E_aHk-4llz-B-nBfdZHNYW-cbaxylf1vnt3t-nzP48N9aX_sCE9Ybuag8QA4bO_TtaqYRD6x224IBFCNqYcjEBMRNEHSqoRAjDOJJhfBus__WbbB0M1ZlGFmLzxLwNaKeLEc2CRoVB1Zj)**

_**[Tim Sheehy, who served as a Navy Seal,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e8bbbf22f5147889d3fe964f10df83a&_e=a_r39PZ-odQiovh05M67EupH4kqwQW2P8uroOPJdOJH1vrvW_dR57FqvUebTmRs5YX_UWVjBAQOamT7JolOUlkgoL1jNG2WxFR6Q3Jl0-XN-w6MesKbymGzIfqgZLDNuAe_RopxON1W_0xfEu-XeAFjJP8FhobFHeYDKhvS67t95RaSucXDvM0g9FJp1AlCQ1GICIuu3bgbEiOxfDMV8Htpv27zNG_aCdNFr4XdWZuchyaXMhGqJwGCCBA-7BOaY1dXiHodUxfiIplQT_5WUJICVZhABU4jXmBNaUaZ-ZdWB1DcPO3zJBSx2rOgr5mwmfg3woQY7JT_uD4ZVtFeqCiPt6Sc-3CEiR-O2TW8ZPCQYzrAUGgCS4o39IbbhPVD-BaU2TKHu2pxZiY9zHc5w318COrsUd891x9GXynxaBzunK9C8onWkOOBVFKXzNX-nYfhoUSwC-MzgUY5mLV3pEh9x7H1uQGl4M0jklWXMkJ4Z6tppdYBrgC3CEX3bEWbp)**_ is running in Montana against Jon Tester.

_**[Dave McCormick, a fellow Army veteran,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e8bbbf22f5147889d3fe964f10df83a&_e=a_r39PZ-odQiovh05M67EupH4kqwQW2P8uroOPJdOJH1vrvW_dR57FqvUebTmRs5YX_UWVjBAQOamT7JolOUlkgoL1jNG2WxFR6Q3Jl0-XN-w6MesKbymGzIfqgZLDNuAe_RopxON1W_0xfEu-XeAFjJP8FhobFHeYDKhvS67t95RaSucXDvM0g9FJp1AlCQ1GICIuu3bgbEiOxfDMV8Htpv27zNG_aCdNFr4XdWZuchyaXMhGqJwGCCBA-7BOaY1dXiHodUxfiIplQT_5WUJICVZhABU4jXmBNaUaZ-ZdWB1DcPO3zJBSx2rOgr5mwmfg3woQY7JT_uD4ZVtFeqCvPQFyVr-i_-1zEq4XOvHlbpJoCcAjs5mPNSYsFpgPfAzTAehnyZvNauRk0b8JLt8pNM7rQXat-7DpmcfSeRHRonb3mdE1ifahWaybSvU4z4wIl8V21iKt3RFbTCYA7mKLyRpIt63nISa9V90MONMrTlGHjLoMPmwykXIaUTOdPn)**_ is running in Pennsylvania against Bob Casey.

_**[Sam Brown, another fellow Army veteran,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e8bbbf22f5147889d3fe964f10df83a&_e=a_r39PZ-odQiovh05M67EupH4kqwQW2P8uroOPJdOJH1vrvW_dR57FqvUebTmRs5YX_UWVjBAQOamT7JolOUlkgoL1jNG2WxFR6Q3Jl0-XN-w6MesKbymGzIfqgZLDNuAe_RopxON1W_0xfEu-XeAFjJP8FhobFHeYDKhvS67t95RaSucXDvM0g9FJp1AlCQ1GICIuu3bgbEiOxfDMV8Htpv27zNG_aCdNFr4XdWZuchyaXMhGqJwGCCBA-7BOaY1dXiHodUxfiIplQT_5WUJICVZhABU4jXmBNaUaZ-ZdWB1DcPO3zJBSx2rOgr5mwmfg3woQY7JT_uD4ZVtFeqCsIfPxmeLLlvwHRdGwOS7Kqji1u0r5f6z6bw9iHWLy7IauPuwLTItmaua8aPRPGRL7GxyTmUR7kWgv-qDTmu3ZYCBhQGCC6CYDBX-xhsapbxgqJHeKWbJkMRLnzxeeMEK-IrOYkG50xglCrP1FCMNsf0Ard_HZ5GBhKEGcnpj3sz)**_ is running in Nevada against Jacky Rosen.

name: Ken Burns
subject: Requesting support for Elissa Slotkin.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1622%2E135344%2E07qNzq)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240707-1&t=2&akid=1622%2E135344%2E07qNzq)
---
Hello. Ken Burns here.
I've spent five decades making films that tell the stories of America’s greatest challenges -- from the Civil War to the Dust Bowl, from the Second World War to the Vietnam War.
In each of these historic moments, we were challenged to live up to the essential promise of our nation: preserving a democratic system of government that respects the rights and addresses the needs of all its citizens.
Today, challenges to our republic are rampant once again. The democratic values that make up the very fabric of our nation are under assault and at risk of unraveling. It’s never been more important to safeguard our fragile democracy: as Benjamin Franklin so wisely put it, "A Republic, if you can keep it."
But this election is not just about keeping Donald Trump out. It's about coming together to protect our shared American values and restoring integrity to our government. That's why electing leaders to the Senate that we can be proud of is so important – and why we have to help Elissa Slotkin hold Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats this fall.
There is also a personal connection in this race for me. Like Elissa, I grew up in Michigan. And she’s a student of history, which I so appreciate in an elected official.
I'd really like to make sure she wins her Senate race this November. So I am asking:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $5, $20 or whatever feels right to you today directly to Elissa Slotkin's Senate campaign in Michigan? I would not be reaching out were it not so important.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240707-1&t=3&akid=1622%2E135344%2E07qNzq)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-july24.w0O6uM&amount=3&refcode=em240707-1&t=22&akid=1622%2E135344%2E07qNzq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-july24.iUEZqY&refcode=em240707-1&t=23&akid=1622%2E135344%2E07qNzq)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-july24.nM1t-a&refcode=em240707-1&t=24&akid=1622%2E135344%2E07qNzq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-july24.43c0OA&refcode=em240707-1&t=25&akid=1622%2E135344%2E07qNzq)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-july24.zAhOqa&refcode=em240707-1&t=26&akid=1622%2E135344%2E07qNzq)**

---
****
Democrats cannot keep control of the Senate if they lose in Michigan. Thank you for helping Elissa with your donation today.
Ken Burns
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240707-1&t=28&akid=1622%2E135344%2E07qNzq)**

East Lansing, MI 48826
