name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Biden's debate flips script on media storyline
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=70603694b9&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[He is who we thought he was – Joe Biden fails the test](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7668514f9a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Andy Bloom_
Six weeks ago, when President Joe Biden first announced he would debate former President Donald Trump on June 27, Team Biden must have felt like the spider who watched a helpless insect get caught in its web. With his typical bravado, Trump had said he would debate Biden “anytime, anyplace.” Trump’s arrogance forced him to allow Team Biden to set all the terms and rules. At the time, after a spate of horrible polls for Biden, and with[ Trump’s “hush money” trial heading to the jury](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9347c91899&e=b7b3eddce2), a snarky Biden challenged his hated rival, suggesting a Wednesday night rematch, jabbing that he heard the former president had Wednesdays off. Team Biden surely saw the combination of the trial and an early debate where they set the rules as a fantastic one-two punch to change the trajectory of the polls and election. What could possibly go wrong for Biden? Everything! **Why It Matters. **The public has been told not to believe their ears when Biden speaks incoherently. He has a stutter, you know. (Funny, he didn’t stutter when he recited[ the plagiarized life story of British Member of Parliament Neil Kinnock in 1987](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=62d19e3569&e=b7b3eddce2).) ** ** Don’t believe your lying eyes when you see Biden wandering off on stage or that vacant look in his eyes. The media and Biden sycophants have told us that behind closed doors, “Biden is sharp.” White House Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre claimed those videos were “cheap fakes.” These are the same people who sold the Russian collusion story in 2016, Hunter’s laptop was Russian disinformation in 2020, have tried to keep Trump off the ballot and used lawfare against him so even an addled Joe Biden could croak out that he is a “convicted felon” during their debate. These people are liars. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0b92ce968f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Survey says: Schools skirt parental consent](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b5b7d36076&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
As a parent of a second grader, would you be ok if your child was asked at school to rate this statement as true or false? "Someone you know, even a relative, might want to touch your private parts in a way that feels confusing.” Without context, this is a concerning question. Even with context, for some parents, the statement may be disturbing. According to a Right to Know[ request](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=90ca4829f7&e=b7b3eddce2), the Downingtown Area School District in the 2022-2023 school year provided a program to all second grade students in the district, entitled Safe Touches. The program is taught by the Crime Victims Center of Chester County. The district described the program to parents in an email communication. **Why It Matters. ** A federal[ statute](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1f3b3ffa39&e=b7b3eddce2) requires that parents of minor children give written permission for their child to participate in a survey that “reveals information concerning ... mental or psychological problems of the student or the student’s family; sex behavior or attitudes; or critical appraisals of other individuals with whom respondents have close family relationships.” The Downingtown Area School District’s[ policy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cb340435e2&e=b7b3eddce2) references the Protection of Pupil Rights statute and contains this language: "For a student to participate in a survey, personal analysis, evaluation or research study not conducted by the district, the parent/guardian or eligible student must complete and submit a written consent form to the building principal.” Based on this statement, it appears that Downingtown did not follow their policy. The survey was administered by an outside agency and parents had the ability to opt-out, but they did not have to grant affirmative permission in advance of the program or survey. **Quotable.** “It is unconscionable that a parent should have to go to the lengths I’ve gone just to get transparency and accountability from public officials. After my experience, I seriously wonder if politicians in Harrisburg will ever pay attention to parental rights and hold public officials accountable for abusing their authority and violating the law. What more do parents have to do to protect our rights?” – Chad Williams, father of a Unionville Chadds Ford School District student. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=15e454f777&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=587e18e7b2&e=b7b3eddce2)
---

|
---
|
# **3\. Podcasts**
* **[Kitchen Table Politics: FLOTUS in the Lehigh Valley](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=28fa880c2a&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Andy Bloom: What’s wrong with Joe Biden?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6ff7a863f3&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Considering — and reconsidering — the University of the Arts](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8ad8797d53&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stu Bykofsky: Limited immunity is not a novel concept](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=32954c089b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: Sonia Sotomayor, disrespectfully dissenting](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1cc879dc9e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Cheers to the Constitution](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0100898e80&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stephen F. Gambescia: America needs national service](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=56d17d3f93&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Meade and Gettysburg](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f55ffc7b6b&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
The scandal over President Biden’s increasingly apparent incapacity rolled on through this holiday week, and a suddenly credulous mainstream press published hosts of articles with never-before-revealed anecdotes of Biden’s lapses in memory and ability to communicate.

Olivia Nuzzi, writing for _New York_ magazine, had [one of the most eye-opening accounts](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ed3fc90242&e=b7b3eddce2). “In January, I began hearing similar stories from Democratic officials, activists, and donors,” she writes. “All people who supported the president and were working to help reelect him to a second term in office. Following encounters with the president, they had arrived at the same concern: Could he really do this for another four years? Could he even make it to Election Day?”

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Andy Bloom Six weeks ago, when President Joe Biden first announced he would debate former President Donald Trump on June 27, Team Biden must have felt like the spider who watched a helpless insect get caught in its web. With his typical bravado, Trump had said he would debate Biden “anytime, anyplace.” Trump’s arrogance forced him to allow Team Biden to set all the terms and rules. At the time, after a spate of horrible polls for Biden, and with, a snarky Biden challenged his hated rival, suggesting a Wednesday night rematch, jabbing that he heard the former president had Wednesdays off. Team Biden surely saw the combination of the trial and an early debate where they set the rules as a fantastic one-two punch to change the trajectory of the polls and election. What could possibly go wrong for Biden? Everything! Why It Matters. The public has been told not to believe their ears when Biden speaks incoherently. He has a stutter, you know. (Funny, he didn’t stutter when he recited.) Don’t believe your lying eyes when you see Biden wandering off on stage or that vacant look in his eyes. The media and Biden sycophants have told us that behind closed doors, “Biden is sharp.” White House Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre claimed those videos were “cheap fakes.” These are the same people who sold the Russian collusion story in 2016, Hunter’s laptop was Russian disinformation in 2020, have tried to keep Trump off the ballot and used lawfare against him so even an addled Joe Biden could croak out that he is a “convicted felon” during their debate. These people are liars. | | 2. By Beth Ann Rosica As a parent of a second grader, would you be ok if your child was asked at school to rate this statement as true or false? "Someone you know, even a relative, might want to touch your private parts in a way that feels confusing.” Without context, this is a concerning question. Even with context, for some parents, the statement may be disturbing. According to a Right to Know, the Downingtown Area School District in the 2022-2023 school year provided a program to all second grade students in the district, entitled Safe Touches. The program is taught by the Crime Victims Center of Chester County. The district described the program to parents in an email communication. Why It Matters. A federal requires that parents of minor children give written permission for their child to participate in a survey that “reveals information concerning ... mental or psychological problems of the student or the student’s family; sex behavior or attitudes; or critical appraisals of other individuals with whom respondents have close family relationships.” The Downingtown Area School District’s references the Protection of Pupil Rights statute and contains this language: "For a student to participate in a survey, personal analysis, evaluation or research study not conducted by the district, the parent/guardian or eligible student must complete and submit a written consent form to the building principal.” Based on this statement, it appears that Downingtown did not follow their policy. The survey was administered by an outside agency and parents had the ability to opt-out, but they did not have to grant affirmative permission in advance of the program or survey. Quotable. “It is unconscionable that a parent should have to go to the lengths I’ve gone just to get transparency and accountability from public officials. After my experience, I seriously wonder if politicians in Harrisburg will ever pay attention to parental rights and hold public officials accountable for abusing their authority and violating the law. What more do parents have to do to protect our rights?” – Chad Williams, father of a Unionville Chadds Ford School District student. | Sponsored Partner Content – Visit | | 3\. Podcasts | | 4\. Lightning Round | | 5\. What we're reading The scandal over President Biden’s increasingly apparent incapacity rolled on through this holiday week, and a suddenly credulous mainstream press published hosts of articles with never-before-revealed anecdotes of Biden’s lapses in memory and ability to communicate. Olivia Nuzzi, writing for New York magazine, had . “In January, I began hearing similar stories from Democratic officials, activists, and donors,” she writes. “All people who supported the president and were working to help reelect him to a second term in office. Following encounters with the president, they had arrived at the same concern: Could he really do this for another four years? Could he even make it to Election Day?” | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. **We need to dial in and focus,** Peter, because a top analyst at _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ , one of the premier election-forecasting organizations in the country, just rated SIX legislative chambers as “TOSS-UPS” in our priority states. Now, this is both a good thing and a bad thing. Good, because it means that victories are within our reach. Bad, because it means that Republicans will ramp up efforts to tilt the scales back in their favor. **Remember, state legislative races are often decided by a few hundred votes, so a contribution of any amount can make a big difference in the outcomes!** ******[That’s why this is the perfect time to make your first donation of $5 or any amount to the NDRC — because it will go a long way toward turning these “TOSS-UP” chambers into wins for fair maps. The “toss-ups” in _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ include both chambers in the Arizona legislature, the New Hampshire House, the Michigan House, the Minnesota House, and the Pennsylvania House.
These races are some of our biggest priorities for 2024 because they will make a huge difference for the future of fair maps.
****The party that controls these six chambers — and several others across the country — will have serious power to either protect democracy or work to dismantle it.****
******And the donations we receive from emails like this helps decide how much we can invest in electing fair maps champions in pivotal elections.******
****[**So please, make a donation to the NDRC if you’re ready to make sure we win, and help keep the fair maps movement moving forward! → **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88408645/484008759/1763522771?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_julyfun_email_20240707-NDRC-Tier1-RaceRatings_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240707-NDRC-Tier1-RaceRatings_&utm_campaign=julyfun&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjZjRiMGQzLTYwM2MtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t9rdkPLvDRFZgRlGQ7hNJNM2VEVP9mvYcUXloGUKUf8=)****

clean_body: There are six state legislative chambers in our priority states ranked as “toss-ups” | We need to dial in and focus, Peter, because a top analyst at Sabato’s Crystal Ball , one of the premier election-forecasting organizations in the country, just rated SIX legislative chambers as “TOSS-UPS” in our priority states. Now, this is both a good thing and a bad thing. Good, because it means that victories are within our reach. Bad, because it means that Republicans will ramp up efforts to tilt the scales back in their favor. Remember, state legislative races are often decided by a few hundred votes, so a contribution of any amount can make a big difference in the outcomes! ****=** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The “toss-ups” in Sabato’s Crystal Ball include both chambers in the Arizona legislature, the New Hampshire House, the Michigan House, the Minnesota House, and the Pennsylvania House. These races are some of our biggest priorities for 2024 because they will make a huge difference for the future of fair maps. The party that controls these six chambers — and several others across the country — will have serious power to either protect democracy or work to dismantle it. **And the donations we receive from emails like this helps decide how much we can invest in electing fair maps champions in pivotal elections.** = Thank you, Marina Marina Jenkins Executive Director of the NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
Despite the lawsuits, the lies, and the felony convictions, there's only one way we’ll stop Donald Trump: |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88409902/484011231/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240707_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmRhNDgzOS02MjNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Ailf28oInIlvFxwuSBE5L7CCToXf4YyCc2yoLqTDPA=)
---
Peter, Despite all the lawsuits, the lies, and the 34 (and counting) felony convictions, the only way we’ll stop Donald Trump from becoming President is by beating him at the ballot box. It might not be what you want to hear, but it’s the truth: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88409912/484011242/-1903170406?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240707_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmRhNDgzOS02MjNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Ailf28oInIlvFxwuSBE5L7CCToXf4YyCc2yoLqTDPA=) | [WATCH & SUPPORT →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88409917/484011246/-1903170406?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240707_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmRhNDgzOS02MjNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Ailf28oInIlvFxwuSBE5L7CCToXf4YyCc2yoLqTDPA=)
---
Fortunately, we live in one of the states best positioned to end Donald Trump’s dreams of ever stepping foot in the Oval Office again. **The road to the White House runs straight through North Carolina.**
That’s why I’m working nonstop to reach North Carolinians on TV, online, on the road, and even on their own front porch. It’s our duty to show and remind North Carolina voters that reproductive freedom, equality, opportunity, and our democracy itself are on the line this November.
But doing that work isn’t free, and I’d much rather be out knocking on doors and talking directly to voters than “dialing for dollars” behind closed doors. That’s why your donations to emails like this one are so important — they power my work meeting voters where they are.
So I’m humbly asking:
**[Will you chip in any amount today to help me frame the choice in this election and mobilize NC voters? Every dollar donated goes towards turning NC blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88409918/484011247/-1903170406?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240707_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmRhNDgzOS02MjNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Ailf28oInIlvFxwuSBE5L7CCToXf4YyCc2yoLqTDPA=)**

clean_body: Despite the lawsuits, the lies, and the felony convictions, there's only one way we’ll stop Donald Trump: | = Peter, Despite all the lawsuits, the lies, and the 34 (and counting) felony convictions, the only way we’ll stop Donald Trump from becoming President is by beating him at the ballot box. It might not be what you want to hear, but it’s the truth: = | = Fortunately, we live in one of the states best positioned to end Donald Trump’s dreams of ever stepping foot in the Oval Office again. The road to the White House runs straight through North Carolina. That’s why I’m working nonstop to reach North Carolinians on TV, online, on the road, and even on their own front porch. It’s our duty to show and remind North Carolina voters that reproductive freedom, equality, opportunity, and our democracy itself are on the line this November. But doing that work isn’t free, and I’d much rather be out knocking on doors and talking directly to voters than “dialing for dollars” behind closed doors. That’s why your donations to emails like this one are so important — they power my work meeting voters where they are. So I’m humbly asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks so much for your help. I hope to see you soon. — Wiley Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: What Trump’s “complete immunity” means in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, look. I don’t profess to be some kind of constitutional law scholar.
But I swore an oath to defend the Constitution when I joined the Marines, and I took that oath seriously.
What I can tell you is that last week, the Supreme Court gave Trump a mandate to act like a king when they gave him immunity from criminal prosecution. It clears the way for the worst of his dictatorial aims.
There’s no telling what another term could look like. With loyal followers like Kari Lake enabling him, it could mean the end of our democracy.
This is no time for despair, though. It is time for action.
If we’re going to defeat Trump we have to win in Arizona. If Trump does win here, he’ll take back the White House. Of that I have no doubt.
It’s going to take all of us doing our part to prevent that from happening.
[**So, if you’re with me, and if you’re ready to take action that will have a major impact on the outcome of our campaign in Arizona, chip in $3 and help us win in Arizona and defeat Trump.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240707-1-120&t=1&akid=2580%2E734936%2EuuqOSa)

**Physical Violence on Capitol Grounds: NOT GUILTY**

**Physical Violence on Restricted Grounds: NOT GUILTY**

Assault: MISTRIAL

Disorderly Conduct on Capitol Grounds: MISTRIAL

**What 's more, another January 6 ****client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy. Dominic was the only member of the Proud Boys who wasn 't railroaded on that false charge.**

In fact, we've defeated 15 charges against our 38 January 6 clients so far!

These hard fought victories prove patriots can BEAT corrupt Joe Biden and his lawless administration if we FIGHT HARD AND SMART.

Before I go on, please let me introduce myself.

**I 'm Attorney John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union.**

name: James Carville
subject: Not the update you want to hear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-1?refcode=em20240707-1&refcode2=3487_552475_Aokksg&akid=3487%2E552475%2EAokksg)
Peter:
With the election heating up, here’s the update on Pennsylvania’s Senate race that you **_need_** to hear, not the one you **_want_** to hear.
**FIRST:** David McCormick, a hedge fund executive from Connecticut, launched his campaign to defeat Bob.
**THEN:** Right-wing super PACs and Wall Street billionaires quickly rallied behind him, spending millions to flood the airwaves in an attempt to buy this critical Senate seat.
**NOW:** The full force of the Republican party, including Donald Trump, is all in to flip PA red, and they’ve booked $75 million in ads to do it.
**If Bob loses, Democrats don’t have a shot in hell to protect the Senate and the White House.** That means kissing any chance of protecting women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights goodbye.
**[I’ll be damned if we screw this up, so here’s what I need from you, Peter. Will you pitch in $5 right now to help Bob hit the ground running?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-1?refcode=em20240707-1&refcode2=3487_552475_Aokksg&akid=3487%2E552475%2EAokksg)**
Your support (yes yours, Peter!) will make a huge difference in this battleground race, so thank you.
— James Carville

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=3487%2E552475%2EAokksg)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=3487%2E552475%2EAokksg)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

subject: I was born an Appalachian hillbilly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Now I’m a U.S. Senator standing in the breach for the left behind and forgotten folks who made this country great but were abandoned by the political class.
Now I stand in the breach for the left behind, the hillbillies, and the forgotten folks who made this country great but were abandoned by the political class.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f2acf202f20d4bf8bf1f85b778227054&_e=jHw9NPYGKTOYuNT8G03uhanXKtyY5O7v5BP4uB-F887MrFbpkwkrje3AUjQtDnnHNh7oK573vJ4whQpTCyV084y8Oh1KHwJ7g6ZnnE472C2lio5BjEtS52xZDnhOS7IYo5GqcNp2h5aDSwV00eDiVhtjw3ZBbISY4YZ16hEih_UVnTXe0ACwMukhqUFXhPtNsoN3Him4WgAK41CmKa56iNZZKZlo29ehHBfPjZMvgK0zJzpao8pvjCr5Zq2YptuF1wNZgpjeYXH6rpFpcDKLicywaoAGmIp21vnAi1KggfyvZiVLVC2llKjB52f0bNq1FjUvt36NFdf_uKcde9Ra729SHPFlCj8uap3T1vbFQzHOgeft9aSwjutNZA-qMBeq "JD Vance")
---

I was born a hillbilly in the foothills of Appalachia.

I was raised by my Mamaw and Papaw.

**This is JD Vance - now I'm a U.S. Senator standing in the breach for the left behind and forgotten folks who made this country great but were abandoned by the political class.**

The same corrupt elites allowing...
- Liberal operatives to prosecute the leader of our Party
- Entitled brats to desecrate our monuments
- Activists to spew anti-American propaganda in our schools
- Chinese-made fentanyl to decimate families and kill our kids
- Illegal aliens to take the jobs of hardworking Americans
It's a disgrace but hear this: Blue collar, white collar, or no collar - I will always stand between you and the Democrat Machine as it plunges our country into ruin.

_But you and I both know the strength of our movement comes down to our numbers._ Millions of Americans elected President Trump, millions stepped up when he was convicted, and millions more will help save this country from the corrupt Liberal elites.

So here's my final pitch to you, Friend:

This will be the most expensive election in American history. By a lot. The Democrat Machine has always crushed us in fundraising. **We have the message. We have the candidates. We have the leader - and we can win it all. **

_But that takes everyone stepping up right now. Not tomorrow. Not in October. Right here and now._

_**[That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise a million dollars by the end of the month to get our message out to the people, register voters in key states, and turn them out to VOTE REPUBLICAN up and down the ballot.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f2acf202f20d4bf8bf1f85b778227054&_e=jHw9NPYGKTOYuNT8G03uhanXKtyY5O7v5BP4uB-F887MrFbpkwkrje3AUjQtDnnHNh7oK573vJ4whQpTCyV084y8Oh1KHwJ7g6ZnnE472C2lio5BjEtS52xZDnhOS7IYo5GqcNp2h5aDSwV00eDiVhtjw3ZBbISY4YZ16hEih_UVnTXe0ACwMukhqUFXhPtNsoN3Him4WgAK41CmKa56iNZZKZlo29ehHBfPjZMvgK120H-rp-7B0bcp7nNGyacSXKEqhDv8Uo_DX9LHxmR8SLc_NTu3_oTHL6XGU1RFZthg0v2TIJ9QXJx7V5JOxiXVX1-rXEIw-Py_mo4WcL3EMIgiEvFWI46bGDnL48KJY4zPUycLi8T172YFid0EU0Vw "That's why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise a million dollars by the end of the month to get our message out to the people, register voters in key states, and turn them out to VOTE REPUBLICAN up and down the ballot.")**_

Respectfully, could you spare a few bucks to help us out?
---
| | | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f2acf202f20d4bf8bf1f85b778227054&_e=jHw9NPYGKTOYuNT8G03uhanXKtyY5O7v5BP4uB-F887MrFbpkwkrje3AUjQtDnnHNh7oK573vJ4whQpTCyV084y8Oh1KHwJ7g6ZnnE472C2lio5BjEtS52xZDnhOS7IYo5GqcNp2h5aDSwV00eDiVhtjw3ZBbISY4YZ16hEih_UVnTXe0ACwMukhqUFXhPtNsoN3Him4WgAK41CmKa56iNZZKZlo29ehHBfPjZMvgK3MN3zt41mBVILR8IUR_jkvUnAIkwRD_1MUJab8HuVsQR9srTikHKdw-AOn4i726hGacW1WyIe5qxVBxGfqb9B-IgDR3zfv8Xf5xw2ooYmck3sVVvgbtgIzFrS5_9CqHOhmYk83HMXfol8mQbpj2w_E "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---
Time is of the essence so I'll wrap this up, but we really need your help. When we expand our Majority in the House, win back the Senate, and get President Trump back in the White House - I promise it'll all be worth it.

You can quote me on that.

Thanks and God bless you,
_- JD Vance_

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Agricutlure and America's Heartland
body:
MAGA has nothing to offer when it comes to fighting for farmers. Democrats in the Senate are proving that we are here for America's heartland.
| | | | | |
---
# Agriculture and America's Heartland
---
|
---
Defending the Senate is essential to protect America's heartland and ensure the continued support of farmers, agricultural scientists, and rural communities through sustainable policies. Democrats on the Agriculture Committee, like Senator Sherrod Brown, are fighting to prioritize agriculture and secure the future of rural America. Senator Brown, a senior member of the Senate Agriculture Committee, has introduced several bills aimed at supporting farmers and producers in Ohio and across the nation as part of the 2023 Farm Bill. His legislative package includes:

* **The Converting Our Waste Sustainably (COWS) Act** : Co-introduced with Senator Alex Padilla, this bipartisan bill establishes a manure management conservation program to improve water quality, reduce costs, and boost farmer profits while minimizing agricultural runoff. This legislation is endorsed by major organizations like the National Milk Producers Federation and the Environmental Working Group.

* **Supporting Urban and Innovative Farmers Act** : This bill aims to support urban and suburban farmers by increasing programmatic and research funding. It proposes reforms to improve technical assistance, enable cooperative agreements with community experts, and scale up composting and food waste initiatives.

* **The Enabling Farmers to Benefit from Processing Nutrition Programs Act** : Co-introduced with Senator Tina Smith, this bill simplifies the process for farmers to participate in federal nutrition programs, making it easier for families to use nutrition assistance benefits at farmers markets. It requires the Department of Agriculture to streamline application processes and provide necessary technology for benefit processing.

---
|
---
Additionally, Brown's bipartisan Local Farms and Food Act seeks to improve and update Farm Bill programs to facilitate local sales for farmers, building on previous legislation he helped pass. By defending the Senate, we can ensure that leaders like Senator Brown continue to advocate for policies that support farmers and rural communities, ensuring a sustainable future for America's heartland. Let's keep the progress rolling and protect the vital work being done for our farmers and agricultural economy.
---
| | | | | [→ Defend the Senate](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2u0pzh-e1xf5f-kyd76rh5/)
---
Thank you for joining us in this important fight. — No Dem Left Behind
---
|
---
|
---
No Dem Left Behind PAC P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

Click here to modify your [preferences](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2u0pzh--15aab-kyd76rh7&sl=4i6&t=1&ac=gpnv) or [unsubscribe](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2u0pzh--15aab-kyd76rh7&sl=4i6&t=5&ac=gpnv).

clean_body: | | | $3. If you knew contributing just $3 would guarantee Joe and Kamala are reelected in November, wouldn’t you donate immediately? If you knew that same $3 would prevent Donald Trump from becoming president again, wouldn’t it be the best $3 you ever spent? We know $3 doesn’t seem like enough money to do either of those things. But by the time you’ve gotten to this point in the email, dozens and dozens of people will have already donated their $3. Now, they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because it all adds up, and that’s how we fund a winning campaign. If we can raise the resources we need to win, we’ll come out on top. If we fall short, we’ll lose. It’s really that simple. So please, Peter, help Joe and Kamala stay in the White House and send a message Trump doesn’t want to hear: He’ll never win in November. Not if this team rallies together. Not if we have anything to do about it. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you. It means a lot that you’re with us. Biden 2024

name: Jessalyn Haefele
subject: My 4 reasons – from the past 3 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
I wanted to share the reasons behind that decision in hopes you will join me in supporting this desperately needed work. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88418867/484035718/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240707reasons_N_JH_90DO_7_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ZmYzYzRlLTZiM2MtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TOSKMtkkhL3m3Qhw7V6W0ah7mbbGrHb9-iwlu0-rn5g=)
---
Hi Peter,

My name is Jessalyn Haefele, and I have been a proud supporter of Her Bold Move through both my time and my funds for more than 3 years. Today, I wanted to share the reasons behind that decision in hopes that you will join me in supporting this desperately needed work.

**I donated to HBM because I have experienced firsthand many times throughout my life being left out of important conversations and decisions happening in rooms full of men.** The only way we are going to be a part of the policies and decisions that affect us is if we are represented equally across all forms of government at all levels. I want people who share my values and understand my experiences to be representing me.

**I donated to HBM because I believe it’s important to make change at the local level, in my own neighborhood, before we can expect anything to change at the national level.** HBM is one of the best organizations that supports women candidates who are working to create change in their communities – and the only national org prioritizing the lives of the millions of women who live in states with abortion bans.

**I donated to HBM because access to reproductive healthcare has directly affected my life and the lives of so many of my family and friends.** I refuse to live in a world where women do not have autonomy over their own bodies, and I am committed to helping elect women to office who will defend those rights fiercely.

**I donated to HBM because I like knowing that my donation is going towards helping women who are stepping up to run in elections where they might not be getting the support or visibility of a “career” politician.** I like knowing I am supporting women who are standing up to outdated ideologies and working tirelessly for change in communities that are often overlooked. I like being part of an organization that is committed to uplifting all of us – not only in the way HBM supports its qualified candidates but also in the way they support future generations of women leaders through their student fellowship program and community outreach programs.

[**I am deeply proud to support Her Bold Move. If any of the reasons I shared resonate with you, please make a donation of $20.24 or more so this phenomenal organization can continue to support fiercely pro-choice women candidates running up and down the ballot to move our nation forward.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88418869/484035722/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240707reasons_N_JH_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ZmYzYzRlLTZiM2MtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TOSKMtkkhL3m3Qhw7V6W0ah7mbbGrHb9-iwlu0-rn5g=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.24 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88418871/484035724/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240707reasons_N_JH_90DO_7_NG_N_EB20.24&express_lane=true&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ZmYzYzRlLTZiM2MtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TOSKMtkkhL3m3Qhw7V6W0ah7mbbGrHb9-iwlu0-rn5g=)

name: Letitia James
subject: My numbers will go PUBLIC soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88418907/484035795/-1997846893?refcode=jtk1502-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWZmM2M0ZS02YjNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ou_kKyO81ydPgHL_rA55KHmjxYRrQIOP-PWearGD4uI=)
---
Peter, my PUBLIC filing deadline is in just four days, and I'm humbly asking for your help.
I've said it before: Asking for money is my _least_ favorite part of running a campaign. But if I don't, I won't have the resources to continue standing up for you and holding powerful and corrupt men accountable for their actions.

**So I have to ask:** [**Can you chip in $5 right now so I can continue to fight fearlessly for justice? name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: When you donate to the DNC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
When you make a donation to the Democratic National Committee, you are contributing to the one organization best-positioned to make a difference in all of the races you care about most.
---
When you make a donation to the Democratic National Committee, you are contributing to the one organization best-positioned to make a difference in all of the races you care about most. So that's what we are asking you to do today. To contribute $7 before the Republican convention begins next week: $7 because we can use that money to help defeat Donald Trump this November. $7 because we can put that money to work to elect a Democratic House and Senate. $7 because the DNC is the one organization that can look at the polls, look at the maps, and move money where it is needed in order to elect Democrats from the presidency all the way down the ballot. We are the Democratic Party. And our strength is the people who power our work. So with the fate and future of our democracy on the ballot this November, we're asking: [**Can Democrats everywhere count on you to make a $7 contribution directly to the Democratic National Committee today? We'll put your donation to work defeating Trump and electing Democrats everywhere.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-elect-dems-2024?refcode=em_20240707_dnc_actives1_rtb_evg_tra_fr_na_v1&refcode2=309_22930333_sMxNqH&akid=309%2E22930333%2EsMxNqH) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-elect-dems-2024?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20240707_dnc_actives1_rtb_evg_tra_fr_na_v1&refcode2=309_22930333_sMxNqH&akid=309%2E22930333%2EsMxNqH)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-elect-dems-2024?express_lane=true&refcode=em_20240707_dnc_actives1_rtb_evg_tra_fr_na_v1&refcode2=309_22930333_sMxNqH&akid=309%2E22930333%2EsMxNqH)**
---
****
Thank you,
The Democratic Party

name: Wes Moore

body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1014&amount=25&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ][IMG]

Angela will be the first to tell you that the race for Maryland’s open
Senate seat is about a lot more than just her vs. Republican Larry Hogan.

Their race is about two very different visions for Maryland:

If Hogan wins, the GOP will take the Senate. That likely means a national
abortion ban, another massive tax break for corporations, and possibly
even the sunsetting of Social Security and Medicare.

But if Angela wins, we’ve got a shot at defending our Senate majority. If
Democrats win big in November, we can restore and protect Roe, lower costs
for working families, increase opportunity and equality... the sky’s the
limit.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1015&amount=25&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]I know which future I’d like to see for Maryland,
Peter, and I need your help
electing Angela so we can make it a reality. Will you please pitch in $25
right now to help her continue building up this grassroots team and defeat
Larry Hogan?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1017&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]Chip in $50
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1018&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]Chip in $100 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1019&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]Chip in $200

Whether we’re talking about abortion access or lowering costs for
families, Angela and Republican Larry Hogan couldn’t be further apart.

But that’s not the only thing separating the two campaigns.

While Hogan has been courting support from national MAGA figures, Angela
has thousands of grassroots supporters fueling her campaign.

While Hogan is backed by dark money super PACs with a far-right agenda,
Angela’s team is knocking on doors and making phone calls to engage with
folks in their communities.

While Hogan is banking on million dollar boosts from corporate donors,
Angela relies on supporters chipping in $10 or $25 when they can.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1007&amount=25&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]When you compare the two,
Peter, it’s obvious that Angela
is the candidate Marylanders can trust to fight for them in the U.S.
Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to elect Angela and keep the Senate
blue?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1008&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]Chip in $50
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]Chip in $100 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1011&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]Chip in $200
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]Chip in $250 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28021?t=1013&amount=35&akid=1967%2E52803%2EGB3XB0 ]Other Amount

Together, we can deliver for Maryland and give working families another
champion in the Senate.

—Wes Moore

Friend, if you've been waiting for the perfect time to make your first donation to my Senate reelection campaign, today is that day – because there is still so much work to do to make a real, meaningful difference for people across Nevada and the country.
* If we're going to protect and restore reproductive freedom nationwide, I need your help.

* If we're going to take on powerful special interests to lower everyday costs for working families, I need your help.

* If we're going to take commonsense steps to prevent gun violence, I need your help.

* If we're going to uphold our democracy in the face of far-right attacks, I need your help.

**I know what you might be thinking: Can my $5 really do all that? My answer is yes – without a doubt.**
Right now, I'm the most vulnerable woman in the Senate, and dark money groups like the Koch network are pouring _millions_ into Nevada to defeat me. Just recently, _The Cook Political Report_ DOWNGRADED my race to a Toss Up.
The ONLY way I can fight back, pull ahead, and defend this seat is if grassroots supporters like you chip in what you can – one $5 donation at a time.**[So please, will you give your first gift of $5 or more now to help me win in Nevada and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88421350/484043638/199829904?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4068-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmUwZmFjYi02ZTNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HIuI_7dfPuX3zkL_sgOktGElTsontVEJupjjK19Ldjs=)**

Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help. Privacy Policy

body:
Please let us explain.
#
Here’s the truth about Missouri’s U.S. Senate race, Peter.
This is our best chance to flip a GOP-held Senate seat in November — and Lucas Kunce has already proved he can do it. **Please let us explain:**
**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55347?refcode=em20240707-5944&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5944%2E614464%2EGRYV3R)**
Since last year, Lucas has worked hard to build a historic grassroots campaign with the help of Missouri’s labor movement — an enormous coalition of working people who already know how to fight for power in our state.
They’ve fought and won major battles for everyday Missourians over the last six years when our politicians failed to do the right thing, like rejecting an anti-union “Right-to-Work” scam, raising the minimum wage well above the federal level, and finally passing Medicaid expansion.
So between that coalition, our campaign’s record-breaking grassroots fundraising, Hawley’s unique vulnerability, and a new initiative to end Missouri’s extreme abortion ban on the ballot — similar to other initiatives that have driven turn out for pro-freedom, Democratic-leaning voters in red states like Kansas, Ohio, and Kentucky — we have a real path to victory. **But here’s the tricky part:**
National insiders and shady corporate mega-donors have already made BIG investments into Josh Hawley. They know he’s the most vulnerable GOP senator up for re-election this cycle — and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to make him look strong and keep this Senate seat under their thumb.
They know that Hawley will spend six more years upholding their corrupt status quo. He’ll continue using his power to benefit himself, not working people. He’ll continue trying to strip away abortion rights from everyday Americans. And he’ll continue letting massive corporations gut communities across our state.
**That’s what we’re up against in this race.** Now here’s why we need your help:
Lucas is committed to building his campaign with $0 from corporate PACs, which means he’s relying on real people like you to power this movement. We know it may not seem like a lot, but small donations of $15, $5, or even just $1 add up fast.
**So we’re asking:[Can you chip in whatever works best for you today so we can stand up to the national insiders and corporate elites trying to buy this race and finally elect a real warrior for working people to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55347?refcode=em20240707-5944&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5944%2E614464%2EGRYV3R)**

name: Debbie (personal)
subject: our special tradition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Every Sunday, my mom and I spend the afternoon playing dominoes together
| | |
---
Friend, every Sunday my mom and I spend the afternoon playing dominoes together. It's our special tradition — and it's one of the most meaningful parts of my life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88421791/484044650/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1480-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDJkYzQwMzItNzAzYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J-A3jlsyslzCD-6itEGnkIHHrACNkwKVeMZMIM5p7XI=)
I owe just about everything in my life to my mom. She made the brave decision to move my family from our home in Ecuador to America. It wasn't easy moving to a new country as a 14-year-old, but I can't imagine what it was like for my mom, having to start all over and working double shifts just to pay rent for a one room apartment.
But friend, my mom never wavered once. **Her constant reassurance, work ethic, and firm belief in the American dream inspired me to fight for a better life.**
I studied hard, got a minimum wage job, and earned scholarships to pay for college. After school, I found a career giving back to my community through public service, eventually becoming the first South American immigrant elected to Congress. I've found purpose in my life, become part of a unique community, and raised a beautiful family.
**Because of my mom's sacrifices, my family got our American dream. And now, it's both a privilege and a joy to be my mom's caretaker, ensuring that she can age with dignity and comfort.** There are a lot of big things that come along with that job — managing her doctor's appointments, advocating for her care, and navigating the all-too-complicated Medicare and Social Security systems.
But it's the little parts of caring for my mom — playing our weekly domino games, cooking a big dinner for her, taking her on trips to her favorite places — that matter most to me.
My ability to give my mom a good retirement is one of the things that I am most grateful for. It's not easy by any means, but I know all too well just how lucky my mom and I are. **These days, it's getting harder and harder for Americans to age with dignity and comfort.**
Far-right Republicans have fought for major cuts to Social Security and blocked efforts to expand Medicare, leaving seniors living paycheck to paycheck. Instead they want to cut or privatize these critical public programs — my opponent Rick Scott actually came up with a plan to _end_ them altogether. Even though I've been able to give my mom a good retirement, the shortcomings of these programs still make it incredibly hard to get her the care and support she needs.
**Every American deserves a good, stable retirement. That's why I'm running for Senate — to fight for people like my mom.[Polls show that we've got a real chance to win, but I'm counting on your help to power my grassroots campaign. Please, if you believe in a better future for seniors, will you rush $5 to help me defeat Rick Scott and protect Social Security and Medicare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88421792/484044651/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1480-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDJkYzQwMzItNzAzYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J-A3jlsyslzCD-6itEGnkIHHrACNkwKVeMZMIM5p7XI=)**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Let's change course before it’s too late
body:
You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b349b54fd32a422e8fb8f3fd18db8a9e&_t=7LicjsnlQ4RkbONnKATD-v4DLWkGxMnnXz2ErbVScHFpqifqyE1bYNit8vVLoZZsFgsiH7i3HdInSFtpA-VyUCgNTjIazAC-ninIcV-yrxnFqVA13aKjbcO41uced01z)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b349b54fd32a422e8fb8f3fd18db8a9e&_e=XSQBmV9xj2ykQcNgzebx4KbKX2lloYKsgPbO6G-x91kq-dwYeqHJwZzSQ0SAU16ODPcHmnDVnKJEyCwn0KDiIXl4fBiZ-nXfiIf0p_soErWOfGYss3FFrjB4pUYSXBeo_-qiQveIj40fJM2ope49CSPQpLG_pGrE5hAKQRiIradyU8aM84d-5v1P9OFd2fOGvDD98Eky_NyjY4kOItUOG3vDvkhzxuB6ieK_sQA9KWJZIhoQFM9iAKTMnHoxaPAHkg_i1At_EwAlGFBx9nIBSGOU0Crg_FjVxYytANqAO-FEIkJ0tSNALpXSG_9pORTwAa1zuJ2r-HPhMrOiGadL0CPMqfOnYNNrep9Uy4a1W7qgIZFQwL-VO7pBHP94Xm3w-9cF_knNe9XTwRUU4aQe2vxY9tD6N31Dv0D1pmEA-DPYnafEyMiSLieXDq3RaHyu)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b349b54fd32a422e8fb8f3fd18db8a9e&_e=XSQBmV9xj2ykQcNgzebx4KbKX2lloYKsgPbO6G-x91kq-dwYeqHJwZzSQ0SAU16ODPcHmnDVnKJEyCwn0KDiIXl4fBiZ-nXfiIf0p_soErWOfGYss3FFrjB4pUYSXBeo_-qiQveIj40fJM2ope49CSPQpLG_pGrE5hAKQRiIradyU8aM84d-5v1P9OFd2fOGvDD98Eky_NyjY4kOItUOG3vDvkhzxuB6ieK_sQA9KWJZIhoQFM9iAKTMnHoxaPAHkg_i1At_EwAlGFBx9nIBSLkyw_y1oD1OqBsdYzGV10N9WjcFEdUUXliX0H6ZqrfuYdckgMKdGNMqIRLhyMmRxilq1Mco5-eHBy4DkzkFm8XUtRBMGT38ps2M6tPVnr9aJiqBMvEEFt6sRxtK36iX3s2xvn2M9ORNU99ntcsrSbqiDyg6tux9n3-1vII1_7li)**_

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b349b54fd32a422e8fb8f3fd18db8a9e&_e=XSQBmV9xj2ykQcNgzebx4KbKX2lloYKsgPbO6G-x91kq-dwYeqHJwZzSQ0SAU16ODPcHmnDVnKJEyCwn0KDiIXl4fBiZ-nXfiIf0p_soErWOfGYss3FFrjB4pUYSXBeo_-qiQveIj40fJM2ope49CSPQpLG_pGrE5hAKQRiIradyU8aM84d-5v1P9OFd2fOGvDD98Eky_NyjY4kOItUOG3vDvkhzxuB6ieK_sQA9KWJZIhoQFM9iAKTMnHoxaPAHkg_i1At_EwAlGFBx9nIBSDjiyK4JZSL_VnsPa0Ag4hP5JPKzaLMFgH5c8i90vKX-i-Y8LxgcVOW5fhU0hVsGV1rcpy0Gp3RXUcJFpGqNkNZhEmU6nmrpb_YZVkd-7Eov9zr1ncklrRCm5mkNQYjTSBLsWD5H11lx5mVJ7IOgcgP4B8JjH6CYfxfqZI9wWoKT) [No](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b349b54fd32a422e8fb8f3fd18db8a9e&_e=XSQBmV9xj2ykQcNgzebx4KbKX2lloYKsgPbO6G-x91kq-dwYeqHJwZzSQ0SAU16ODPcHmnDVnKJEyCwn0KDiIXl4fBiZ-nXfiIf0p_soErWOfGYss3FFrjB4pUYSXBeo_-qiQveIj40fJM2ope49CSPQpLG_pGrE5hAKQRiIradyU8aM84d-5v1P9OFd2fOGvDD98Eky_NyjY4kOItUOG3vDvkhzxuB6ieK_sQA9KWJZIhoQFM9iAKTMnHoxaPAHkg_i1At_EwAlGFBx9nIBSE481elR5QoVHhX3IKJswKH004eR8VDhn_4bRTb3HX688qE-ySFY7uLiJYi30YO4DZWqPxaaVqs47WwX54cGxTex6WnQ96yMTIEq6ABhRuJ00IJchw-SxLyAK5DE5f2v0YpJSVyR89UTsg85IGJZJZkJFI4bHU0ogqotKiDoBTWw) [Not Sure / Don't Know](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b349b54fd32a422e8fb8f3fd18db8a9e&_e=XSQBmV9xj2ykQcNgzebx4KbKX2lloYKsgPbO6G-x91kq-dwYeqHJwZzSQ0SAU16ODPcHmnDVnKJEyCwn0KDiIXl4fBiZ-nXfiIf0p_soErWOfGYss3FFrjB4pUYSXBeo_-qiQveIj40fJM2ope49CSPQpLG_pGrE5hAKQRiIradyU8aM84d-5v1P9OFd2fOGvDD98Eky_NyjY4kOItUOG3vDvkhzxuB6ieK_sQA9KWJZIhoQFM9iAKTMnHoxaPAHkg_i1At_EwAlGFBx9nIBSEfSmrFwjIOjhqg33QmOE8Yd8JMKbwy3PZjl8BRM8TqAdaj_v1Kt3DDCzQLVFcOhpkC1bNlAn3R7GQs_ZF_uCfT3JeRdSaSM38_fo3oTvdG3bbXYDNkrM_RaOOWv0usHDED5jztowwQAJc4CWv7wAzUq2un50pqUIOzXgr1fAPGj) We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen! That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That's because we're seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b349b54fd32a422e8fb8f3fd18db8a9e&_e=XSQBmV9xj2ykQcNgzebx4KbKX2lloYKsgPbO6G-x91kq-dwYeqHJwZzSQ0SAU16ODPcHmnDVnKJEyCwn0KDiIXl4fBiZ-nXfiIf0p_soErWOfGYss3FFrjB4pUYSXBeo_-qiQveIj40fJM2ope49CSPQpLG_pGrE5hAKQRiIradyU8aM84d-5v1P9OFd2fOGvDD98Eky_NyjY4kOItUOG3vDvkhzxuB6ieK_sQA9KWJZIhoQFM9iAKTMnHoxaPAHkg_i1At_EwAlGFBx9nIBSKdfGU1PznsEYEZO-Ji-7WpE29D8buwfbrWwMJFTAbxydm2aR--YFn6EGY0h1tnQs_q755rZsk9wCgOdIXvU4WVhlQlFlRr_1HQjHEtOhknPOBLCOOwAax5mPsuUl22klsJkGK0X8Bpl43U4DBR0apMJjSs-eFsIqNdZ9e0h51k8) For our children, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Pass the Torch
body:
There is still time to swap Joe out, get behind a new nominee and defeat Trump in November. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=38ec962b46&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=362fbe51e4&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| “81-year-old man holds nation hostage – film at 11.”

It has been 10 days since Joe Biden’s disastrous debate. 8 days later he sat for a 22-minute interview with George Stephanopoulos that didn’t convince anyone of anything but perhaps the President’s obstinacy and disdain for polls.

I think this is Joe Biden’s final week as the Democratic nominee. Today, Congress returns to session and dozens of swing state legislators will convene to determine how they can best keep their jobs and get Joe Biden off of the top of the ticket. I personally spoke to at least one more member who is going to call on Joe to step down in the coming days. Respected Senator Mark Warner is assembling a mutiny among Senators. More and more donors go public each day.

The boat is springing leaks more quickly than the Biden team can patch them – and no one is scared of retribution anymore. For the swing state legislators, what frightens them is being part of a blowout in November.

A journalist compared the fissure between what Democrats are saying in public and what they are saying in private to the behavior of Republicans under Trump – they would bemoan his venality and then pledge allegiance as soon as a camera went on. Joe isn’t Trump and it's age not morality, but the pattern remains.

The same journalist observed that it is only the timidity of the Democrats that gives Joe any hope, and that if they did start speaking their mind it would be clear that Joe has lost his party.

There are things we can do. Let your local legislator know you feel that Joe Biden should step aside. Friends of mine have helped to organize a petition - **[Pass the Torch, Joe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=efc0ff5644&e=0f227c2ae3)** – that I have signed. I’d encourage you to do so as well and **[spread the word](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=b9241647fd&e=0f227c2ae3)**. Let's get #passthetorch to be the phrase on everyone's lips.

There is still time to swap Joe out, get behind a new nominee and defeat Trump in November. Joe Biden said that he’d step aside if the Lord Almighty asked him to do so. Well, the Lord might not be available, so we will have to do.

Looking forward to a new nominee,
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=2bbfa870c0&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=9466b85767&e=0f227c2ae3)
---

You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=2ba1c55068) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=2ba1c55068).

| Peter,

In politics, my commitment has always been clear: putting Virginians first. As the representative of Virginia’s Seventh District in Congress, I've strived to advocate for and address the needs of Virginians every day.

_**When I see a problem – I act.**_

When I first decided to run for Congress after the election of President Trump and attempts to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, I was motivated by my desire to help people and give our district the representation it deserved. I'm bringing that same commitment to my campaign for Governor of Virginia.

Every day, I am reminded of the importance of putting Virginians first, especially as we travel across the Commonwealth and hear from people on the issues that matter most to them in this upcoming election.

Together, I know we can expand economic opportunity for everyone, strengthen our schools, keep our communities safe, and protect the fundamental rights of all Virginians.

From hearing the concerns of Virginians to advocating for their needs, my commitment to bringing people together and solving our toughest challenges remains unwavering. clean_body: In politics, my commitment has always been clear: putting Virginians first. | = | Peter, In politics, my commitment has always been clear: putting Virginians first. As the representative of Virginia’s Seventh District in Congress, I've strived to advocate for and address the needs of Virginians every day. When I see a problem – I act. When I first decided to run for Congress after the election of President Trump and attempts to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, I was motivated by my desire to help people and give our district the representation it deserved. I'm bringing that same commitment to my campaign for Governor of Virginia. Every day, I am reminded of the importance of putting Virginians first, especially as we travel across the Commonwealth and hear from people on the issues that matter most to them in this upcoming election. Together, I know we can expand economic opportunity for everyone, strengthen our schools, keep our communities safe, and protect the fundamental rights of all Virginians. From hearing the concerns of Virginians to advocating for their needs, my commitment to bringing people together and solving our toughest challenges remains unwavering. = | = | = | = | = | = Your support will help us continue to put Virginians first and build a better future for our Commonwealth. Thank you for your support. Abigail * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

No on certifying President Biden's victory in 2020 **_LGBTQ issues:_**
No on the Matthew Shepard & James Byrd Hate Crimes Prevention Act
No on recognizing gay marriage nationally, and sought to ban it in California
He publicly outed a former Democratic opponent _**Women’s rights: **_
No on the right to Contraception Act
No on the Violence Against Women Act
No on the Equal Rights Amendment
No on the Fair Pay Act _**Sensible gun laws: **_
No on assault weapons ban
No on expanding background checks
No on the Protecting Our Kids Act
Yes to expand conceal and carry laws
Yes to protect firearms manufacturers from lawsuits _**The environment:**_
No on the Inflation Reduction Act which made historic investments in clean energy
No on protecting people from toxic incinerators
No on recovering America’s wildlife
No on investing in transportation and water infrastructure
No on cracking down on oil company price gouging **I've said this before, and I still mean it: Lives are at stake in the coming 2024 elections. LGBTQ+ rights are at stake. Our democracy is at stake. The right to choose is at stake -- and so much more.** [**Stopping the GOP from retaining House control starts by ousting Ken Calvert here in CA-41. That's why I'm all in on electing Will Rollins, and it's why I'm counting on your support. Please split an urgent $10 between Blue Amp Action and Will’s campaign today.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13a9e805-34f5-4f10-8f29-4881f4d59103/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Let me tell you about the country I love.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
In the moment I took my oath, I realized how lucky I was.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240707-4076-footer&t=1&akid=4076%2E420207%2EJ4_Vlm)
Let me tell you about the country I love, Peter.
After arriving here from India at age 16, I spent more than a dozen years on an alphabet soup of visas — F1, H1B and more — before I finally got my green card. Then, after a few more years, I finally became a citizen. A citizen of the United States of America.
America, a country that had embraced me as a 16-year-old who had come here by myself to study and build a life of better opportunity.
America, a country built on the idea of being a refuge for those in need, “the tired masses, yearning to breathe free.”
America, a country that has always celebrated itself as a nation of immigrants.
In the moment I took my oath, I realized how lucky I was.
I knew that my future had opened up, and that citizenship would offer me the chance to seek opportunity and to take part in our democracy.
I knew, too, that with those freedoms and opportunity came enormous responsibility: to do everything I could to preserve and build our democracy, to vote, and to use my life to pay it forward and ensure opportunity for others.
That is our mission together and I’m so grateful to have your partnership in this fight.
**I believe in the work we’re doing together and I’ll never give up the fight for our progressive values — but we must stand united.**[**If you’re with me, please chip in to power our fight for the progressive future and the country we deserve.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240707.ZpKGxE&refcode=em20240707-4076&t=2&akid=4076%2E420207%2EJ4_Vlm)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240707.ZpKGxE&refcode=em20240707-4076&t=21&akid=4076%2E420207%2EJ4_Vlm)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240707-4076-footer&t=22&refcode2=4076_420207_J4_Vlm&akid=4076%2E420207%2EJ4_Vlm)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

**Listen, in the wake of SCOTUS’ disastrous immunity ruling, Justice Sonia Sotomayor is sounding the alarm:** We’re _so thankful_ to have a brave Justice like Sotomayor on the Court who isn’t afraid to call out her colleagues' insane rulings.

But we know the MAGA GOP will attack her for calling this out, so we MUST stand with her in the fight to protect our Democracy. [**That’s why we’re sending her a letter, and we need your signature before 9AM tomorrow. Sign now to thank Justice Sonia Sotomayor and stand with her! »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/46085?t=7&akid=21664%2E4449941%2E4kYUUc) | [CHIP IN $7 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/46085?t=8&akid=21664%2E4449941%2E4kYUUc)

_Dear Justice Sonia Sotomayor,_

Thank you for your tireless work to protect our Democracy and your pursuit of justice.

**Despite SCOTUS’ ruling, we know that Trump’s crimes shouldn’t be ignored.**

We’re so grateful that you’re fearlessly calling out this disastrous decision and refusing to back down for the good of our Democracy. [**That’s why I’m chipping in to Fight for Reform to sign this letter and thank you for your work to hold Donald Trump accountable »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/46085?t=9&akid=21664%2E4449941%2E4kYUUc) | [CHIP IN $7 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/46085?t=10&akid=21664%2E4449941%2E4kYUUc)
---
We know Republicans will attack you mercilessly. Thank you for staying the course and doing what is right.

You have the support of millions of Americans!

Sincerely,

x A Passionate Democrat

name: Mark Kelly
subject: [survey] Let me know what you think.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I’m hoping you’ll take a quick survey and share your thoughts on our work in Washington.
#

Friend —
Thanks to supporters like you, we’ve won a full term in the U.S. Senate. And today, I wanted to check in and get a sense of what you’re interested in — the priorities, concerns, and hopes you have for the work we do in Washington.
With an important election on the horizon and a lot of work on Capitol Hill ahead of me, I’m hoping you’ll take a quick survey and share your thoughts.
We’ll keep the questions pretty much the same on these issue surveys so I can track how opinions and attitudes change over time.
[**Will you take a moment today to complete my official issues survey for 2024? Your feedback helps me be a better Senator.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-july24-issue-survey_em/?source=em240707-1-90&refcode2=5799.6688874.l1S15-&akid=5799%2E6688874%2El1S15-)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-july24-issue-survey_em/?source=em240707-1-90&refcode2=5799.6688874.l1S15-&akid=5799%2E6688874%2El1S15-)**
From my first campaign, it’s been important to me that I represent everyone in Arizona. Doesn’t matter if we agree on everything, whether you’re a Republican, a Democrat, Libertarian, Independent — whatever party you’re in, or however you lean.
Everyone’s opinion matters.
And like I said before, I’ll be checking the results from these surveys. I’m interested in seeing how your responses evolve over the next several months.
Some people go to Washington and get disconnected from the people they represent, but I always wanted to do this a little differently. Filling out this survey will help me stay in the loop, so please, let me know what’s on your mind.
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-july24-issue-survey_em/?source=em240707-1-90&refcode2=5799.6688874.l1S15-&akid=5799%2E6688874%2El1S15-)**
Looking forward to hearing from you, thanks in advance.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5799%2E6688874%2El1S15-).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: our Senate majority is at stake, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I'm counting on your support
| | |
---
Friend,
**With the GOP prepared to invest millions of dollars into flipping New York red, I’ve set an ambitious $20,000 weekly fundraising goal.**
I rely on donations from grassroots supporters like you to hit these goals — not corporate PACs. That’s why I’m about to ask you to make a donation to help me meet this critical weekly goal. **[_(If you’re ready to give now, you can chip in here.)_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88425194/484054210/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5174-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWIxOTYyYS03NzNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fYd-PzNAv-TDiyhN_8XKYEgLfm6S4ttjJfItvHBmvC0=)**
But first, I want to personally thank you for standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 14 years, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns across the nation.
Thank you for having my back as I lead the fight to protect **Social Security and Medicare** and ensure that seniors can retire in dignity.

Thank you for proudly standing with me in my fight to **certify the Equal Rights Amendment.** Today, we’re so close to finally establishing gender equality in our Constitution — giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights.
**But here's the bad news: If Republicans flip even one Senate seat, they could retake the majority and _undo all of our progress_. With 23 Democratic seats on the ballot, our grassroots resources will be stretched thin. Especially after the GOP’s historic gains in New York in 2022, I need your help to defend my must-win seat.**
**[_That's why I have to ask: Please, will you rush $5 or more before midnight tonight to help me hit my urgent weekly goal and defend our Senate majority? I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on your support, friend._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88425197/484054217/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5174-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWIxOTYyYS03NzNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fYd-PzNAv-TDiyhN_8XKYEgLfm6S4ttjJfItvHBmvC0=)**
