A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. body:
| | |
---
**Friend,**** recent polls show Sherrod neck and neck with his Trump-backed millionaire opponent, and we’re just $11,376 away from our ambitious rapid-response goal. With just hours left, we need your help to close the gap before our crucial midnight deadline.**
With _NBC News_ reporting that Sherrod is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and _ __The Cook Political Report_ rating this race a TOSS UP, Washington Republicans are launching attack ads at our campaign.

The only way we can fight back – and compete with the MILLIONS in GOP spending – is with the grassroots support from folks like you. **What happens in battleground Ohio will decide Senate control, so please, friend:**
**[Will you rush $5 or more right now – or as much as you can spare before our midnight deadline – to help us hit our critical goal, win in Ohio, and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88425189/484054209/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk2152-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTM4ZWU3YS03NjNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r7oTKzkcXj8JvpVYlqkjQ9lOYB3jDA0pH9vLHa_J4XI=)**
Thanks for chipping in,

Team Sherrod

| **Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: **Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work.

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. Peter, as we’ve seen, Republican lawmakers are eager to roll back our most fundamental rights and enact radical legislation that is disastrous for North Carolina. Last year, the GOP supermajority — aided by a Democrat who schemed to switch parties — passed a dangerous abortion ban, overriding my veto by just one vote.
To prevent the GOP from doing further harm, we must break the supermajority — and I want to introduce you to three candidates whose races are key to the fight. I also need to ask you to **[split a contribution between their campaigns and our team](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88425632/484055838/665748816?refcode=ea.13a01cb7-783c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.13a01cb7-783c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2EwMWNiNy03ODNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QRNyLSYMmDLCfGj2jOKHkEp_iH-lh1jXAhffBApeTCQ=)** to help them win their critical elections:

Nicole is an attorney and former PTA president who will keep up the fight to protect and restore our fundamental rights, including access to abortion care. We can count on her to represent House District 105 faithfully.

**Beth Helfrich** is a lifelong North Carolinian and graduate of North Mecklenburg High School and Davidson College. She’s a former educator (and daughter of two teachers!), small business owner, and mom of five running to represent House District 98. She’s a fierce advocate for public education and knows the threat that Republicans pose to our schools. She’ll fight for access to abortion, quality child care, and health care in every community. clean_body: Forwarded message: | I hope you’ve had a good 4th of July weekend, Peter, and I’m sorry to interrupt your celebrations. I wanted to make sure this email remains at the top of your inbox. In less than four months, we must break the NC GOP’s supermajority in Raleigh, and the candidates I introduced to you are key to our Democratic success: = | = Thanks very much, and happy 4th of July weekend. Roy Cooper = Begin forwarded message: This email is a little longer than usual, but it’s important, so I hope you’ll read to the end. It introduces you to three North Carolina Democrats who will help DEFEAT the GOP supermajority in Raleigh and block Republicans’ far-right agenda. = = Peter, as we’ve seen, Republican lawmakers are eager to roll back our most fundamental rights and enact radical legislation that is disastrous for North Carolina. Last year, the GOP supermajority — aided by a Democrat who schemed to switch parties — passed a dangerous abortion ban, overriding my veto by just one vote. To prevent the GOP from doing further harm, we must break the supermajority — and I want to introduce you to three candidates whose races are key to the fight. I also need to ask you to = to help them win their critical elections: = Nicole Sidman is the Democratic nominee to defeat Tricia Cotham — whose party switch granted the GOP their supermajority. Nicole is an attorney and former PTA president who will keep up the fight to protect and restore our fundamental rights, including access to abortion care. We can count on her to represent House District 105 faithfully. = = David Hill is a pediatrician who has spent his career serving North Carolina children and families. Now the Democratic nominee for State Senate District 7, David is ready to put the people of southeastern NC first. He will fight for a cleaner environment, great schools, great roads, good jobs, and an affordable cost of living. The outcome of this race in New Hanover County could be a bellwether for Democratic success across the state. = = Beth Helfrich is a lifelong North Carolinian and graduate of North Mecklenburg High School and Davidson College. She’s a former educator (and daughter of two teachers!), small business owner, and mom of five running to represent House District 98. She’s a fierce advocate for public education and knows the threat that Republicans pose to our schools. She’ll fight for access to abortion, quality child care, and health care in every community. She is ready to stand up to the gun lobby to protect our communities and polluters who would imperil our clean air and water. This seat is open, so it may be one of our best chances to break the supermajority. = I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished in my time as governor, but I know there’s so much more work to do. Our ability to create progress on the issues that matter most comes down to electing Democratic legislators we can count on. I know that Nicole, David, and Beth will be strong advocates for making North Carolina a stronger state for all of us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We deeply appreciate your support, Roy = = North Carolina is set to be one of the most important swing states in the 2024 elections. Republicans need to win NC to return Donald Trump to the White House. Meanwhile, Roy is committed to flipping our state blue for President Biden. Roy is term-limited and can’t run again this time, and our upcoming gubernatorial election is considered the most competitive gubernatorial contest in the country. Meanwhile, Republicans hold just one-seat supermajorities in both chambers of the state legislature — we MUST break the supermajorities to prevent the GOP from enacting their radical agenda in North Carolina. = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Get “The Great Principles of Chemistry” on DVD
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWag8kCWBN

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWag8kCWBN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

There's a
tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it
is...What is true about the world?

Tough,
right?

It's a
question mankind has asked since ancient times-since creation
itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do,
email me because I would love to know more!).

This
question is especially pressing today because of the growing
power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material
world.

That's
one of the reasons we released our free online course, "The
Great Principles of Chemistry."

Why
chemistry?

For one,
this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to
millions of Americans, including you.

More
fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts
education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand
important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as
humans in the world around us and reveals the framework,
implications, and potential for human life.

Like all
our courses, "The Great Principles of Chemistry" contains
stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case,
hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for
science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our
online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity
of people like you to help us share the course with as many
people as possible.

Would you
consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this
course?

For any
donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box
set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link
below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63356775:Wag8kCWBN:m:3:2627245898:9A54E4E12215DF1891D6956C8E405E65:r

The
proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and
inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its
Creator.

For these
reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater
appreciation for the world around us with "The Great Principles
of Chemistry."

Let's
promote what's true about our world together.

Warm
Regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President

Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWag8kCWBN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWag8kCWBN

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Let’s protect women against the Biden Administration
body:
And I will not shut up
| Peter, I’m Riley Gaines. Maybe you’ve heard me talk about how other female swimmers and I were forced to compete against men -- and even share locker rooms with them.
Most people sat idly by and allowed this injustice to happen. That’s when I realized that nobody else was going to stand up for me, my teammates, and other women like us. I had to speak out. That’s why I launched the **Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute.** My team of Riley Gaines Center Ambassadors and I are building a movement of students, athletes, and concerned citizens who are fed up with the attack on our freedoms and rights. I’d love to have you join us to defy the dangerous gender ideology that’s spreading rampant throughout society today. [Together, you and I will fight against insanity like this: ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d9ce9aed96cd4ba68fe0de6a08912dcd&_e=4t4NzkRFucY4Qcvg7X0HCF_hi13xJRSjQ3KbIw1oss0qBud9JVFnLvlzrI5eVrvPuDZEwUwctF8VTDkw3sYdcRAumDU02vqYUtdNFoh9Dr6jbMlI5fJI4D1hkSrrrVVemsIxAoDYsOtBxr0l7PZgWSDyvt4m-a-8LP17IvB5uWTQq6Sb3wmRG-zVgXUTIPIbNGwaWVFIlXkBq4WxoRxSnG_KxB4TTscIcXN6iTqT6pKuTNaX_2FD3ivpx1ua3BaL6I7bqQxlY_jVvapMc6MNs8P1q1kiqw_oQNLpOJcyN4LJmMopYhoMFsNyKb98oYDuo1rtgvjTwoxmUTL4SjJFINypEPFRmWkLtrMJvmeIUKbz9iBK7WTm3bTfWhVhJZMhA1Akll4eqz7hKmJyNPeWUKlQxrIyf7ufxW5kBy5QP1rvDS9T8Z9xwvENuPjs2PD2LE9gl4d3aJqJGXfnU5dLz8BqUvNjQ0Rn6qyJYCbi4llCfedsHA48IOgMjQagtDLsY57prxsqnkLoPDgczRlOzQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d9ce9aed96cd4ba68fe0de6a08912dcd&_e=4t4NzkRFucY4Qcvg7X0HCF_hi13xJRSjQ3KbIw1oss0qBud9JVFnLvlzrI5eVrvPuDZEwUwctF8VTDkw3sYdcRAumDU02vqYUtdNFoh9Dr6jbMlI5fJI4D1hkSrrrVVemsIxAoDYsOtBxr0l7PZgWSDyvt4m-a-8LP17IvB5uWTQq6Sb3wmRG-zVgXUTIPIbNGwaWVFIlXkBq4WxoRxSnG_KxB4TTscIcXN6iTqT6pI2q_ihCWH9qh2Mr4q4Q7LEICU8pi75ENxfxRL0l9XolZBKslDGz2t-0NQTigMfI4eN-Shz0o9EtKmq--Shug6iYCXCbb7LPG6Tod8yKSQq9OAq9nzb3JRtXEsljCHBf3SwUwz3bay7S1uhgeWGm6NlndSIR5asG4XL-SiIJ87BVQimD3i1q-550Wi-On1NF40bdqNBGflU2TCV6XbwOyLW8chLwXgJJBPuT8xJvHJpwL5aT0xPoyOc-n_KaIFww7eLhmZ1_yZ00Foyku_RJf9kqk6GVg1cTNjsAzC8tKOONA%3D%3D) Women already fought for equality. _Now, our achievements are being erased by men who declare themselves women._ Government is making matters worse. Look how the Biden Administration is altering Title IX rules, for instance. Title IX used to protect against discrimination on the basis of sex -- on the incontrovertible, biological fact that men are men and women are women and both are afforded equal access under the law to government-funded programs. But now, the Biden administration’s proposed Title IX changes will stop schools from enforcing women-only recognitions and spaces. They’ll rob women of opportunities, put them in physical danger, and silence them when they dare to dissent. %%first%%, I’ve gotten used to the left trying to shut me up. **But now they’re trying to erase all women**. I’m not backing down from this fight. I hope you won’t either. On behalf of America’s daughters, [ I hope you will stand with me by donating $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $25 right now!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d9ce9aed96cd4ba68fe0de6a08912dcd&_e=4t4NzkRFucY4Qcvg7X0HCF_hi13xJRSjQ3KbIw1oss0qBud9JVFnLvlzrI5eVrvPuDZEwUwctF8VTDkw3sYdcRAumDU02vqYUtdNFoh9Dr6jbMlI5fJI4D1hkSrrrVVemsIxAoDYsOtBxr0l7PZgWSDyvt4m-a-8LP17IvB5uWTQq6Sb3wmRG-zVgXUTIPIbNGwaWVFIlXkBq4WxoRxSnG_KxB4TTscIcXN6iTqT6pKuTNaX_2FD3ivpx1ua3BaL6I7bqQxlY_jVvapMc6MNs8P1q1kiqw_oQNLpOJcyN4LJmMopYhoMFsNyKb98oYDuo1rtgvjTwoxmUTL4SjJFINypEPFRmWkLtrMJvmeIUKamUMN7GuGRF7X1Mo5HgWwNjJMbhyTTHIcpck4_tfzgjo8Y7xyDNhfOlO3F03ZspijcE9Q-_YLjKJWpbq_gXwnz5kRp9CMfaV36p6BPxm2dkwmdWcQr_6hNxKDDLWKF_7rVPYlxNsbQajmwRQg4CBuahIq8YbAuAJlKOb5evYtykA%3D%3D) At this urgent moment, my Riley Gaines Center Ambassadors and I are working to protect the rights of women and girls against the Biden administration’s Title IX changes. We’re taking on the gender ideology radicals who aim to erase women’s place in this country. Patriotic Americans like you who care about women’s rights -- and the truth -- are rising up to stand with us. [ Please join us with your most generous gift today. ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d9ce9aed96cd4ba68fe0de6a08912dcd&_e=4t4NzkRFucY4Qcvg7X0HCF_hi13xJRSjQ3KbIw1oss0qBud9JVFnLvlzrI5eVrvPuDZEwUwctF8VTDkw3sYdcRAumDU02vqYUtdNFoh9Dr6jbMlI5fJI4D1hkSrrrVVemsIxAoDYsOtBxr0l7PZgWSDyvt4m-a-8LP17IvB5uWTQq6Sb3wmRG-zVgXUTIPIbNGwaWVFIlXkBq4WxoRxSnG_KxB4TTscIcXN6iTqT6pKuTNaX_2FD3ivpx1ua3BaL6I7bqQxlY_jVvapMc6MNs8P1q1kiqw_oQNLpOJcyN4LJmMopYhoMFsNyKb98oYDuo1rtgvjTwoxmUTL4SjJFINypEPFRmWkLtrMJvmeIUKa7T-bNOopjldLt8R9_UMtMRTqh5I5rHDGlZW4K7Acv3QzLY6qAamkUw0wfRwd2jvGYEt34nanDpeI9KxFlNvIH4xO2f9vVK5ZQF_UCqRpfmOqwnKadZ6MKoQSj3_E3qXY978sKfjj9a4Z25L2bnI-olpHUcQpM5cdSAMvIyYbB4A%3D%3D) Together, you and I can stop the left’s attacks, and save women’s place in America’s future. Sincerely, Riley Gaines Director, The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute

Most people sat idly by and allowed this injustice to happen. That’s when I realized that nobody else was going to stand up for me, my teammates, and other women like us. I had to speak out. That’s why I launched the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute. My team of Riley Gaines Center Ambassadors and I are building a movement of students, athletes, and concerned citizens who are fed up with the attack on our freedoms and rights. I’d love to have you join us to defy the dangerous gender ideology that’s spreading rampant throughout society today. Women already fought for equality. Now, our achievements are being erased by men who declare themselves women. Government is making matters worse. Look how the Biden Administration is altering Title IX rules, for instance. Title IX used to protect against discrimination on the basis of sex -- on the incontrovertible, biological fact that men are men and women are women and both are afforded equal access under the law to government-funded programs. But now, the Biden administration’s proposed Title IX changes will stop schools from enforcing women-only recognitions and spaces. They’ll rob women of opportunities, put them in physical danger, and silence them when they dare to dissent. %%first%%, I’ve gotten used to the left trying to shut me up. But now they’re trying to erase all women. I’m not backing down from this fight. I hope you won’t either. On behalf of America’s daughters, At this urgent moment, my Riley Gaines Center Ambassadors and I are working to protect the rights of women and girls against the Biden administration’s Title IX changes. We’re taking on the gender ideology radicals who aim to erase women’s place in this country. Patriotic Americans like you who care about women’s rights -- and the truth -- are rising up to stand with us. Together, you and I can stop the left’s attacks, and save women’s place in America’s future. Sincerely, Riley Gaines Director, The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000

name: John Fabbricatore
subject: Exciting News: Tom Tancredo Endorses Our Campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Fabbricatore for Colorado
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://wrzeyj.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjgzNDExMCxcImxcIjoxMjYyMTc1MTgxMzkzMTE3MDYsXCJyXCI6MTI2MjE3NTIyNzAzNzYyNjA1fSIsInMiOiI4Yjg1YjBkYzA2ZTY5NjFhIn0)
| |
---
| [ ](https://wrzeyj.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjgzNDExMCxcImxcIjoxMjYyMTc1MTgxNDM1MDYwMTMsXCJyXCI6MTI2MjE3NTIyNzAzNzYyNjA1fSIsInMiOiJhZDA1YTRjNmRjMzA2MmU2In0)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, I am thrilled to share some exciting news with all of you. Today, I received a significant endorsement from former Congressman Tom Tancredo for our campaign here in the 6th district.

|
---
| _“As a member of Congress, I was one of the first to highlight the crisis at our Southern border. John Fabbricatore worked tirelessly to secure that border, holding fentanyl dealers and human traffickers accountable. That’s why I am supporting John for Congress. Having seen this crisis first hand, he is prepared to take action and secure the border."__ - _**Tom Tancredo**
---
|
---
As many of you know, Tancredo has been a **steadfast advocate for border security** and immigration reform since entering Congress in 1999. His commitment to protecting the borders and addressing critical issues like drug smuggling and human trafficking has been unwavering. His book, _In Mortal Danger: The Battle for America's Border and Security_ , outlines his deep-rooted beliefs and the urgent need for action to secure our nation. Tom's endorsement of our campaign is not just an honor but a testament to our **shared commitment to securing the border**. Tom and I both understand the urgent need for real solutions to secure our Southern border and protect our communities. We cannot afford to ignore the challenges we face, and I am prepared to take decisive action in Congress to **stop the Biden border crisis**.
|
---
| [ ](https://wrzeyj.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjgzNDExMCxcImxcIjoxMjYyMTc1MTgxNDY2NTE3NDQsXCJyXCI6MTI2MjE3NTIyNzAzNzYyNjA1fSIsInMiOiI0Y2JlMmUxNTA3NjE2MDYxIn0)
---
|
---
Your support has been instrumental in getting us to where we are today, and with Tom's endorsement, I am more confident than ever that together, **we can make a real difference** for the 6th district and for our country. Thank you for standing with us. Let's continue this journey together toward a brighter, safer future for all Americans.
|
---
| | [ **DONATE TODAY** ](https://wrzeyj.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjgzNDExMCxcImxcIjoxMjYyMTc1MTgxNTA4NDYwNDksXCJyXCI6MTI2MjE3NTIyNzAzNzYyNjA1fSIsInMiOiI4OTJjNDYzOWNiY2UyZDlmIn0)
---
|
---
Warm regards,
John Fabbricatore US Congressional GOP Nominee - CO-6
|
---
|
##### John Fabbricatore for Colorado
PO Box 460834Aurora, CO 80046

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friend, I am thrilled to share some exciting news with all of you. Today, I received a significant endorsement from former Congressman Tom Tancredo for our campaign here in the 6th district. | | “As a member of Congress, I was one of the first to highlight the crisis at our Southern border. John Fabbricatore worked tirelessly to secure that border, holding fentanyl dealers and human traffickers accountable. That’s why I am supporting John for Congress. Having seen this crisis first hand, he is prepared to take action and secure the border." - Tom Tancredo | As many of you know, Tancredo has been a steadfast advocate for border security and immigration reform since entering Congress in 1999. His commitment to protecting the borders and addressing critical issues like drug smuggling and human trafficking has been unwavering. His book, In Mortal Danger: The Battle for America's Border and Security_ , outlines his deep-rooted beliefs and the urgent need for action to secure our nation. Tom's endorsement of our campaign is not just an honor but a testament to our shared commitment to securing the border. Tom and I both understand the urgent need for real solutions to secure our Southern border and protect our communities. We cannot afford to ignore the challenges we face, and I am prepared to take decisive action in Congress to stop the Biden border crisis. | | | Your support has been instrumental in getting us to where we are today, and with Tom's endorsement, I am more confident than ever that together, we can make a real difference for the 6th district and for our country. Thank you for standing with us. Let's continue this journey together toward a brighter, safer future for all Americans. | | | | Warm regards, John Fabbricatore US Congressional GOP Nominee - CO-6 | | John Fabbricatore for Colorado PO Box 460834Aurora, CO 80046 | | | | ---|---|--- | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. | | | Paid for by John Fabbricatore for Colorado. #
Derek, it’s a sign of how far we are through the looking glass that last week, the Supreme Court decided that Trump was above the law... and it’s not even in the news anymore.
The Supreme Court bent over backwards to lay the groundwork for a second Trump administration, and if Trump wins it won’t stop there. He will have this far-right MAGA Supreme Court at his beck and call, but he’ll also gain the ability to reshape the federal judiciary for generations to come.
So we’re asking you for $5.
Yep, that might sound a little confusing.
But with your $5, we can stand up to Trump. Because it isn’t just your $5. With luck, you’ll be joined by thousands more. With everyone chipping in together, those $5 donations will add up fast.
We’ll use those donations to run some of the hardest hitting advertisements in politics — ads that can shift narratives, persuade voters, and win elections.
We’ve done it in every corner of the country since we launched nearly 20 years ago. We defeated Trump once. We can do it again.
Are you with us?

body: | | | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=786ae8c8fce2480188849af3e122d453&_e=n5TkD17Luv5e9ZK4735G6RMktY7rZsf0EatbWGT5oTvrb0crGue3K_Gdj_iwOATVVCjohYc2nEU9UZuIOT53nIeic01BiCI5rNHtcYwfM1wo6UlU_U5WK_4T0wh3sI6v_0k4FYXA6RAxnr-K14Pj24ar_Yh_8GqhXnVBGGuBsuvCCInjdRfIsbJdqTs0RR9heTkeCrx5WDv_IYQvZZr5lO87Q_vU8yR1CCvGPFe0msOvm2zXZVLhFMjEdvGQ14Yn0n1RhMznA6MoM9lS5cHG1w%3D%3D) --- Hi, my name is Hung Cao. **I just became the OFFICIAL GOP nominee for U.S. Senate in Virginia, THE battleground race that WILL decide the Senate Majority.** That's why I'm reaching out to you Friend and [asking for your help.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=786ae8c8fce2480188849af3e122d453&_e=n5TkD17Luv5e9ZK4735G6RMktY7rZsf0EatbWGT5oTvrb0crGue3K_Gdj_iwOATVVCjohYc2nEU9UZuIOT53nIeic01BiCI5rNHtcYwfM1wo6UlU_U5WK_4T0wh3sI6vxk0RwqL8Kcs2e7zpKaGe0RKQ12v9wiL6Jql45OBgOmtu2xWSrr43MIWmCQBfk2PMoTbibEFZSdpiQ7lKZTXg1RJPotmALOXXdcUhfhoHhfxveWao5pC5CmhqI9a5_NxnV63qGjidpEz6SEH3bhtTIw%3D%3D) --- [**STAND WITH NAVY CAPTAIN HUNG CAO TODAY**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=786ae8c8fce2480188849af3e122d453&_e=n5TkD17Luv5e9ZK4735G6RMktY7rZsf0EatbWGT5oTvrb0crGue3K_Gdj_iwOATVVCjohYc2nEU9UZuIOT53nIeic01BiCI5rNHtcYwfM1wo6UlU_U5WK_4T0wh3sI6vrAdJExYFhy5np-ctAkxxJ1-HBRbASRsxeG6cJJYOxV_B6uaU5qwkTjI8WiafV5ASbRlMD1LAykInaxsfuizVw__LExPowi5MWa-ypP7svhu-oY5IxEONtQkC95Pu3SIS3VuGLgY1q50DXu5b8ddSiQ%3D%3D) --- Let me tell you a little bit about myself.... I'm a retired Navy CAPT who spent 25 years fighting for our country in some of the most dangerous battlegrounds in the world. My family and I came to America when I was just four years old after my father was put on a kill list in Communist Vietnam. If it wasn't for America, I probably wouldn't be alive today. I owe my life to this country - so I paid her back by attending the Naval Academy after graduating high school and dedicating my career to serving America. I served in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia where I defused IEDs for our SEAL teams and Special Forces. I performed some of the most dangerous dives in the military all around the world. It wasn't easy, and there were many times where my life flashed before my eyes. But it was worth it, because I was protecting this country so the next generation could have the same opportunities that I did. Now that Democrats are trying to destroy that American Dream, I'm not about to sit by idly. Our fight isn't just overseas anymore. It's right here in America, where far-Left liberals in Washington DC are working to erode your freedom and compromise our future. I'm not a career politician. I spent my life serving our country, not serving special interests. _**[But one thing about me is I've always been called to service, and that's why I'm running for U.S. Senate in Virginia.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=786ae8c8fce2480188849af3e122d453&_e=n5TkD17Luv5e9ZK4735G6RMktY7rZsf0EatbWGT5oTvrb0crGue3K_Gdj_iwOATVVCjohYc2nEU9UZuIOT53nIeic01BiCI5rNHtcYwfM1wo6UlU_U5WK_4T0wh3sI6vJjHZaeEzUOCU37kNMdNyjcf0XFJtcQRK3oZ_Jpsyfm5DY8uiXE2-Gcf3e0aM9jvwxHDdo2rcnlEfpDyei5sKA0tJOnZzczzZJ0eclRsG2Nd8mvyYyE-1EG7JTycohA3gKMNzr-NU4-fsRlHZzoeSWQ%3D%3D)**_ --- [**STAND WITH HUNG CAO - TAKE BACK THE SENATE**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=786ae8c8fce2480188849af3e122d453&_e=n5TkD17Luv5e9ZK4735G6RMktY7rZsf0EatbWGT5oTvrb0crGue3K_Gdj_iwOATVVCjohYc2nEU9UZuIOT53nIeic01BiCI5rNHtcYwfM1wo6UlU_U5WK_4T0wh3sI6vu_vZflp_VcIedd7p9TKjztFkB7hDBbALVHa0IaQ0Ok7tAZtgJJdQC-RS477lwGaN8ko6U1X4Aeb3QHXIz0w6vg-nDzSUUi0_RXbU9rmDXi4G0IsjH_3fWHtSOdvisDWXEW2MX6u40ijRfCYinT0ydw%3D%3D) --- NOW let me tell you who I'm up against... Remember when Hillary Clinton ran for President? Well, her hand-picked Vice-Presidential candidate, a professional politician and liberal activist named Tim Kaine is MY OPPONENT. **Tim Kaine has been nothing but a pawn in the Senate for Hillary Clinton and the special interest groups since they lost to President Trump. But, he 's well-funded by the Clinton allies, and he's already coming after me with his campaign war chest.** We all know running a Senate race is EXPENSIVE, and our funds have been significantly depleted from our primary battle. I'm reaching out to you today to humbly ask for your support in rebuilding our war chest for the General Election which is QUICKLY approaching. ****[****Please chip in any support you can, even $10 or $20 to help me take down Hillary's LAST pawn in the Senate, so we can end their liberal agenda, take BACK the Senate, and get our nation back on track.****](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=786ae8c8fce2480188849af3e122d453&_e=n5TkD17Luv5e9ZK4735G6RMktY7rZsf0EatbWGT5oTvrb0crGue3K_Gdj_iwOATVVCjohYc2nEU9UZuIOT53nIeic01BiCI5rNHtcYwfM1wo6UlU_U5WK_4T0wh3sI6vSMFIdJ4GFGsekKNjBKWa-iRyVnWGp1x3PJRJHvmxfN2RFMwU-_LvWQ8POOfAHAEx1lIye6iufCZ2XrHRi87Wheuj0kIXeJXNe4UdqTHgIg8ftg-TS9Qq5tFlp0qLJ_Rilulul0E1eaB2cv8i9tsxxQ%3D%3D)**** --- [**STAND WITH HUNG CAO - FIRE HILLARY'S PAWN**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=786ae8c8fce2480188849af3e122d453&_e=n5TkD17Luv5e9ZK4735G6RMktY7rZsf0EatbWGT5oTvrb0crGue3K_Gdj_iwOATVVCjohYc2nEU9UZuIOT53nIeic01BiCI5rNHtcYwfM1wo6UlU_U5WK_4T0wh3sI6vP3y1z6bE_YmN4EL_a3GSGu27boEIYpRJ5iJNCttt6aRtSQnI--Em0qK1YugI_PA6atbkD08Zp6JmAIc6h2TtRr9td1HeIXBADbqMGEQMUKC5z5_3Eu4fS8j_L7Krg05MRQrDWZTIneyHz-WcHnmggw%3D%3D) --- We have so much riding on this election, and I can't win this battle without support from patriots like you. Please stand with me today and help me restore the America we know and love. Thank you, --- CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA) --- [**SEND A NAVY VETERAN TO THE U.S. SENATE**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=786ae8c8fce2480188849af3e122d453&_e=n5TkD17Luv5e9ZK4735G6RMktY7rZsf0EatbWGT5oTvrb0crGue3K_Gdj_iwOATVVCjohYc2nEU9UZuIOT53nIeic01BiCI5rNHtcYwfM1wo6UlU_U5WK_4T0wh3sI6v--rN4lx1wXW9BYBNADVjWU61EBIGtDJm8yiB37LwtDd_ClpILWhl_CIyH-JO-0bWMm0dnP78KL9OJTcCNfsqEKkQgYpGvAyXJ7wWbmhUtMoJgpIyWg7MxmagSDL_YF_K5ZxAah7u-N18uzRCP1UxHA%3D%3D) name: BobCasey.com
subject: We have to ask
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3488%2E552475%2EGgNlzk)
Peter,
It’s no secret that in this email, we’re going to ask you to donate to our campaign for U.S. Senate. [**So, will you chip in $5 or $10 today to help us out?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240707-2&refcode2=3488_552475_GgNlzk&akid=3488%2E552475%2EGgNlzk)
**[Chip In ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-2?refcode=em20240707-2&recurring=1&refcode2=3488_552475_GgNlzk&akid=3488%2E552475%2EGgNlzk)**
$5 or $10 may not seem like much, but every single donation counts when we have an opponent who is dropping millions of dollars into his campaign**.**
David McCormick and his allies have been ramping up their attacks, whether that’s blasting the airwaves with new TV ads targeting Bob or rallying their MAGA base.
**We need to turn the tables.** We can continue to prove that Bob is the right candidate for Pennsylvania. He is standing up for women, workers, and seniors — guaranteeing their rights are always protected.
Small-dollar donations add up quickly, keeping the playing cards in our hands. [**What do you say, Peter? Will you donate $5 or more to stand up for our campaign and all the rights we’re defending?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240707-2&refcode2=3488_552475_GgNlzk&akid=3488%2E552475%2EGgNlzk)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240707-2-el&refcode2=3488_552475_GgNlzk&akid=3488%2E552475%2EGgNlzk) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240707-2-el&refcode2=3488_552475_GgNlzk&akid=3488%2E552475%2EGgNlzk) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240707-2-el&refcode2=3488_552475_GgNlzk&akid=3488%2E552475%2EGgNlzk) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240707-2-el&refcode2=3488_552475_GgNlzk&akid=3488%2E552475%2EGgNlzk) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240707-2-el&refcode2=3488_552475_GgNlzk&akid=3488%2E552475%2EGgNlzk) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240707-2&refcode2=3488_552475_GgNlzk&akid=3488%2E552475%2EGgNlzk)
---
Thank you for your support.
— Team Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: The COURIER Data Team
subject: We want to hear from you: how do you get your news?
body:
Can you take 90 seconds to let us know how we can make an impact in our communities?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88430155/484071272/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZlZWJlNWEtODIzYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GAhIjsZOE_MwjBK-eWdJg9baj0kXOEa-VXhKnCwW7ZE=&emci=1865ff0e-9b38-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=4feebe5a-823c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Today, we are exactly 4 months from election day.
Donald Trump, an aspiring autocrat with 34 felony convictions (and counting), is at the top of the presidential ticket. The mainstream media still doesn’t know how to cover him honestly, and right-wing media is propping him up.
Meanwhile, local newsrooms around the country are closing their doors, leaving millions of Americans in ‘news deserts’ without access to factual local coverage.
**COURIER is different because we deliver our factual, local journalism directly to the newsfeeds, inboxes and other online spaces where people actually get their news.**
**So, with exactly four months remaining until Election Day, we want to know: how do you get your news? **It's never been more important to have your feedback about where you're getting your news right now.
[**Will you take 90 seconds to complete our News Consumption Survey? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88430157/484071273/-155577778?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZlZWJlNWEtODIzYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GAhIjsZOE_MwjBK-eWdJg9baj0kXOEa-VXhKnCwW7ZE=&emci=1865ff0e-9b38-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=4feebe5a-823c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=14016711)
**[Take our survey ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88430158/484071274/-155577778?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZlZWJlNWEtODIzYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GAhIjsZOE_MwjBK-eWdJg9baj0kXOEa-VXhKnCwW7ZE=&emci=1865ff0e-9b38-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=4feebe5a-823c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=14016711)**
_Your insight will be invaluable to our local newsrooms as they fight back against right-wing disinformation and get factual, original content to those who need it most._
How and where we get our news is constantly changing. With the disappearance of local newsrooms and the spread of misinformation on social media, people are more vulnerable than ever to the conspiracy theories spread by right-wing bad actors.
At COURIER, our eleven battleground newsrooms aim to fill these gaps by serving **free, high-quality journalism** on the issues that matter most.
Our goal is to meet people where they are by understanding how they get their news. Without your input, we can't reach the people who need us most.
[**Understanding how our supporters get their news allows us to better serve the local communities who need our content the most. So we’re asking: will you take our 90-second News Consumption Survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88430160/484071275/-155577778?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZlZWJlNWEtODIzYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GAhIjsZOE_MwjBK-eWdJg9baj0kXOEa-VXhKnCwW7ZE=&emci=1865ff0e-9b38-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=4feebe5a-823c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=14016711)

clean_body: Can you take 90 seconds to let us know how we can make an impact in our communities? Peter, Today, we are exactly 4 months from election day. Donald Trump, an aspiring autocrat with 34 felony convictions (and counting), is at the top of the presidential ticket. The mainstream media still doesn’t know how to cover him honestly, and right-wing media is propping him up. Meanwhile, local newsrooms around the country are closing their doors, leaving millions of Americans in ‘news deserts’ without access to factual local coverage. COURIER is different because we deliver our factual, local journalism directly to the newsfeeds, inboxes and other online spaces where people actually get their news. So, with exactly four months remaining until Election Day, we want to know: how do you get your news? It's never been more important to have your feedback about where you're getting your news right now. Your insight will be invaluable to our local newsrooms as they fight back against right-wing disinformation and get factual, original content to those who need it most. How and where we get our news is constantly changing. With the disappearance of local newsrooms and the spread of misinformation on social media, people are more vulnerable than ever to the conspiracy theories spread by right-wing bad actors. At COURIER, our eleven battleground newsrooms aim to fill these gaps by serving free, high-quality journalism on the issues that matter most. Our goal is to meet people where they are by understanding how they get their news. Without your input, we can't reach the people who need us most. Thanks so much, The Courier Data Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Rusty Hicks
subject: I want to level with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Dear friends — here’s an important reminder:
The only poll that matters is on Election Day.
As Chair of the California Democratic Party (CADEM), I want to be honest with you: It’s been a tough week. I am sure you have felt it too.
Negative headlines and media coverage focused on Democrats right as Donald Trump promotes the idea of military tribunals for his enemies and the courts roll out the red carpet for his criminal immunity.
It’s tough. And it is pretty easy in these moments to agonize. But here at CADEM we are *organizing*.
We are on the ground, on the streets, and in the communities of our most competitive swing districts. We are phone-banking, knocking on doors, talking with voters at events, and so much more.
After all, our founders established a system with checks and balances. So, yes, the race for the White House is extremely important. We can’t downplay that.
But it is also incredibly important for Democrats to retake the House of Representatives, and that can only happen by flipping the ultra-tight swing seats in California.
So, we can’t lose focus. And I am incredibly encouraged by hearing reports from our organizers and staff on the ground. There is amazing energy for flipping seats and ensuring the U.S. House returns to Democratic hands in November.
There are two things we can do right now to ensure our future:
(1) Step up as a volunteer! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GduQMAAT2EaRHVq6PPeFdA2] No matter where you are in the state, we can use your help. Undecided voters are tuned into the election and starting to think about races up and down the ballot. We’d love your help reaching these voters.
VOLUNTEER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GduQMAAT2EaRHVq6PPeFdA2](2) All of our work is funded by $ and $ donations from supporters like you. And the early investments we are making right now will pay huge dividends as we approach Election Day. If you are nervous about the future of our democracy, there has never been a more impactful time to make a contribution. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-july24?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-july24?&refcode=&amount=]

CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-july24?&refcode=&amount=]We all know the stakes. We know what we need to do. Let’s get it done.
Yours,
Rusty
Chair of the California Democratic Party
CADEM Chair Rusty Hicks [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/CADEM_Rusty.png]

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=y8v8dwnB9lvFMcVeTjt%2F3Oblwifg8hIvPX1Vzz5mdMIEj9VISZ%2Flx67BJz0%2BicNqi3W33TLC0rLEyB%2BCAfUPTklBU8xJk81O4eXFrkulBNoWg%2BAGBs4O%2FZlZL7Lt%2BWHVFS7NnqBXejvQWHRCwy8HCtnPlBxZLgNVc3F5jzkHxgC6SwRQwzRPVtxsgh%2BSBqmAnRxtYZcVU%2B8ONG2L%2FBg4rbIo0wXcQabQJq1VpKB1UMf2mYgAStTjTXl1Yw7ftIcvXhX%2FtmnOu7CtpEDjqESdr5j%2BgznPHWtC9iMLGXcjTz1Z2UlJ0NUfj45%2BLxwcKtr3VkW81gB00PO4nMM28nwCag%2BvRW8y3V48yBqIhnj6Fq%2BuamuLFGemk%2FZiBJOgZ9v16pZlwKDduoITOne7QtMBgCD%2BgrJUTkbaUwulVeqAriQ%3D .

Dear Peter,
We are on the brink of a pivotal shift in American politics.
51% of Americans now identify as Independents, forming what could be the largest political group in the country, surpassing both Democrats and Republicans combined.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. isn't just participating in the race; he's leading America's largest de facto political faction. This isn't just another election; it's our election to win!
**Our campaign is gaining momentum every day, driven by a groundswell of support from people like you who are ready for a change.**
[To keep this momentum alive, we need your help.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=51_7_7_24_unopens_non_donor_1&n=3)
Your contribution today is more than a donation; it's an investment in a historic movement. It will fund essential campaign activities, from outreach efforts to securing vital resources, ensuring that we seize this unparalleled opportunity.

name: Simone Archer-Krauss
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88430915/484073648/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzkzNjdjMC04MzNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q2grNbVfA3dtUYPSNlXyOX4km90U_WmW8AA3wCn8mhE=) **50.1%** That was the percentage of the vote Andrea Salinas got here in OR-06 in the last election. Now she’s running for re-election. In the exact same district. Against the exact same opponent. Except this time, we’re up against even more outside money from National Republicans and MAGA super PACs. Look, I don’t like admitting that I agree with the people in charge of those extremist super PACs on anything, friend, but they’re right about this: it’s hard to imagine how either party wins control of Congress without winning OR-06. And as the last election showed, our margin for error is, well, essentially non-existent. Hey Fellow American,

**Sorry, I have one simple question for you.

Are you really on our side?

Let me save some time here. I missed my goal - by a LOT. **

So, it's only reasonable that I'm contacting registered Republicans to confirm that you still support traditional American values.

In the current political landscape, it's hard to predict what plans corrupt Leftist leaders may come up with. We must prepare for their attacks in the upcoming election. **I won 't stand for the Dem's dirty tricks.**

My friend, failing to meet deadlines not only reflects poorly on me but also damages the entire conservative movement. This only gives the Left more confidence to outspend, outpace, and ultimately defeat us in November.

This shocking, destructive decision that Donald Trump **will have immunity for official acts** validates the former president’s attempts to undermine our democracy.
It flies in the face of our founding principles that no one, not even the president, is above the law.
If our leaders can be immune from liability for criminal acts like overturning the outcome of an election, it may be the end of our republic.

This isn’t the first time Trump has shown his true colors. From his history of anti-Black remarks to his own alignment with white supremacists, it’s even more clear that Trump does not care about Black Americans _or_ Black equity.

And while the Biden-Harris administration is creating economic and job opportunities for Black Americans that reverse historic injustices, Trump’s racist and divisive vision of America will only damage our communities.

**[We need to do whatever we can to keep Trump as far from the White House as possible, Peter — the future of Black America and our democracy depends on it. body:
An Update.An Update.

Friend,

Here is how this has played out over the past few months.

****First,**** the leftist establishment and the 'Folks out East' tried to bribe me to stay out of this race because they know I'm unapologetically America First.

****Then,**** a kangaroo court in New York City convicted President Trump in a bogus GUILTY verdict in a far-fetched attempt to intimidate and STOP the momentum we've been gaining this year.

****Now,**** Ruben Gallego is launching a multi-million dollar ad blitz against the America First movement here in Arizona with the help of the Clinton and Soros families.

**[They're trying to end this race before Election Day, and we've got to fight back. I NEED YOUR HELP, AND I NEED YOUR DONATION!](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=354be5719ac744c19ed569971ab2a9cf&_e=fN7di7PD3PJpy8l9yyFyNDaIlOUUZ2owyRAr1D0oLWhjzyBzUFU03QYt15BGptvO5INHdvm46q4J8_go_6wTztt4NkcnrO_tMkYhD5DJd5pGmQ2d_nztT-EJJZcoQuvDTId3aaFb3FYtlEKGoOdGCcCOl8OYC9Q-qVVgX1lm5h1rLWTj-WMrGn83vWMJdzW-0os9KWMdiLalO17Rntqd0_vvAMWUQC1aS-qYThlI7n5T1OPHusCCvk5zKnFU69mk-IHTD_jNOzh4qIZJQ7RRx4SuVvDMyzBN7stTGwO4mu-mExp4X4WQW2HNg6GkhBc7YkRcca835DjLAF91SIONF8ZkKv3lMjbVFjiK9bMozytvn4eol4DFpEiCFPcbhhqq7AvrRPTA9vonAXF1Oj-_Cw%3D%3D)**

Ruben Gallego is just as woke as the rest of Joe Biden's puppets; if he gets sent to the Senate, he owes plenty of favors to his handlers and will sell US OUT in a heartbeat.

Ruben Gallego might be a wack-job radical, but that doesn't change the fact that he's well-funded. He has millions of dollars backing him and plenty of woke millionaires lining up to donate to his campaign.

**They will do anything to stop us and the America First movement. In New York, they convicted Trump, and here in Arizona, they'll use their millions of dollars to paint** _YOU_** and **_ME_** as villains.**

****If there's ANYTHING you can contribute — I'm humbly asking for your support.****

Folks, 60 House Republicans firmly declare that what Donald Trump caused on January 6 was not an insurrection.

_These are the people that are in the Majority! They're supposed to be helping President Biden pass important legislation._

But instead they're defending the leader of their sick cult, Donald Trump...

**We can't trust them to fight for our healthcare, public schools, or common sense gun reform. And we sure as hell can't trust them to defend our democracy.**

But Democrats are just THREE seats away from flipping the House and delivering a Majority that President Biden, and the rest of the country, can count on.

We can't trust them to fight for our healthcare, public schools, or common sense gun reform. And we sure as hell can't trust them to defend our democracy. [**But in order to build the pro-democracy majority that Americans deserve, we have to protect frontline seats like Nikki’s. name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: 5 lies about Israel
body:
Do you remember how you felt when you saw the news about the horrific attacks against Israel on October 7, 2023?
Fellow Patriot, Do you remember how you
| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=d8f9fb36ed1e4bcf941f5ff23e794148&_t=2HaOk6G7HfQp8AU0afXfBVEjdiupREKJJ7FofQqekQbJOQKxq6BhCWj0Z8iike5gZkuBk7jR2Q_CYks3YA_JVttvqArPuaQjxd_soJmx5SLmNQcHHQzxWusrLj3GGAqn)_

| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d8f9fb36ed1e4bcf941f5ff23e794148&_e=n0i8C-_22d1uDNWe51qp5eLpIRZyYE6IY0u3HjBUn09d8kEkqN0mBDhN_GIJjYMTq03ASFj4-NJQ3dAZJcRqMl0_IilAOpdl-H6X3kv-eEn9FGUSZEQLF4EJbxQ2PL43VSr5Bo0m5ANAAemL80ei_L6ePVR0M3UW2TCxFoK4cqcbpyupToBRFaAQ2uJWFjz3mboU0PYKz8GcITBTyVomPTsAr3oHZhLgW-qIsrps4w4geFu3NFnYTAm8XiAicRwNIw095tCcPnjoBrOxihAvhHjo8kfATVLx_Ik-8OSJnzM49IPxs-lweBt2TBN5l27XWcAgnOxN2MPqKm0j5Yx9U_2jJpViebcnT1W8g2lZ-1qeHSZbpn2I9P4jXKxdpy4G)
Fellow Patriot,

Do you remember how you felt when you saw the news about the horrific attacks against Israel on October 7, 2023?

The 3,000 rockets fired...

The Jihadist paragliders breaching the Israeli border to attack innocent civilians...

It still makes me sick to think about what these innocent people went through, especially the women and children.

This was radical Jihad terrorism--plain and simple. You would think that this would be something we could all agree is evil, no matter our political party.

But since that day, the pro-Hamas Left has instead chosen to ramp up its anti-Israel hatred. They are even shutting down our colleges and universities!

They've blockaded our bridges and roads to push their dangerous agenda. They've spread misinformation about Israel online and throughout our society. And these radical agitators have infiltrated university campuses across America to mislead students and paint our closest ally as evil.

It's revolting.

At times like these, it's critical that we combat such lies with facts, and that's why I'm reaching out to you today.

Young America's Foundation just launched a new eBook called _The Five Myths About Israel Perpetrated by the Pro-Hamas Left_ , and I want to make sure you get your free copy.

This book is written by best-selling author and YAF speaker **Robert Spencer** , and inside, he shares 5 of the most common myths currently being spread about Israel. But he doesn't stop there. Mr. Spencer provides a detailed and historical analysis of each of the myths to expose the lies of the pro-Hamas left.

You can get your free copy of this timely and important eBook using this secure link: **[https://yaf.org/offers/the-five-myths-about-israel-ebook/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d8f9fb36ed1e4bcf941f5ff23e794148&_e=n0i8C-_22d1uDNWe51qp5eLpIRZyYE6IY0u3HjBUn09d8kEkqN0mBDhN_GIJjYMTq03ASFj4-NJQ3dAZJcRqMl0_IilAOpdl-H6X3kv-eEn9FGUSZEQLF4EJbxQ2PL43VSr5Bo0m5ANAAemL80ei_L6ePVR0M3UW2TCxFoK4cqcbpyupToBRFaAQ2uJWFjz3mboU0PYKz8GcITBTyVomPTsAr3oHZhLgW-qIsrps4w4eRGactkrkxlKcvJMuQ_uh-xTBtHXgrVKuziA62EhKQ5y-uH7f3KL26lL5gt7allbcmGTeEZqqs8SENXRfYyTRCb4uRkDOcx0WfvMJdukehCgd4R7AWUEOtrlLoFDQ3lo9nU9R5g0uYj6qaSS-ImNU)**

As pro-Hamas riots continue to intensify on college campuses, we must ensure that young people are armed with the facts. Young people are learning the dangers of Hamas and the radical Left through Young America's Foundation's enlightening resources like this eBook.

You can use this link to **[get instant access to your free eBook right now.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d8f9fb36ed1e4bcf941f5ff23e794148&_e=n0i8C-_22d1uDNWe51qp5eLpIRZyYE6IY0u3HjBUn09d8kEkqN0mBDhN_GIJjYMTq03ASFj4-NJQ3dAZJcRqMl0_IilAOpdl-H6X3kv-eEn9FGUSZEQLF4EJbxQ2PL43VSr5Bo0m5ANAAemL80ei_L6ePVR0M3UW2TCxFoK4cqcbpyupToBRFaAQ2uJWFjz3mboU0PYKz8GcITBTyVomPTsAr3oHZhLgW-qIsrps4w7UVY6r6HDs3b918yexPyhD8sU-LMAkFjVpdXcko6u6Eb_WTbyOFGWJz_4Vss1bB2RWmkh7MH0cM10MmlaIm3TxcyWdBHTFH9EaL30pPmLxhXl6mCMGzo0HpDZgk3znQTSgBvYOO93SiwElUQfjhvYX)**

Sincerely,

Governor Scott Walker
**President, Young America 's Foundation**

| | When I was 21, I became pregnant. But I learned that with my aortic aneurysm, it would be impossible to carry the pregnancy to term. **So, I had an abortion.** I share my story because it’s not a secret, and it’s not shameful. I want the millions of people who’ve made the decision to seek abortion care to know they’re not alone. My right to make the best decision for my health and future was protected by _Roe v. Wade._ Now, people in Tennessee and other GOP-controlled states are being denied that choice. It’s abhorrent. The right to make our own reproductive health care decisions is fundamental. We cannot be equal if we don’t have control over our own bodies. The GOP wants to turn back the clock on every bit of progress generations have fought for, taking us back to a time before abortion was safe and legal. I’ve listened to folks all over Tennessee, and here’s what I know: People want our communities to be safer, with access to birth control, IVF, and, yes, abortion. **I’m running for U.S. Senate from Tennessee because we need more champions for abortion rights in Washington.** And when I get there, I won’t hesitate to use every power available to demand a restoration of our reproductive freedoms at the federal level. We have to secure our rights and prevent radicals like Marsha Blackburn from enacting a national ban. **[I’m asking you to split a small grassroots donation — just $5 or $10 — between Lisa Blunt Rochester and my campaign to help me fight for reproductive rights as Tennessee’s next Senator. clean_body: You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, To unsubscribe, | | When I was 21, I became pregnant. But I learned that with my aortic aneurysm, it would be impossible to carry the pregnancy to term. So, I had an abortion. I share my story because it’s not a secret, and it’s not shameful. I want the millions of people who’ve made the decision to seek abortion care to know they’re not alone. My right to make the best decision for my health and future was protected by Roe v. Wade. Now, people in Tennessee and other GOP-controlled states are being denied that choice. It’s abhorrent. The right to make our own reproductive health care decisions is fundamental. We cannot be equal if we don’t have control over our own bodies. The GOP wants to turn back the clock on every bit of progress generations have fought for, taking us back to a time before abortion was safe and legal. I’ve listened to folks all over Tennessee, and here’s what I know: People want our communities to be safer, with access to birth control, IVF, and, yes, abortion. I’m running for U.S. Senate from Tennessee because we need more champions for abortion rights in Washington. And when I get there, I won’t hesitate to use every power available to demand a restoration of our reproductive freedoms at the federal level. We have to secure our rights and prevent radicals like Marsha Blackburn from enacting a national ban. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Gloria Johnson and Lisa Blunt Rochester: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = With you, Gloria Johnson = | = In 2022, Mitch McConnell's personally-aligned Super PAC spent a record-breaking $205 million on Senate Races. body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Header.png]
With just 30 days left until August 6th, our first step towards winning back Northern Michigan and the UP for hardworking families this November is urgent. Our goal is clear: let's win this election!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad]
Whether $3, $13, $30, or $130, every dollar helps us defeat Bergman, Trump, and junk like Project 2025.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=express_lane_3]
DONATE $13 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad?express_lane=true&amount=13&refcode=express_lane_13]
DONATE $30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad?express_lane=true&amount=30&refcode=express_lane_30]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad]
Batteries for Bubbles
Friends,
This primary election is critical. For the past three years, I have been campaigning hard, working to earn your support for another shot at defeating MAGA extremist, Trump-endorsed Jack Bergman.
Bergman has never faced a second-time challenger, and we have the best opportunity to win!
I'm thrilled to report that we're making significant strides and have a clear path to victory. However, we need to make up for the holiday lull in fundraising.
This weekend, we learned that campaigning on a shoestring budget sometimes involves candidates scrambling minutes before the parade to find AA batteries for bubble shooters, spending hours sticking hundreds of wires in yard signs, or ensuring every kid gets a slap bracelet.
But it doesn't stop there. Your contributions go toward our massive outreach program — getting ads out, phone banking, hosting postcard-writing parties, and connecting with voters at thousands of doors.
Join our fight for reproductive rights, family-sustaining wages, an economic system that works for everyone, affordable housing, childcare, education, environmental sustainability, and universal healthcare.
No one will work harder to earn votes. No one will out-organize us or outwork us.
Friends, thank you for your continued support, loyalty, and generosity. For families, freedoms, and futures, we're in this to win this.
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
JOIN OUR FIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
Paid for by Friends of Dr. Bob

CNN named Providence **number two** on their list of America’s best towns to visit!

They were looking for places with a “wow factor.” Rhode Islanders know that our state is full of hidden gems, beautiful waterfronts, and special people. Now the country does too.

But obviously no one knows Rhode Island like the awesome people who live here. So we want to hear from you! _She was saying this about Ron DeSantis authorizing the DEATH PENALTY for those who abuse minors!_

subject: The extreme MAGA Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Each decision is eroding our fabric as a nation

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88435042/484089104/2145040083?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240707_ya_scotus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzY3YzY4Zi05MjNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4hxoqB6T456RaiTxCSGyDgPj0S1y73SU1BKBOO_QJU=)
---
Peter, like many of you I'm reeling with the Supreme Court's recent decisions which most recently involve giving blanket immunity to the President of the United States. The Supreme Court ruled along ideological lines that President Trump is immune from criminal wrongdoing while in his official capacity as President. Let me be clear: nobody is above the law and this ruling again sets a dangerous, extreme precedent. As we celebrate our independence, we must recognize that our democracy is what's at stake with this election. **To protect it, we must defeat MAGA extremism.** Elections matter — just look at how Trump's justices have upended years of precedent, endangering women, democracy, and a whole lot more. [_**That's why I'm asking for your help, Peter. Could you please contribute $30 or more to support our campaign to root out MAGA clean_body: Each decision is eroding our fabric as a nation | | = Peter, like many of you I'm reeling with the Supreme Court's recent decisions which most recently involve giving blanket immunity to the President of the United States. The Supreme Court ruled along ideological lines that President Trump is immune from criminal wrongdoing while in his official capacity as President. Let me be clear: nobody is above the law and this ruling again sets a dangerous, extreme precedent. As we celebrate our independence, we must recognize that our democracy is what's at stake with this election. To protect it, we must defeat MAGA extremism. Elections matter — just look at how Trump's justices have upended years of precedent, endangering women, democracy, and a whole lot more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Our election is less than a month away and we're firing on all cylinders here at HQ. name: Sen. Chuck Schumer
subject: Friend, this could end Rick Scott's Senate career

body:
there's something I need you to understand:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88435588/484091006/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1479-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzcxNTcwZDEtOTMzYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uXqLS7EXZboqwH8sfbFRKeWpz-Np0xFBdDBa1NlJzxI=)
Hi, friend. Chuck Schumer here, and there's something I need you to understand: **This November, not only is our one-seat Senate majority at stake — but so is the future of reproductive rights nationwide.**
I know Florida's already facing the sobering reality of extreme limits on abortion, and it'll only get worse now that DeSantis' six-week ban is in effect.
That's why I'm _thrilled_ Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running to defeat Rick Scott and his massive personal fortune. **But I just got word from DMP HQ that they’re 11% behind on their weekly $1 million goal.**
**With so much on the line, I can't sit and watch as Scott's expensive ads threaten her chances. So I've got to ask: [Will you chip in $5 by midnight to help her close the shortfall and stay on track to kick out Rick?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88435591/484091009/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1479-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzcxNTcwZDEtOTMzYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uXqLS7EXZboqwH8sfbFRKeWpz-Np0xFBdDBa1NlJzxI=)**

---
Between Democrats defending what experts call the "Senate map from hell" and Floridians bracing for a heartless crackdown on personal freedoms leveled by some of the most extreme far-right leaders in the nation, I understand if it seems like all hope is lost.
**But believe me, friend — it couldn't be further from the case.**
See, this November, Florida has an incredible opportunity to turn the tides: **Both an initiative to enshrine the right to abortion in the state constitution _and_ a competitor to retire Rick Scott will be on the ballot.**
If enough Floridians come out to demand the GOP stands down, not only would it reinstate reproductive health care access across the Sunshine State .._. **it could also be what ends Rick Scott's Senate career.**_
**And if that happens, we might just be able to keep the Senate blue ... and _finally_ get federal protections for abortion across the finish line. **
But the _only_ way we do that is if Debbie Mucarsel-Powell has your support ahead of major deadlines like the one tonight —**[so please friend, will you donate $5, $25, or anything right now to help her reach her $1 million goal, beat her anti-choice opponent, and save our Senate majority and reproductive rights with it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88435596/484091014/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1479-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzcxNTcwZDEtOTMzYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uXqLS7EXZboqwH8sfbFRKeWpz-Np0xFBdDBa1NlJzxI=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88435598/484091017/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1479-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzcxNTcwZDEtOTMzYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uXqLS7EXZboqwH8sfbFRKeWpz-Np0xFBdDBa1NlJzxI=)

Chuck Schumer
_Senate Majority Leader_

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Fellow Conservative: Democrats want our borders to be overrun with _**illegal immigrants**_ so they can _**vote in our elections**_. This is no secret. Thankfully, these conservatives in the Senate are fighting to pass the SAVE Act, which would require states to (1) verify citizenship for federal elections and (2) purge non-citizens from their voter rolls. **▶︎ Mike Lee **(R-UT) **▶︎ J.D. Vance** (R-OH) **▶︎ Tommy Tuberville** (R-AL) **▶︎ Eric Schmitt** (R-MO)
**▶︎ Ted Cruz** (R-TX) **▶︎ Rick Scott** (R-FL) **▶︎ Josh Hawley** (R-MO) **▶︎ Ron Johnson** (R-WI) Estimates suggest there are nearly 30 million non-citizens in this country, posing a significant threat to our democracy. The SAVE Act is our last chance to protect our elections. **Your support is crucial to this effort.** You can help provide the resources needed to counter opposition and enact this essential legislation. **[These courageous conservatives need your urgent support, so please rush a split contribution to them right now.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0380edf01d934bd3ba31c78cb1b8640a&_e=3s1YAOlwoZm_hE_vgUyCppcaJ-xh1QBVny81UbwCtQrp4Hi0BjI6R5OxrgMi3j7CFbzSTDemTIpnt7j0hptWAHqLHbL3iDK4m33H45mIhhm2GcrbjvGjRCY8ndxD_AcOKKuR3EQ2HMAQ8u-Rqe9o1RruJwV84gKhd2PBJQSo8UCxRCnMjeWY5kldTiPKBVRiCq9FA4MOhQp7pb_iD9kL4ewv0fGQ_l3iZU4qDtXa9SJuZv7MH9xpRul5nuQnOJy9sJSV5MSGQrR9XuKH5Qu94A%3D%3D)** Senate Conservatives Fund will transfer 100% of your contributions directly to their committees.

clean_body: Your support is crucial to this effort. | | | | Fellow Conservative: Democrats want our borders to be overrun with illegal immigrants so they can vote in our elections. This is no secret. Thankfully, these conservatives in the Senate are fighting to pass the SAVE Act, which would require states to (1) verify citizenship for federal elections and (2) purge non-citizens from their voter rolls. ▶︎ Mike Lee (R-UT) ▶︎ J.D. Vance (R-OH) ▶︎ Tommy Tuberville (R-AL) ▶︎ Eric Schmitt (R-MO) ▶︎ Ted Cruz (R-TX) ▶︎ Rick Scott (R-FL) ▶︎ Josh Hawley (R-MO) ▶︎ Ron Johnson (R-WI) Estimates suggest there are nearly 30 million non-citizens in this country, posing a significant threat to our democracy. The SAVE Act is our last chance to protect our elections. Your support is crucial to this effort. You can help provide the resources needed to counter opposition and enact this essential legislation. Senate Conservatives Fund will transfer 100% of your contributions directly to their committees. Requiring an ID to vote is not a radical idea. In fact, it's standard practice for many everyday activities: ✅ Bank ✅ Airport ✅ Doctor ✅ Pharmacy ✅ School ✅ Gun Store ✅ Hunting ✅ Fishing ✅ Daycare ✅ Hospital ✅ Bar ✅ Workplace ❌ Voting They're fighting for YOU, they're fighting for our Democracy, and they're fighting to prevent non-citizens from dictating our elections. The SAVE Act should have unanimous support, but we know the liberals will oppose it. And that's why we must take action now. Thank you for supporting the leaders who defend our freedoms in Washington. They could not do this important work without your generous support. Sincerely, Matt Hoskins Senate Conservatives Fund P.S. Please sponsor these Senate Conservatives with recurring contributions that give them sustaining support! | END OF THE MONTH COUNTDOWN | | Senate Conservatives Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 Text SENATE to (877) 838-9388 to receive exclusive updates and invitations. | Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. | PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Mark
subject: 💥 Your Voice Can Make an Impact NOW!
body:
Speak up and achieve powerful results! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c7179a930a&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=742f618acf&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
WE HAVE A SOCIAL MEDIA ARMY!
WE NEED MORE SOCIAL MEDIA SOLDIERS!
SIGN-UP TODAY!**

---
|
GFI is helping to build a social media powerhouse espousing self-governance in Ohio. We are building a world-class, social media team who develop messaging and messages, post original content developed by the team, and amplify, through sharing, the "reach" of our messages. This is becoming a well-organized, well-managed, team of volunteers working to get out our messages of freedom, small government, self-responsibility, sanctity of life, and constitutional order, to name a few.

To join our team, please go [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d2ab5fc67d&e=5c740fa3e2) (or click on the image below) and fill out the quick survey. Someone will be back to you soon!

THANK YOU!
######
---
|
---
|
---
|

---
| |

**CRITICAL NEEDS:
RADIO CALL-IN VOLUNTEERS!
LETTERS TO EDITOR VOLUNTEERS!**

_**"Everybody Should be Doing Something!
Nobody Should be Doing Nothing!"**_

---
|
[RADIO CALLERS "BUREAU"](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f63a8df33a&e=5c740fa3e2) -and- [LETTERS TO EDITOR & OPED WRITERS "BUREAU"](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3d9fce7784&e=5c740fa3e2)

We're developing two statewide working groups to use the legacy media to our advantage. We're looking for volunteers who can (and will) write & speak (call-in radio). The writing will be letters to the editor and opinion pieces ("Op-Ed"). The speaking will be calling into talk radio shows. This is a statewide effort we're already building-out across Ohio.

We're going to work on crafting consistent messaging across the state, so this will be a team effort - you won't be on your own! If you'd like to explore this volunteer opportunity, please fill out one (or both?) of the forms linked below. Thank you!

[**RADIO CALLERS "BUREAU" SIGN-UP**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=27ace17e0a&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**LETTERS TO EDITOR & OPED WRITERS "BUREAU" SIGN-UP**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6f077e5396&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9aea06f6d8&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|

---
|
---
| |
**KEEP AMERICA FOR AMERICANS!
CHINA'S SILENT WAR ON AMERICA!
WEEK 7 • LESSON 7**

---
|
In May we sent out a one-time special message about a new initiative called "[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f0d0094df9&e=5c740fa3e2)" designed to wake up more Ohioans to the threat China poses to our communities, state, and nation. If you haven't seen that message, you can access a copy of it on the web [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8e03e0a639&e=5c740fa3e2).

Part of this initiative is an Ohio-developed, 10-week "course" titled “**China’s Silent War on America** ”. A lesson will be released every week for 10 weeks. To remind you, we'll highlight new lessons in this email. Last week we highlighted **[Lesson 6](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=caa0336879&e=5c740fa3e2).** This week, we're highlighting **Lesson 7:[China’s Green Energy Policies Aren’t Green for America’s Environment or Economy](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=dff0f85678&e=5c740fa3e2).**

[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=510709148d&e=5c740fa3e2) will provide a short lesson, one a week for ten weeks, to educate us on the many strategies China is using to undermine America’s power at home and abroad, while enriching its own homeland. The reader will also be guided towards action items to help reduce China’s influence in the state of Ohio.

Click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=81a1d6e810&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below to access [**Lesson 7**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=09811f3b03&e=5c740fa3e2) of “**China’s Silent War on America** ” called **"China’s Green Energy Policies Aren’t Green for America’s Environment or Economy** ".

_Next week's lesson, Lesson 8, will be the fifth of 6 lessons providing examples of China’s United Front's work in America and show how each of these initiatives undermines America’s national security._

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0235699c41&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|

---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
| June 30, 2024 - [🌭 Sausage Making: ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8885eec018&e=5c740fa3e2 "🌭 Sausage Making: Political Science in Disguise?")Political[ Science in Disguise?](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ea6d0b1b95&e=5c740fa3e2 "🌭 Sausage Making: Political Science in Disguise?")

[June 23, 2024 - 🆘 Immediate Attention Required: Resist Forced Masking](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f92a7ccb90&e=5c740fa3e2)

[June 16, 2024 - ⚠️ CRITICAL: ELECTION INTEGRITY IS AT STAKE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=18f9f1292c&e=5c740fa3e2)

[June 9, 2024 - 💪 Ready for a property tax relief?](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6fcf0937e4&e=5c740fa3e2)

[June 2, 2024 - 😫 Tired of the Same Old Faces in DC?](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=adf3c5050d&e=5c740fa3e2)

[May 26, 2024 - ⏰ Crucial Info Awaits You This Week](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=94a3682749&e=5c740fa3e2)

[May 19, 2024 - 📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=18556bfa75&e=5c740fa3e2 "📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!")

[April 28, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d5dfcd9a4c&e=5c740fa3e2)[👥 ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7f70e8b473&e=5c740fa3e2 "👥 Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!")[Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4b8b5fda32&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 21, 2024 - 📣 Breaking: Election Integrity Lawsuit](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=521b8bff52&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a3613782c2&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|

**Mark Pukita

name: Colorado Elections Update
subject: The work begins now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Hello — The primary election officially wrapped up in Colorado. Here are the toplines:
1. Coloradans **voted against** two election-denying candidates — including one endorsed by Donald Trump.
2. **Lauren Boebert won** her primary election. We have work to do to continue standing up against extremism.
3. An anti-abortion extremist is officially facing Yadira Caraveo in CO-08. **This seat could decide the House majority.**
