name: Bob Casey
subject: Peter, I need your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Back-to-back polls show this race is tightening.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3489%2E552475%2Ev0i2IK)
Peter -- in a minute, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign, but first I wanted to explain why your donation matters right now.
**First,** a billionaire-funded super PAC raised a record-breaking $18 million last year, including a massive $10 million donation from just _one_ guy.
**Then,** that same super PAC started blanketing Pennsylvania’s airwaves with ads to prop up my opponent and flip this seat red.
**Now,** back-to-back polls show this race is tightening.
With Senate control hinging on this seat, we can’t afford to fall behind my Trump-endorsed opponent. But if the polls continue trending this way, that‘s exactly what could happen.
[**That’s why your support matters so much. Whatever you can give will help us stop these Wall Street billionaires from buying this seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240707-3?refcode=em20240707-3&recurring=1&refcode2=3489_552475_v0i2IK&akid=3489%2E552475%2Ev0i2IK)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._

Bob Casey

name: Doug Burgum
subject: An absolute travesty of justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Utterly shameful| | | Peter, The guilty verdict against President Donald J. Trump was an absolute travesty of justice.
* **[**The judge was a Biden donor**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=315fd569e56f49b5a65f80502fe59c6f&_e=AK400vU2rE-AniN9SCsf75kqAMTbdasb-nu9Jxqx1k5bZbcO6TzM-9efJeqNaIEWIklE-kSmzQ-B9oXymFoFev6pHbr_CkJBw-Ag-jiYF17ENKFrWcVASpjH6gXtQWQhatwb5iXho7hLYPmMSOH6m_1YCiibbn5FfGneZEILYERJmiTk45wRLgimrGUd-sHsoQVvUPMEGFtqCcGhvK8zKzFiqLsUz4t5XxM7jTqhEiAL_oZ-EFN_9KBNIXbi-06-tMPoO_I7C0UhUI_CzVILJ4BAKPqIFXxAt9kstQ43WhZ60jQjh-Z6vJ2DXRHBxyEvQ-U1yUpSaV2ZQa6vtGAgnl9gA9FFZ0RII2RyfPaKQAEjcUId1uEnQGQNNiGNJRJM1ZbHBU26bfiWtwtx4KLBqKljhiNkdRSKUvZhCUHQ4Nhb0pqn2qkT6nJa3d9Oib0O1qBzFBNcOkSeCdkXV44Ux5I7HLvK1eD8WgOAkQ6wQZpIgqk1CCXayP2md8G8b14ZdQkUuox1zMzw9iAQ8KP3LA%3D%3D)**

* **[**The prosecutors were Biden allies**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=315fd569e56f49b5a65f80502fe59c6f&_e=AK400vU2rE-AniN9SCsf75kqAMTbdasb-nu9Jxqx1k5bZbcO6TzM-9efJeqNaIEWIklE-kSmzQ-B9oXymFoFev6pHbr_CkJBw-Ag-jiYF17ENKFrWcVASpjH6gXtQWQhatwb5iXho7hLYPmMSOH6m_1YCiibbn5FfGneZEILYERJmiTk45wRLgimrGUd-sHsoQVvUPMEGFtqCcGhvK8zKzFiqLsUz4t5XxM7jTqhEiAL_oZ-EFN_9KBNIXbi-06-tMPoO_I7C0UhUI_CzVILJ4BAKPqIFXxAt9kstQ43WhZ60jQjh-Z6vJ2DXRHBxyEvQ-U1yUpSaV2ZQa6vtGAgnl9gA9FFZ0RII2RyfPaKQAEjcUId1uEnQGQNNiGNJRJMK7NadsNr99lukzmHFzVAnwZRG3Oyeg-stqSzjzlrpsE2otbZUz6RXENRRGCIJNZr6yJ7NsUGQFLk1AR6KZfUu2n18NXYJGXSyG_uIflYLDfJbLQ1kZ1XYdlBBpkDaTHWtxv1cYY5GL5hbzURnJxfHg%3D%3D)**

* **[**The criminal charges were completely bogus from the very start**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=315fd569e56f49b5a65f80502fe59c6f&_e=AK400vU2rE-AniN9SCsf75kqAMTbdasb-nu9Jxqx1k5bZbcO6TzM-9efJeqNaIEWIklE-kSmzQ-B9oXymFoFev6pHbr_CkJBw-Ag-jiYF17ENKFrWcVASpjH6gXtQWQhatwb5iXho7hLYPmMSOH6m_1YCiibbn5FfGneZEILYERJmiTk45wRLgimrGUd-sHsoQVvUPMEGFtqCcGhvK8zKzFiqLsUz4t5XxM7jTqhEiAL_oZ-EFN_9KBNIXbi-06-tMPoO_I7C0UhUI_CzVILJ4BAKPqIFXxAt9kstQ43WhZ60jQjh-Z6vJ2DXRHBxyEvQ-U1yUpSaV2ZQa6vtGAgnl9gA9FFZ0RII2RyfPaKQAEjcUId1uEnQGQNNiGNJRJMhEx8GU7YHCBaf2iPHjWBvyRXecYhFHosZdv8c6wMM_-z_5O7cqIvzmr6zaRYOHtpXi2oK9KkXzBkqCVw3_vwircqo6gEzZWI0TR7FK6G2UW8SKfk9DHQYcgLlIggeEqg-g2ETrruaiOfWe6CmCV8Jg%3D%3D)**

_The American people will have their say on November 5th and_ _they will overwhelmingly send President Trump back to the White House._ **[President Trump and Senate Republicans are fighting for you, Peter, and they will never surrender. name: Replace Biden? via Our Revolution
subject: Biden is considering his options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1011?refcode=email-20240707_v&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, the
Democratic Party has created the electoral mess we’re in with Joe Biden.
But if we want to avoid another Trump presidency, it’s up to us.

When Our Revolution formed out of the Bernie 2016 campaign, we knew
organizing to change the Democratic Party would not be easy. Now,
Democrats are scrambling to figure out what to do next. DNC leadership is
ignoring real concerns with Biden while some elected Democrats in Congress
are calling for a serious conversation about who the nominee should be.

Even Nancy Pelosi expressed concerns about Biden’s debate performance! And
some of Biden’s DNC delegates are considering the possibility that he’s
not the right nominee.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18574?t=1060&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ][IMG]

After Biden’s rough debate performance and the Supreme Court’s extreme
right-wing ruling handing “absolute immunity” to the American presidency,
there is a serious threat of Trump becoming a Dictator on Day 1.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20240707_v_nd&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Can you chip in to help us organize in battleground states to stop a
second Trump term? We will be calling and texting voters in every swing
state, knocking on doors, and mobilizing our progressive movement to
protect democracy and defeat Trump.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20240707_v_nd&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20240707_v_nd&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240707_v_nd&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20240707_v_nd&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20240707_v_nd&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20240707_v_nd&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

We cannot let this moment, and the Democratic Party’s scrambling, distract
us from the ultimate goal these next few months — and that’s keeping
Donald Trump out of the White House.

The reality is, whether Joe Biden is the Democratic candidate or not is
primarily up to Joe Biden. But the reality of whether Donald Trump is the
next President is up to our organizing, our strategy, our Get Out The Vote
operation, and our entire progressive movement.

And we’re having a major impact on this conversation. When Politico
reported on our post-debate survey and that 67% of our respondents want to
see Joe Biden step aside, the Democratic Party saw that. The Party knows
their coalition to win in November is shaky and that the Progressive vote
is crucial.

We need to ramp up our organizing right now, and we need our grassroots
donors to pitch in today. The summer months are notoriously difficult for
fundraising, but it’s the time we’ll need your small-dollar contributions
the most as we prepare for November.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20240707_v_nd&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Can you chip in to our Swing State Fund right now to help defeat Trump?
For every $1 donated, we can call and text a voter in Wisconsin, Michigan,
Pennsylvania, or another swing state five times.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1007&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=6316%2E5885482%2EaySBvA ]GIVE MONTHLY

name: WEST/ABDULLAH 2024 Independent Presidential Campaign | Freedom Funders
subject: Stand With Us: Demand Justice for Palestinians NOW!
body:
Join us in calling for immediate action to end the genocide in Gaza. Together, we can make a difference with Truth, Justice, and Love.

| | |
---
---
## Stand With Us: Demand Justice for Palestinians NOW!
##### **Beloved Peter,**
##### The WEST/ABDULLAH Independent Presidential Campaign urgently calls for justice for Palestinians. We demand immediate action to end the illegal and inhumane genocide of civilians in Gaza and beyond.
# **CEASE FIRE! **
---
---
We **demand** that the Biden-Harris administration instruct the Israeli government to cease its genocidal actions. We also call on the G20 to sanction Israel's government, officials, and military leaders and to halt all arms supplies to Israel.
### **FREE! FREE! FREE PALESTINE!**
We **insist** on the immediate and permanent end of the illegal **occupation** of Palestine. The world's governments must work practically and urgently to establish a State solution and end the forced imprisonment of Palestinians, just as they did to facilitate the **horrific** Nakba.
### **LIFT EVERY VOICE!**
**Truth | Justice | LOVE** is not just a slogan; it is our battle cry for a world where every child, whether in Gaza or Tel Aviv, is valued and **entitled** to justice. This is what love looks like in public, and it is the **hope** that inspires our **movement**.

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Asking for $1
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today
#

**$1.**
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. Yes, just $1.
$1 because our work to pass gun safety legislation, both at the state and federal level, is fueled by people like you chipping in to messages like these.
$1 because we need to help our endorsed gun safety candidates win their elections in November so we can flip the House, hold the Senate, and defend the White House.
$1 because the NRA made a comeback and outraised the gun safety movement in May, and we need to be sure that doesn’t happen again.
We know it may not seem like $1 has the power to do all of these things. But when everyone contributes their $1, it all adds up and makes a HUGE impact on our work to save lives.
So please:
[**Use this link to make a $1 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july24.-nTEO4&refcode=em240707-1-30&t=1&akid=8443%2E3935704%2Ef9LxD9)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $1](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july24.omYPF9&amount=1&refcode=em240707-1-30&t=2&akid=8443%2E3935704%2Ef9LxD9)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july24.omYPF9&refcode=em240707-1-30&t=3&akid=8443%2E3935704%2Ef9LxD9)**
---
****
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8443%2E3935704%2Ef9LxD9) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| **There’s a critical primary election happening on July 30 that could reshape Arizona's future and set a powerful precedent for climate action _nationwide._** **[Read more about this important election below, and if you can, please split a $9 donation — $3 each — between the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and two of our endorsed climate champions, Analise Ortiz and Oscar De Los Santos >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88438714/484101629/1855296762?amount=9&refcode=ea.7b01b9a9-a03c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.7b01b9a9-a03c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiMDFiOWE5LWEwM2MtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pM-zaq0obenl9VuqjMxeCUsJWKLpO-cjBcMnNkf5oYo=)** | [**SPLIT A DONATION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88438715/484101630/1855296762?amount=9&refcode=ea.7b01b9a9-a03c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.7b01b9a9-a03c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiMDFiOWE5LWEwM2MtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pM-zaq0obenl9VuqjMxeCUsJWKLpO-cjBcMnNkf5oYo=)
---
**On July 30th, Arizona will face a pivotal primary election that could change _everything._** This primary is the first hurdle to clear on our path to electing a pro-climate majority to the state legislature in November, but we need your help to make it happen!
Arizona is at the forefront of the climate crisis. With its unique environmental challenges, such as severe water shortages and extreme heat, the policies implemented here set a precedent for other states that face similar issues. This election is a chance to show the country that bold climate action is both necessary _and possible._
For too long, the Republican majority neglected Arizona's growing water crisis and allowed corporate polluters to thrive. They’ve used their power to pass numerous anti-climate bills, including making it illegal to monitor greenhouse gas emissions. All the while, Arizonans have been forced to watch as their water was sold to foreign entities and essential environmental protections were stripped away piece by piece.
Electing a pro-climate majority to the Arizona state legislature means we can take significant steps to undo years of harmful policies and move toward a sustainable future not just for Arizona, but as a model for the rest of the nation.
**With Governor Katie Hobbs in office and the entire legislature up for grabs, we have a golden opportunity to win a critical legislative trifecta. Republicans currently hold a razor-thin, one-vote majority in both chambers._Just two seats!_ That’s all we need to flip to gain the majority.**
Jane PAC has proudly endorsed 11 climate champions for the State House and Senate who will hold corporate polluters accountable and undo the years of damage caused by the Republican legislature.
**Today, we want to highlight two candidates who are facing competitive primary races on July 30th and need our immediate support:**
**🌍 Analise Ortiz, LD24 Senate**
Analise is running for State Senate with a focus on delivering results and prioritizing community needs over corporate interests. She is devoted to fighting for a just transition and cleaning up a Superfund site that threatens the health of the people in her district. Analise’s dedication to environmental justice and community health makes her an indispensable ally in our fight for a sustainable future.
**🌍 Oscar De Los Santos, LD11 House**
A child of immigrants, a teacher, and a fighter for the working class, Oscar has dedicated his life to public service and progressive values. Elected to the House in 2022, Oscar serves as the Assistant Democratic Leader, the second-highest ranking Democrat in the chamber. He has taken on corporate corruption and championed clean air, clean water, and environmental justice. Now, Oscar is running for re-election to continue representing LD11 and to keep fighting for frontline communities.
**[These climate champions need our support to win their primaries on July 30th, and grassroots support could make or break their chances. Click here to split a $9 donation between their campaigns and the Jane Fonda Climate PAC today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88438716/484101631/1855296762?amount=9&refcode=ea.7b01b9a9-a03c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.7b01b9a9-a03c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiMDFiOWE5LWEwM2MtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pM-zaq0obenl9VuqjMxeCUsJWKLpO-cjBcMnNkf5oYo=)**

clean_body: Your support today can help make history. | | There’s a critical primary election happening on July 30 that could reshape Arizona's future and set a powerful precedent for climate action nationwide. = | = On July 30th, Arizona will face a pivotal primary election that could change everything. This primary is the first hurdle to clear on our path to electing a pro-climate majority to the state legislature in November, but we need your help to make it happen! Arizona is at the forefront of the climate crisis. With its unique environmental challenges, such as severe water shortages and extreme heat, the policies implemented here set a precedent for other states that face similar issues. This election is a chance to show the country that bold climate action is both necessary and possible. For too long, the Republican majority neglected Arizona's growing water crisis and allowed corporate polluters to thrive. They’ve used their power to pass numerous anti-climate bills, including making it illegal to monitor greenhouse gas emissions. All the while, Arizonans have been forced to watch as their water was sold to foreign entities and essential environmental protections were stripped away piece by piece. Electing a pro-climate majority to the Arizona state legislature means we can take significant steps to undo years of harmful policies and move toward a sustainable future not just for Arizona, but as a model for the rest of the nation. With Governor Katie Hobbs in office and the entire legislature up for grabs, we have a golden opportunity to win a critical legislative trifecta. Republicans currently hold a razor-thin, one-vote majority in both chambers.Just two seats! That’s all we need to flip to gain the majority. Jane PAC has proudly endorsed 11 climate champions for the State House and Senate who will hold corporate polluters accountable and undo the years of damage caused by the Republican legislature. Today, we want to highlight two candidates who are facing competitive primary races on July 30th and need our immediate support: 🌍 Analise Ortiz, LD24 Senate Analise is running for State Senate with a focus on delivering results and prioritizing community needs over corporate interests. She is devoted to fighting for a just transition and cleaning up a Superfund site that threatens the health of the people in her district. Analise’s dedication to environmental justice and community health makes her an indispensable ally in our fight for a sustainable future. 🌍 Oscar De Los Santos, LD11 House A child of immigrants, a teacher, and a fighter for the working class, Oscar has dedicated his life to public service and progressive values. Elected to the House in 2022, Oscar serves as the Assistant Democratic Leader, the second-highest ranking Democrat in the chamber. He has taken on corporate corruption and championed clean air, clean water, and environmental justice. Now, Oscar is running for re-election to continue representing LD11 and to keep fighting for frontline communities. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for being with us. The Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

The only way Trisha can send Boebert packing and flip this seat blue is if grassroots donors like you give right now: = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Trisha isn’t taking money from corporate PACs like Boebert. If we’re going to give Lauren Boebert the boot this November, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to chip in now. name: Team Gallego
subject: LEAKED POLL: Lake Leads Gallego by ONE POINT in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
The Washington Post just reported on a leaked poll from the National Republican Senatorial Committee.
| Team, we’ll keep this short.

The Washington Post just reported on a leaked poll from the National Republican Senatorial Committee.

Kari Lake leads Ruben by 1% in that poll — the first time she’s beaten Ruben in publicly available polling since February.

Bad. Bad, bad, bad.

There’s a lot that needs to happen to turn this around. First and foremost, we need to get back on track to our goals. If we do not raise what we need to win this race Kari Lake is going to hold and expand this lead.

With Ruben down, please:

[Split a $10 donation with the Voter Protection Project to help Ruben retake the lead in Arizona. We need Arizona to hold the Senate — and we need your help to defeat Kari Lake. Please.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71385?t=6&akid=15463%2E878179%2EFXbJ7V) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ruben Gallego and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71386?t=7&akid=15463%2E878179%2EFXbJ7V)

subject: The truth, the whole truth, and nothing but the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:

| | | **We don't want you to leave! Friend, Most politicians rely on consultants and D.C. insiders to guide their agendas — but not me.

In fact, when I’m on the ballot in Michigan’s Senate election, it’ll be everyday Americans like **YOU** who decide whether or not I go to Washington.

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: The RNC starts a week from tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, you read that right.
It’s tough for us to wrap our heads around, too. But the RNC is next week.
The GOP is gloating right now. They are more united than ever, more emboldened than ever, more dangerous than ever. They’re raising money hand over fist, and they will use every dollar of it to tear us apart if we give them the chance.
They think they have us on the run. It’s time to prove them wrong.
We’ve worked too hard for too long to let them get the best of us. So we need everyone who understands the stakes of this election — how important Arizona is to our chances, how critical it is that we hold the Senate, and how big of an impact their donations can have — to chip in right now.
[**Please, make a donation of any amount to help us fight back against Kari Lake and the MAGA-right as they head into the RNC. The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, because they add up fast when everyone is chipping in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240707-2-120&t=1&akid=2578%2E734936%2E3pw7Hf)

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Why I’m worried about Ohio and Sherrod Brown's race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28064?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1968%2E52803%2EuhalpY ][IMG]

Friend, November might be a few months away, but election season is
already in full swing.

So much is on the line this year, from abortion access to better wages and
working conditions to our fundamental right to vote. Future progress on
all of these issues depends on protecting our razor-thin Democratic Senate
majority – and if we wait until the fall to take action, it’ll already be
too late.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28064?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1968%2E52803%2EuhalpY ]That’s why I’m asking you to support my friend and colleague Sherrod
Brown today. Sherrod is in the fight of his life in Ohio, and experts say
this race could decide Senate control, so please: Give every dollar you
can to split between Sherrod and Angela Alsobrooks to help reelect a true
champion for working families.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28064?t=1011&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1968%2E52803%2EuhalpY ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28064?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1968%2E52803%2EuhalpY ]Chip in $50
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28064?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1968%2E52803%2EuhalpY ]Chip in $100 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28064?t=1014&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=1968%2E52803%2EuhalpY ]Chip in $200
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28064?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1968%2E52803%2EuhalpY ]Chip in $250 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28064?t=1016&amount=35&akid=1968%2E52803%2EuhalpY ]Other Amount

Here’s why I’m so worried about this race: Experts are calling Sherrod one
of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and national Republicans
smell blood. They’re already spending millions to flip this seat and the
Senate red, and Mitch McConnell’s super PACs just made their largest ad
investment EVER to try to take down Sherrod.

Now, polls show this race is neck and neck, so Sherrod’s counting on US –
you and me, friend – to help him pull ahead. Unlike his wealthy
self-funding opponent, Sherrod can’t write his campaign million-dollar
checks. That’s why I set a personal goal to raise $75,000 for Sherrod’s
campaign by midnight tonight, and I need you to help me get there.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28064?t=1007&amount=5&akid=1968%2E52803%2EuhalpY ]If we lose this race, we lose the Senate, plain and simple. With that
in mind, will you rush $5 or more to help Sherrod win in Ohio and defend
our Senate majority?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28064?t=1008&amount=5&akid=1968%2E52803%2EuhalpY ]Donate

Thank you.

– Chuck Schumer

So much is on the line this year, from abortion access to better wages and working conditions to our fundamental right to vote. Future progress on all of these issues depends on protecting our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority – and if we wait until the fall to take action, it’ll already be too late. [ ]That’s why I’m asking you to support my friend and colleague Sherrod Brown today. Sherrod is in the fight of his life in Ohio, and experts say this race could decide Senate control, so please: Give every dollar you can to split between Sherrod and Angela Alsobrooks to help reelect a true champion for working families. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. [ ]Chip in $25 [ ]Chip in $50 [ ]Chip in $100 [ ]Chip in $200 [ ]Chip in $250 [ ]Other Amount Here’s why I’m so worried about this race: Experts are calling Sherrod one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and national Republicans smell blood. They’re already spending millions to flip this seat and the Senate red, and Mitch McConnell’s super PACs just made their largest ad investment EVER to try to take down Sherrod. Now, polls show this race is neck and neck, so Sherrod’s counting on US – you and me, friend – to help him pull ahead. Unlike his wealthy self-funding opponent, Sherrod can’t write his campaign million-dollar checks. That’s why I set a personal goal to raise $75,000 for Sherrod’s campaign by midnight tonight, and I need you to help me get there. [ ]If we lose this race, we lose the Senate, plain and simple. With that in mind, will you rush $5 or more to help Sherrod win in Ohio and defend our Senate majority? [ ]Donate Thank you. – Chuck Schumer [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. [ ]Text JOIN to 74064 to receive SMS updates [ ]Chip in a one-time donation [ ]Chip in a monthly recurring donation! You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate Alsobrooks for Senate PO Box 6058 Largo, MD 20792

name: Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.)
subject: What are your core values?
body:
It’s a question that every person should ask themselves. | | | _**What are your core values?**_ It’s a question that every person should ask themselves.

In Congress, too many politicians are driven by greed and power.

_But that will never be me._

I served our country as a Green Beret, and _the same values I held every day fighting for our freedom abroad I still hold in Washington D.C. every day._

I’m going tell your about which values are most important to me, and I hope you’ll take a moment to reflect on the values YOU bring to the ballot box when you vote.

**So, let’s start with one of the most important virtues you need in leadership:_sacrifice_. **

Serving as a Green Beret, I had to put my own needs and impulses to the side for the good of our country.

I spent many birthdays, holidays, and celebrations away from my family on the other side of the world.

_It was tough, but I wouldn’t trade it for anything._

Too many politicians today have never sacrificed anything.

They’re motivated by self interest, not the interests of our country.

**Let me be clear: I will always put service to my country and my constituents over my own personal gain.**

**[I’m on a mission to bring more leaders to Washington who put service over self, but I need your help. Can you pitch in now and help us win for real leaders?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=eae110ecbbc14c63800ecd3d110bd693&_e=WlvOar2rhAfjSEtBl2lgrasYtTDVlisx33_LYOy28CX5MPQ2v-mIStGiF91KPPB7EDtso6mVokcJya2fem4xkMvVapjHSP6qdMQT1PzS271W5oOkXltIkFv-kwbQHUFzRoih5Np5sFssz7qtaY0ixbYw4j2haUlgwbe0k2ljG-b_up2DaC3epGDhQUpxEfaBJiTTRZJDB-VfWymF1H9I-FCqsgNOY8vx09K_ed1ginqu6JHz0xO4958Zufax4kTvvf8hMSWZgRp4Py0pMrmBlC83h34zrZH-OYcOl8GcAgKyxF2BVRsizfhspZI92rkckOaCMAFZqYYCq2yMssNEf9p4WoJ10RXRtGGFjKgchye1RR9rdsBiwuY7Bq0uZlfw)**

name: Ritchie
subject: No one thought I’d make it to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88440290/484107021/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWNiMjcyOS1hYTNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wmwFbUUpDNnK6-XvmVw07MVnuvuIhpMSdj6vQMFEvw=)

Hey Peter, I’m not your typical Congressman: I was raised by a single mother in the Bronx, we lived in public housing, and she made the minimum wage – _which was just over $4 at the time!_

Looking at my upbringing, no one would’ve ever thought I’d one day be a Congressman – _**but that’s why it’s so crucial that I’m here.**_

Thanks to donations from grassroots donors like you, we’ve made change possible. But I’ll be honest, Peter:

Since I don’t do a second of “call time,” it’s support from folks like you that fuels this people-powered movement.

[That’s why I have to ask: Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to keep me fighting for families like my own in Congress? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88440291/484107022/-723981995?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240707_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWNiMjcyOS1hYTNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wmwFbUUpDNnK6-XvmVw07MVnuvuIhpMSdj6vQMFEvw=) | [CHIP IN $3 TO RE-ELECT RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88440292/484107023/-723981995?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240707_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWNiMjcyOS1hYTNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wmwFbUUpDNnK6-XvmVw07MVnuvuIhpMSdj6vQMFEvw=)
---
Peter, while some people in Congress spend hours doing “call time” and begging mega-donors to give to their campaigns, I can’t – _**but more importantly I won’t.**_

I am beholden to no one but the people of this country.

But that’s only possible because when I ask this team to step up, they do.

**So I am calling on you to step up once more, Peter.**

[If just 8% of the people who read this give $3, we will be in a perfect spot to stay on track with fundraising. So please, Peter: Will you chip in $3 before midnight? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88440293/484107024/-723981995?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240707_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWNiMjcyOS1hYTNjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wmwFbUUpDNnK6-XvmVw07MVnuvuIhpMSdj6vQMFEvw=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Biden HQ
subject: Donate now to defeat Donald Trump once and for all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| | |

Dear Fellow American,

Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.

To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**

**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis.
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=583ee88d12e4425e9bad258daf380267&_e=x03DqYjBd60uiJdj_fh-jiTlfGKR2u7N8dymB9nbn-TBHFW-N1FPf7BDbITBoyAkwxaVMpUqEXMZ5A4s7p6c74wJFBbw7qjWihuXTbzPpyC2ADdUBz5KKTHsuLY20RwQden_bxYd7CwH3yoSniuMzh4TT0ZaL1BQjpySgJ45c_NMzWN8DK0q7ae3Uju7gR-b6cJdRcH9Ue8WT-0djLCS_U6ZUQBaPc2CLClFR0v37Uw5lt2QASWaJa6uBJSLmiK_Exd0ZXt-eQPAeNh1TziThLIZY0bgwgwN4Iei8yjH8WkOgSZMuPMIgbRneh8lipPcWf8h2w_QZB_WSTvG-9eB-7afyOO5-CrP03b3y16BDpjULEtCAaBkNdvKj6aDy9tVBgxWIOfRiegVZhWhJgO2b4-sIrjOpI-nWIgCoUeRZfI%3D)
If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=583ee88d12e4425e9bad258daf380267&_e=x03DqYjBd60uiJdj_fh-jiTlfGKR2u7N8dymB9nbn-TBHFW-N1FPf7BDbITBoyAkwxaVMpUqEXMZ5A4s7p6c74wJFBbw7qjWihuXTbzPpyC2ADdUBz5KKTHsuLY20RwQden_bxYd7CwH3yoSniuMzh4TT0ZaL1BQjpySgJ45c_NMzWN8DK0q7ae3Uju7gR-b6cJdRcH9Ue8WT-0djLCS_U6ZUQBaPc2CLClFR0v37Uw5lt2QASWaJa6uBJSLmiK_Exd0ZXt-eQPAeNh1TziThMS8HoFYbprEumDzzahhdczbXEhewaLxiuyl21I0RjAInLpW5809KJzpvIaWAFetr-DUr69KenrjmXWY6080L0rKPVx9itzOxWwqbpWY0uxnSo7qFNYxQ7fbCBO8Ixa5H2plKbxOsoKlM6DWQbXXg6M%3D)**

Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=583ee88d12e4425e9bad258daf380267&_e=x03DqYjBd60uiJdj_fh-jiTlfGKR2u7N8dymB9nbn-TBHFW-N1FPf7BDbITBoyAkwxaVMpUqEXMZ5A4s7p6c74wJFBbw7qjWihuXTbzPpyC2ADdUBz5KKTHsuLY20RwQden_bxYd7CwH3yoSniuMzh4TT0ZaL1BQjpySgJ45c_NMzWN8DK0q7ae3Uju7gR-b6cJdRcH9Ue8WT-0djLCS_U6ZUQBaPc2CLClFR0v37Uw5lt2QASWaJa6uBJSLmiK_Exd0ZXt-eQPAeNh1TziThOiSz_KV1yn5zh0BX0CeVKcQdtaZ1718MolP2V4PjRuanvIKL02PR0oKtaqf7DzI2xP2qwAZST2rCUVlmgPlhAD2IzHkwW3ie4dv3Ak8-rEDetnx5jDYfNRrj3v6IoUIEsJaK6LTY73Z0TmMdfuftCA%3D)**

Hey folks,

Can split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us turn things around and reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, and I’ll never take your donations for granted. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: Mike Lee
subject: Illegal immigrants are being registered to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
ONE CITIZEN. ONE VOTE.

| Friend,

I introduced the SAVE ACT - which will protect American voters and prevent illegal aliens from voting in federal elections.

But across the country -- illegal immigrants are being registered to vote. ONE CITIZEN. ONE VOTE.

That's the way it's been and that's what federal law requires.

The SAVE ACT would stop this and it should pass unanimously -- by both Republicans AND Democrats who believe in democracy and FAIR ELECTIONS.

In fact, the only reason to oppose this that I can think of is if you're comfortable with or want non-citizens to vote. Or want non-citizens to influence the outcome of our elections.

There are estimates putting non-citizens in this country somewhere approaching 30 MILLION.

This is a major threat to our democracy and the SAVE ACT is our last chance to protect our elections.

**[Will you chip in just $1 so I can prove there is support behind my efforts: leeforsenate.com/save-act](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=79e19a5a91014060bb48b92637e77c51&_e=ofL7N2kxXcd8Tq7pMi6PVp6bvs-lIiZE2LTvhlSKQVbdJ3hpIEnWhzoBEd_TV00krHg5NeRlxEaxnVO1k8wutmspRGwpOw86-z6_xYkFJVmhAciV7zt7NsylgZXmtsok4gkrgaB2OVHS8I6ANIT-8hFAXJBO72CMDhPW2H_5L0dTGVNxOIlwncDTq40XljLNMqr3_PsGBQ_6dwC_r5WXl2-Gowba_JgBYhWHYxOn149wmmwfAcXM1UId3I1H_7SWppwfROhUs6_BgqLxb99-UvVXQxN_PWF2NzQd3pi31H0e8GK3QnydQsTKYz6kTPTld1RKTzmLYQQuLZgGypaYpow2iU692xsgunj9WDRh2qFRs0Zv5BySS4G5NdMv_QU34a6kMWf0TdBqmlwi5m0Ttw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: ONE CITIZEN. ONE VOTE. | Friend, I introduced the SAVE ACT - which will protect American voters and prevent illegal aliens from voting in federal elections. But across the country -- illegal immigrants are being registered to vote. ONE CITIZEN. ONE VOTE. That's the way it's been and that's what federal law requires. The SAVE ACT would stop this and it should pass unanimously -- by both Republicans AND Democrats who believe in democracy and FAIR ELECTIONS. In fact, the only reason to oppose this that I can think of is if you're comfortable with or want non-citizens to vote. Or want non-citizens to influence the outcome of our elections. There are estimates putting non-citizens in this country somewhere approaching 30 MILLION. This is a major threat to our democracy and the SAVE ACT is our last chance to protect our elections. $1: PASS THE SAVE ACT: I'm fighting for YOU, I'm fighting for our Democracy, and I'm fighting to prevent non-citizens from dictating our elections. This should have unanimous support. But I'm sure we'll face opposition. Chip in just $1 and stand with me today: Thanks, Senator Mike Lee | Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. PO Box 1537 Salt Lake City, UT 84110

clean_body: Your $7 donation could be the difference between electing state Democrats who fight to protect abortion rights or losing to one of our far-right Republican opponents. | | | | | ---|--- We have one question: Is defeating extreme Republicans across the country worth $7 to you? At the state legislative ballot level, races come down to a handful of votes, and resources are limited. A $7 gift could give our in-state partners the necessary resources to fund get-out-the-vote efforts, hire digital staff, and invest in TV ads to spread our message across the airwaves. Your $7 donation could be the difference between electing state Democrats who will fight to protect abortion rights or losing to one of our far-right Republican opponents who aim to attack all of our fundamental freedoms. We’re working to expand Democratic power, defend our majorities, and break up Republican supermajorities this fall – but it all starts with a donation from grassroots supporters like you. name: Jill Stein
subject: Yes, democracy IS on the ballot this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democracy_on_the_ballot&n=1)
---
Peter,

There’s a lot of chatter right now about democracy being “on the ballot” this year. I’m here to tell you that it’s true. The stakes of this election are as high as they’ve ever been.

_That’s why I’m running for president.

_ If you’ve heard about Project 2025, then you are still in the minority of American voters. The media is only beginning to wake up to what they’ve called the blueprint for American fascism.

And there is plenty in this plan that is alarming. The “highlights” include:
* A **mass purge of dedicated civil servants from every federal agency** to be replaced by unqualified lackeys chosen for their loyalty to the Republican president.

* A deportation regime targeting millions of undocumented Americans and **rounding them up into concentration camps** to stage them for removal from the country.

* **Putting a target squarely on the 2SLGBTQIA+ community** by declaring all media and materials that even mention LGBTQ identities as “pornography” and placing anyone who publishes LGBTQ+ friendly-materials onto a government watchlist.

* Formally weaponizing federal law enforcement agencies to answer to the whims of the president, and even **nationalizing local police forces**.

This is just a taste of what this 900-page plan entails. But here’s what they haven’t told you...

**_This has been the Republican agenda for more than 40 years.

_** Project 2025 is the latest iteration of the Heritage Foundation’s “Mandate for Leadership,” drafted for Ronald Reagan in his first administration. Since then it has repeatedly evolved to incorporate new and terrible plans to expand the powers of the presidency, enrich the billionaire class, forcibly install Christian Nationalism as a governing doctrine, and **convert our pluralistic democracy into the white supremacist police state they’ve always dreamed of.

** The real danger of Project 2025 is that, with a successful, complete, right-wing takeover of our courts, Republicans now have all the tools they need to make it a reality – and Democrats have done nothing to stop them.

We saw this with last week’s Supreme Court decision declaring that presidents are officially above the law. And how did Joe Biden respond to this, a death blow to our constitution?

He said “I dissent” and tepidly promised to never abuse his new powers.

Joe Biden is right about one thing – **democracy IS on the ballot this year.

** But he’s wrong about this: Democrats cannot and will not save us.

**We have to get real about the threats we’re facing.

** This election will decide the future of our planet and the survival of our species as we confront an ever-accelerating climate emergency.

This election will decide whether or not women will remain second class citizens without full autonomy over our bodies and our lives.

This election will decide if our 2SLGBTQIA+ siblings will see all of their hard-won rights stripped away in the face of escalating harassment, abuse, and violence.

This election will decide if we continue to fund and facilitate the extermination of an entire people in Palestine, and whether we allow that barbarity to expand into a regional war that pulls in our own troops and makes us even more complicit in Israel’s war crimes.

This election will decide a lot of things, not the least of which is whether or not we continue to exist as the UNITED states of America.

With so much on the line, we have to be honest about our options.

Republicans have proudly broadcast their plans for more than 40 years. **Democrats have done NOTHING to meaningfully stay the right wing’s fascist ambitions – and in more ways than I can begin to enumerate Democrats have actively**** _advanced_****those ambitions.

** As Biden’s approval ratings and electoral chances continue to plummet, THIS is what Kevin Robertson, president of the Heritage Foundation and principal architect of Project 2025, has to say about their plans:

_“We are in the process of the second American Revolution, which will remain bloodless if the left allows it to be.”

_ That is a threat, and it must be treated as such.

**Joe Biden cannot and will not meet this moment, but I will.

[Ours is the ONLY pro-worker, pro-planet, pro-peace, anti-genocide campaign that will be on the ballot everywhere this November. After that disastrous debate, millions of American voters are re-examining their options – and they need to hear from us.](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democracy_on_the_ballot&n=2)**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democracy_on_the_ballot&n=3 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democracy_on_the_ballot&n=3)
---
In his recent interview with George Stephanopoulos, Biden was asked how he would feel if, despite all the warnings and the hundreds of millions of dollars Democrats are raising, Trump actually wins and all of this comes to pass.

Biden’s answer was: _“I'll feel, as long as I gave it my all, and I did as good a job as I know I can do, that's what this is about.”

_ That’s his answer to the threat of American fascism and the collapse of American leadership on the world stage: “At least I did my best.”

It reveals a cold hard truth about the president and every member of our political elite: **if Trump is re-elected, they will be fine.

** They’ll go back to fundraising for the next election. They’ll run to K-Street and cash in as lobbyists. Or they’ll retire to Martha’s Vineyard.

The elites will survive a second Trump presidency without a hitch. It is always the most vulnerable who pay the price for repeated Democratic failures and betrayals.

**[I need your financial support to get our campaign out to every voter looking for a president who will actually fight for our democracy as if lives are on the line – because they are.](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democracy_on_the_ballot&n=4)

******In solidarity and gratitude,

Jill
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democracy_on_the_ballot&n=5 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democracy_on_the_ballot&n=5)
---
* * *
---

P.O. Box 4359, Fall River, MA 02723-0415

subject: Join the Biden-Harris Veterans & Military Families Events with Dr. Jill Biden!
body:
https://www.takingthehillpac.com/ [https://www.takingthehillpac.com/]
Join Biden-Harris Veterans & Military Families Events with Dr. Jill Biden
Friend,
Taking the Hill is excited to announce that the Biden-Harris campaign is hosting events for Veterans & Military Families tomorrow July 8th with First Lady Dr. Jill Biden!
On behalf of Taking the Hill, Terron Sims – Chair, DNC Veterans & Military Families Council, and the Biden-Harris campaign we would like to invite you to join us in our support. The locations and links to RSVP for the events are below!
Wilmington, NC: Guest RSVP [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd_fTdsGQ_5U6QQJDTkyyx_ymaFHitGUV-PpgFGzTOyh52AQg/viewform]
Tampa, FL: Guest RSVP [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdWqvmdelIzN-gcFDdCAnS8496NJdd0nlEoKPx5PJXEIMOefg/viewform]
Columbus, GA: Guest RSVP [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScER4pha93x_kYiYOr34LuHdipddgL7TNKkKHQTdHPWp8x1ew/viewform]
Thank you,
Dan Kunze
Board Chairman, Taking the Hill

**I NEED you to read this, friend!**

Jacky Rosen’s Senate race in Nevada could determine whether the GOP wins back Senate control – and polling has been showing her neck and neck with Mitch McConnell's hand-picked candidate for months.
I’m going to give it to you straight: Keeping Nevada and the Senate blue isn’t going to be easy. Jacky's extreme GOP opponent is already breaking fundraising records, and dark money groups like the Koch network are pouring millions into Nevada to flip it red.

**That’s why I’m calling on every single Democrat to throw their full support behind Jacky right now. That includes YOU, friend!**
After 50 years of working in politics, I can tell you that Jacky has what it takes to win. But to do that, she desperately needs the same kind of massive grassroots support that helped Democrats eke out a victory in Nevada and defend the Senate in the last election – a real nail-biter that came down to just 7,928 votes.
Will you join me now to help Jacky raise the resources she needs to fight back against the GOP and defend her must-win seat? clean_body: Please read. | Friend, Despite having a really strong close to the fundraising quarter, we didn 't quite hit our goal for the recent quarterly deadline. If I may, I 'd like to ask for your support to make up for lost ground. | Unfortunately, this still seems to be a common theme nationwide. Our Democrat opponents are outraising Republicans in Senate races in battleground states across the country, and we're running low on time to turn this trend around. Election Day is just about four months away, and if we don't gain ground right NOW, we are in danger of letting our chances of a Republican Senate majority slip from our grasp. We need all the support possible to win back the Senate this November. Are you with me? Let 's take back the Senate! Best, Senator Chuck Grassley Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. body:
| Peter,

We just got back new polling in our race, and we wanted to make sure you saw it: 🟦 Elissa Slotkin: 44%
🟥 Mike Rogers: 42%
🟪 Undecided: 14% That’s right, the race for Michigan’s open Senate seat is in a dead heat. Statistically speaking, this is a tie.

With less than 4 months to go, 14% of voters are still undecided. Control of Michigan’s Senate seat—and likely control of the Senate—will come down to a series of choices.

Our campaign’s choices. Our opponent’s choices. Voters' choices. The choices of conservative dark money groups in Washington D.C.

And your choices.

You see, Elissa refuses corporate PAC money, so our campaign is funded by small contributions from individuals like you.

name: Kari Lake
subject: We’re losing Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
WE CAN WIN! WE NEED EVERYONE'S HELP TO CATCH UP!

Here's what you need to know -- I'll keep this short, just a few sentences, so please read the entire email.

**I'm behind, We're losing Arizona.**

Ruben Gallego's massive ad campaigns are working, and I'm just a few points behind him in recent polls. We're being outraised and outspent, BIG TIME.

There's no time like the present, I need to ask you for your help because we're running out of time; there are less than FOUR MONTHS until Election Day.

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: A great rebuke to Betsy DeVos.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1624%2E135344%2E0VkZH2)

If everyone reading this donated $3 to Elissa Slotkin’s Senate campaign, we would not only have a huge number of donations, but we would reach the incremental goals we need to hit in order to win this race and keep Michigan’s Senate seat BLUE.
Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the fact that Elissa rejects corporate PAC money makes things harder than they could be. [**So she's relying on people who understand how important this race is -- and Michigan is -- to chip in before our pre-primary FEC deadline ends.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240707-2&t=2&akid=1624%2E135344%2E0VkZH2)**
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240707-2&t=3&akid=1624%2E135344%2E0VkZH2)
Friends --
The DeVos family has supported opponents of Elissa in the past, and it looks like they’re ready to double down on this Senate race.
Republican Mike Rogers' first FEC report was filled with donations from a bunch of members of the DeVos family -- contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day.
By contrast, the majority of the donations we receive come from people contributing significantly smaller donations than the DeVos family made to Mike Rogers.
And what you may not know is that one of the single greatest sources of individual donations to our campaign is the response to emails like this.
That’s why Elissa would love to earn your support today. [**Your help using this link to make a contribution to Elissa’s campaign for United States Senate would be a great rebuke to the DeVos support.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240707-2&t=4&akid=1624%2E135344%2E0VkZH2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
